basic.name: Furious Swipes
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + clear Defense Up + apply Defense Down.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 200% Piercing + clear Defense Up + apply Defense Down.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Deafening Clap
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 250% Piercing + clear Defense Up + apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Defense Down for 2 turns.

Gain +100% Extra Focus against targets with Defense Down.
Gain +100% Crit Chance against targets with Defense Down or Defense Up.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Pulverize
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 600% Piercing + flip all Evade, Deflect, and Minor Deflect + apply Defense Down and Stun.

This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

On WAR DEFENSE, this attack targets the enemy with the highest Focus instead of the primary target, ignoring Taunt.

passive.name: Grotesque Rage
passive.description:
On Turn, heal self for 20% of this character's Max Health.
On Turn, flip 1 random positive effect on all enemies with any positive effects.

Gain +30% Max Health.
Gain +30% Drain.
Gain +30% Focus for each GAMMA ally.
GAMMA allies gain +30% Max Health.
GAMMA allies gain +30% Drain.

basic.name: Brick Bash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 360% damage + copy and clear 2 positive effects, excluding Stealth and Taunt, from the primary target to self.

If the primary target has Vulnerable, gain +2 Deflect, up to a max of 5.

special.name: Wrecking Ball
special.description:
Copy and clear all negative effects from all MASTERS OF EVIL allies to self.
Flip all negative effects to positive effects on self.

Apply Offense Down for 2 turns to the primary target.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage.

Clear Taunt from all allies.
Gain Taunt. In CRUCIBLE, gain Taunt for 2 turns instead.

ultimate.name: Diamond in the Rough
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects from self.

In CRUCIBLE, heal self for 40% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary target for 500% damage + clear all positive effects.

In CRUCIBLE, apply Deflect and Immunity to self and MASTERS OF EVIL allies.

passive.name: Hardened Criminal
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Taunt and 3 Deflect.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, apply 4 Counter to a random Titania ally.

When this character is attacked, copy and clear 1 positive effect, excluding Stealth and Taunt, from the attacker to self + gain +1 Defense Up, up to a max of 3.

In CRUCIBLE, on Block, heal for 5% of this character's Max Health.

When this character drops below 50% Health, if this character has Taunt, fill Speed Bar by 30% + clear Taunt.

Gain +20% Armor and Resistance per Defense Up on this character.

In CRUCIBLE, gain +50% Resistance.
In CRUCIBLE, MASTERS OF EVIL allies gain +50% Resistance.

basic.name: Soul Mage Assault
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage.
Prolong the duration of all negative effects, excluding Ability Block and Stun, by 1.
Apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns to the primary target.

special.name: Enfeebling Blast
special.description:
Attack primary target for 500% damage + apply Ability Block for 2 turns.
Apply Ability Block to all enemy VILLAIN PROTECTORS for 2 turns.
Apply Disrupted to all enemy PROTECTORS for 2 turns.

Clear 1 Vulnerable and all Darkness from all GALACTIC COUNCIL allies.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Power Overwhelming
ultimate.description:
Apply Safeguard to self and all GALACTIC COUNCIL and INFINITY WATCH allies.

Attack primary target for 420% damage + apply Stun. Chain to 1 target within 2 spaces of the primary target for 370% damage + apply Stun.

This attack can Chain to Stealth targets.
This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Avatar of Life
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Safeguard + Immunity to self and all INFINITY WATCH allies.
 > Gain Revive Once. This character will Revive with 60% of this character's Max Health.

On Revive:
 > Gain Deathproof and Defense Up.
 > Clear all negative effects from self and all GALACTIC COUNCIL and INFINITY WATCH allies.

On Turn:
 > Apply Regeneration for 2 turns to the most injured ally.
 > Apply Regeneration to 2 random GALACTIC COUNCIL allies

basic.name: Witchcraft
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 275% Piercing.
If the primary target is MYSTIC, deal 5% of the target's Max Health.

Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 3, to self and all DARKHOLD and NIGHTSTALKER allies.

Call 1 random adjacent DARKHOLD or NIGHTSTALKER ally to attack the primary target. Called ally attacks for -50% Damage.
In ARENA, call 2 random adjacent DARKHOLD allies to attack the primary target instead.

special.name: Binding Enchantment
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + apply Slow.
If the primary target has Slow, Bonus Attack for 180% Piercing + apply Stun.
If the primary target has Stun, Bonus Attack for 180% Piercing + prolong the duration of all negative effects, excluding Ability Block and Stun, by 1.

ultimate.name: Runescape
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 150% Piercing + Bonus Attack 2 times for 150% Piercing.
Apply Heal Block for 2 turns + Offense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.
Apply Stun to the HERO MYSTIC BLASTER enemy with the highest Damage and apply Stun to the HERO MYSTIC CONTROLLER enemy with the highest Damage.

Heal self and all allies for 35% of this character's Max Health.
Barrier self and all DARKHOLD and NIGHTSTALKER allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Gain 2 Ability Energy for each MYSTIC enemy, up to a maximum of 6 Ability Energy.

This attack gains +50% Extra Focus for each MYSTIC enemy.

passive.name: Salem Survivor
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 2 Deathproof.

When this character or any DARKHOLD or NIGHTSTALKER ally drops below 30% Max Health for the first time, do the following:
> Clear Disrupted on that character.
> Flip 4 negative effects into positive effects on that character.
> Apply Defense Up and Stealth to that character.
> Barrier that character for 30% of this character's Max Health.

When any enemy drops below 30% Max Health for the first time, do the following:
> Attack that character for 100% Piercing.
> Flip 3 positive effects into negative effects on that character.
> Apply Disrupted to that character.
> Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 3, to all DARKHOLD and NIGHTSTALKER allies.

At the end of any turn, if this character has Taunt, gain Stealth.

Gain +50% Focus. DARKHOLD and NIGHTSTALKER allies gain +50% Focus.
Gain +25% Drain. DARKHOLD and NIGHTSTALKER allies gain +25% Drain.

basic.name: Gun Play
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns. Chain to 1 adjacent target for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

In RAIDS, Chain to an additional adjacent target for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

On any Crit, apply Bleed.

special.name: Symbiotic Smackdown
special.description:
Attack primary target 250% Piercing.
Bonus Attack 2 times for 250% Piercing.

If this character has 3 or more REBIRTH allies, Bonus Attack 1 additional time for 250% Piercing.

In RAIDS, flip a positive effect to a negative effect on each attack.

ultimate.name: Bullet Storm
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 320% Piercing + 30% additional damage for each positive and negative effect on the primary target.

In RAIDS, if this character has 3 or more REBIRTH allies, on Crit, repeat this attack.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Symbiote Agent
passive.description:
In RAIDS, if this character has 3 or more REBIRTH allies, on this character or REBIRTH ally Block, attack the most injured enemy for 100% damage, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

Gain +5% Crit Damage per REBIRTH ally.
Gain +30% Damage. REBIRTH allies gain +30% Damage.
In RAIDS, gain an additional +30% Damage for self and all REBIRTH allies.

basic.name: Puncture
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage. Copy all negative effects on this character to the primary target + apply a random negative effect.

special.name: Biohazard
special.description:
Fill Speed Bar by 75%.
Heal self for 10,000 Health + 20% of Max Health.

Gain 2 Counter.  Apply 2 Counter to adjacent A.I.M. allies.

passive.name: Metabolism
passive.description:
On Turn, gain 2 random negative effects for 2 turns.

Gain +10% Speed.
Gain +15% Max Health.

On Turn:
> If Offense Down, gain Offense Up for 2 turns.
> If Defense Down, gain Defense Up for 2 turns.
> If Slow, gain Speed Up for 2 turns.

basic.name: Bash
basic.description: Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Defense Down.

special.name: Sudden Evolution
special.description:
Gain Offense Up + apply Offense Up to adjacent A.I.M. allies for 3 turns.
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

This attack cannot miss.

passive.name: Growth Spurt
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Defense Down.
On Turn, Heal for 20% of Max Health.

basic.name: Submachine Gun
basic.description: Attack primary target for 160% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns.

special.name: Hyperdose
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage.
If this character has a negative effect, Bonus attack the primary target for 125% per negative effect on the target
Gain Speed Up for 4 turns.

passive.name: Juicer
passive.description:
On Turn, fill Speed Bar by 20% for self and adjacent A.I.M. allies.
Gain +15% Damage and +10% Max Health.

basic.name: Wounding Shot
basic.description: Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Offense Down for 1 turn.

special.name: Surgery Drone
special.description: Heal lowest Health ally and adjacent allies for 7,000 Health + 15% of this character's Max Health + flip Bleed on lowest Health ally and adjacent allies.

passive.name: Antidote
passive.description:
On Turn, choose 1 random ally to apply 1 random positive effect from this list: Offense Up, Defense Up, Speed Up, Regeneration, Deathproof, Deflect.

If ally is A.I.M., then apply 2 random positive effects from the list.

When a negative effect is applied to an A.I.M. ally, fill this character's Speed Bar by 20%.

basic.name: Takedown
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage. If Ability Blocked, attack primary target for 470% damage instead.
Apply Slow.

special.name: Charge Capacitor
special.description: Gain Taunt for 1 turn + Slow for 2 turns. Heal self and adjacent A.I.M. allies for 10,000 Health + 10% of Max Health.  Clear Speed Up on self.

passive.name: Immunization
passive.description:
On attacked, if Scientist Supreme is an ally, when above 75% Health, transfer 1 negative effect from self and each A.I.M. ally to the attacking enemy.

Gain +10% Max Health and +15% Resistance.

basic.name: Calculated Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply Offense Down.

Apply 2 Regeneration to the most injured CHAMPION or GAMMA ally.

special.name: Gamma Slamma
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 250% damage + copy and clear all positive effects, excluding Taunt, from each target.

Spread all positive effects, excluding Taunt, from self to all CHAMPION or GAMMA allies.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Showboat
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 150% damage + Steal 35% Health from the primary target and redistribute 500% of the Health stolen to self and all CHAMPION or GAMMA allies. This bypasses Heal Block.

Clear all negative effects from self and all CHAMPION or GAMMA allies + apply Immunity.

This attack ignores Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.

passive.name: Mastermind Excello
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Safeguard and Immunity. In WAR, apply Speed Up to self and all GAMMA allies.

On Turn, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.
At the end of any turn, clear Heal Block on self and any CHAMPION or GAMMA ally that has Heal Block and Regeneration.

When this character or any CHAMPION or GAMMA ally drops below 50% Max Health, fill that character's Speed Bar by 15% + apply Offense Up.

Gain +30% Drain. CHAMPION allies gain +30% Drain.

basic.name: Starstruck
basic.description: Attack primary target for 290% damage + apply Defense Down.

special.name: Shooting Star
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + 75% damage per YOUNG AVENGER or HERO BRAWLER ally.

If Kate Bishop is an ally, this attack always Crits.

ultimate.name: Starling Highway
ultimate.description:
Clear 3 positive effects from the primary target.

Attack primary target for 430% damage.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > Target the enemy with the least Speed Bar.
 > Flip 3 positive effects into negative effects instead of clearing them.

passive.name: America's Starling
passive.description:
Gain +25% Max Health. YOUNG AVENGER and HERO BRAWLER allies gain +25% Max Health.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 25% for adjacent allies.
 > Reduce enemy Drain by 100%.
 > If this character has 3 or more YOUNG AVENGER allies, reduce enemy Damage by 20%.

basic.name: Soul Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 200% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.

On Crit, apply an additional 2 Bleed to that target.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to ASTRAL characters.

special.name: Serene Devastation
special.description:
Flip all positive effects into negative effects on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 200% Piercing + 5% of each target's Max Health + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.
This attack gains +50% Extra Crit Damage.

Apply 3 Counter to self and all allies.
In BATTLEWORLD and WAR, apply Speed Up to self and all allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Arcane Reign
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + Rebound Chain to 3 adjacent enemies for 250% Piercing.

Attack the most injured enemy for 250% Piercing + apply Stun + reduce Speed Bar by 100%.

Apply Safeguard to self and all ASTRAL allies.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

passive.name: Master of the Mystic Arts
passive.description:
On Turn, flip Heal Block on self and all allies.

On self and ASTRAL ally Crit, generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all ASTRAL allies.

In BATTLEWORLD and WAR:
 > If this character has 3 or more ASTRAL allies, at the start of any match, enemy characters cannot spawn with Taunt.
 > On Spawn, apply Safeguard to self and all ASTRAL allies.
 > On Turn, prolong the duration of all positive effects by +1, up to a maximum of 3, on self and all ASTRAL allies.

While this character has Counter, reduce enemy Crit Chance by 50%.

Gain +100% chance to Counterattack.
Gain +25% Crit Damage. In BATTLEWORLD, ASTRAL allies gain +25% Crit Damage.
Gain +25% Crit Chance. In BATTLEWORLD, ASTRAL allies gain +25% Crit Chance.

The Focus of this character and each ASTRAL ally can only be reduced by Offense Down.

basic.name: Negative Zone Power
basic.description:
Clear all Barrier on primary target.
Attack primary target for 300% damage + distribute Drain gained from this attack to 5 random allies or self.
This attack deals double damage to enemies with Defense Up and, if this character has any negative effects, gains +100% Crit Chance.

Fill Speed Bar by 15%.

If this character has Cosmic Control Rod:
 > Summon 4 Insectoid Devourer allies. Reduce the number summoned for each non-MINION ally this character has, down to a minimum of 1.
 > Transfer all negative effects, including Trauma, from this character to a random Insectoid Devourer ally.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Decimate and Eradicate
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 400% damage + distribute Drain gained from this attack to 5 random allies or self.
Reduce the duration of Safeguard by 2 on each target with either Defense Up or Speed Up.
Flip all positive effects on all enemies.

Generate 5 Ultimate Ability Energy for self.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Annihilation Wave
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier on all enemies + reduce the count of Deathproof on all enemies to 0.

Attack all enemies for 600% damage + distribute Drain gained from this attack to 5 random allies or self.
This attack deals double damage to enemies with Defense Up and an additional +300% damage to enemies below 50% Max Health.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Nihilistic Tyrant
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Cosmic Control Rod. This action occurs only once per CRUCIBLE or WAR.

While this character has Cosmic Control Rod:
 > On enemy Turn, attack that character with this character's Basic - Negative Zone Power, at the Basic's level 7.
 > Attacks that would defeat this character instead reduce Health to 1, reduce the duration of all negative effects on this character to 0, Heal self for 100% of this character's Max Health, and clear Cosmic Control Rod.
 > Enemies cannot apply Battlefield Effects to the allied side.
 > Enemies cannot Mind Control.
 > Reduce Passive Assist Chance of all enemies by 100%.
 > Enemies cannot gain Charged.
 > This character cannot gain Exhausted, Exposed, Darkness, Stun, Bleed, or Deathproof.

On Kill, until the end of this character's turn, enemies cannot reduce the Max Health of any target.

Enemies cannot have their Max Health or Speed increased through Passive Abilities.
This character can only have their Focus reduced by negative effects.
This character cannot have their Max Health increased or have their Speed Bar fill prevented through Passive Abilities.

basic.name: Quick Attack
basic.description:
Clear all Barrier on primary target.
Attack primary target for 270% damage + transfer 1 negative effect from self to primary target.

special.name: Slam
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on primary target.
Attack primary target for 450% damage + transfer 2 negative effect from self to primary target.

Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 450% damage + transfer 2 negative effect from self to each target.

Fill Speed Bar by 15% of a random Annihilus ally.

This attack can Chain to Stealth targets and Counterattack does not break this Chain.

passive.name: Cosmic Bug
passive.description:
On Turn, if Annihilus is an ally, gain Taunt.

This character cannot have their Speed Bar fill prevented through Passive Abilites.

basic.name: Death Claw
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Bleed and the opposite of 2 random positive effects on this character to the primary target.

Heal the most injured non-summoned ally for 10% of this character's Max Health + clear Heal Block.

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Antiseptic
special.description:
Clear Heal Block on all allies. Apply Immunity to all allies.
Heal all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Revive a dead SYMBIOTE ally with 60% base Health
If there are no SYMBIOTE allies to revive, gain 3 Ability Energy.

ultimate.name: Deadly Cure
ultimate.description:
Gain the opposite of all negative effects, excluding Bleed, on the primary target.
Attack primary target for 300% damage + 100% Drain.
Gain 2 Regeneration.
Spread 2 random positive effects on self to non-SYMBIOTE allies. Spread all positive effects on self to SYMBIOTE allies.

passive.name: Wretched Healer
passive.description:
On Turn:
 > Clear 1 negative effect from the most injured ally that has a negative effect. If that ally is a SYMBIOTE, clear 1 negative effect from all other SYMBIOTE allies with a negative effect.
 > Gain Regeneration.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health, gain Evade.

basic.name: Scrappy Fighter
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage + copy and clear a positive effect, excluding Taunt, from the target to self.

If Wasp is an ally, she also gains the copied effect.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to INFESTATION characters.

special.name: Gum Up the Works
special.description:
Attack primary target for 260% damage + apply Ability Block for 2 turns.

Gain an assist from an ally Wasp.

On WAR DEFENSE, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally:
 > Clear Revive Once from the primary target.
 > This attack will also have the additional effects of this character's Ultimate - Stomp, targeting the primary target.

This attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

ultimate.name: Stomp
ultimate.description:
On WAR DEFENSE, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, clear Revive Once from the primary target.

Attack all enemies for 320% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns to primary target.

Apply Slow to all additional enemies.

If Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, this attack will also have the additional effects of this character's Special - Gum Up the Works, targeting the primary target.

passive.name: Escape Plan
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Evade to Wasp if she is an ally.

On Turn, 25% chance to gain Evade.
On non-PYM TECH or non-INFESTATION, HERO ally turn, 30% chance to gain Assist Now.
On INFESTATION or PYM TECH ally turn, gain Assist Now.

In DARK DIMENSION, on Spawn, apply Evade to self and all INFESTATION and PYM TECH allies.

basic.name: The Alpha
basic.description:
Gain Offense Up and Speed Up.
Heal for 5% of this character's Max Health.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + 100% Drain + apply Bleed.

When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist, if Charged, apply Stun to that target and clear Charged on this character.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

special.name: Seismic Sands
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% Piercing + 100% Drain + apply +1 Ability Block, up to a maximum of 2.
Attack all adjacent targets for 350% Piercing + 100% Drain.

Apply +2 Vulnerable, +2 Offense Down, and +2 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3, to primary and adjacent targets.

Redistribute your total squad health evenly.

Do the following for this character, all HORSEMAN allies, and 2 non-HORSEMAN allies with the highest Damage:
 > Clear all negative effects.
 > Apply +1 Defense Up, up to a maximum of 2.
 > Apply Safeguard and Immunity.

This attack ignores Defense Up.

ultimate.name: The End is Here
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 500% damage + 100% Drain.
Flip Defense Up on all enemies. Flip 2 random positive effects into negative effects on all enemies.
Apply Trauma, Bleed, and Slow to all enemies.

Become Empowered. On Empowered, fill Speed Bar for self by 100% + 10% for each HORSEMAN ally.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be Blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: The First Mutant
passive.description:
This character cannot be revived.
The Speed of this character and each ally can only be reduced by Slow.
At the start of any match, enemy characters cannot spawn with Safeguard.
On Spawn, gain Safeguard, Immunity, and Charged.

On any Turn, Heal self and all allies for 1% of this character's Max Health.
On Stun, clear Stun and Heal Block, then Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.
Lower the Focus of the first enemy to take the first turn of the match by 200%.

When this character drops below 50% Health for the first time:
 > Fill this character's Speed Bar by 50%.
 > Heal for 30% of this character's Max Health.
 > Gain Defense Up for 3 turns.

Gain +70% Max Health. All allies gain +20% Max Health.
Gain +20% Damage. All allies gain +20% Damage.
Gain +40% chance to Counterattack + 15% for each VILLAIN or HORSEMAN ally.
Gain +20% Focus for each ally.
Gain +100% Accuracy and In ARENA or WAR, all allies gain +100% Accuracy.

basic.name: Wing Wrath
basic.description:
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply 2 Bleed.
In RAIDS, apply an additional 2 Bleed to the primary target.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Shard Storm
special.description:
Clear 3 negative effects from self and all DEATH SEED allies.
Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all DEATH SEED allies.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 330% damage.

On any target Block, fill Speed Bar for this character by +20%.

On Kill, apply Offense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Angel of Death
ultimate.description:
Transfer all positive effects, excluding Taunt and Regeneration, from primary target to self + flip 3 random positive effects to negative effects.
Attack primary target for 700% Piercing.

In RAIDS, on Kill, prolong the duration of all positive effects on self and all DEATH SEED allies by +1, up to a maximum of 2.
In ARENA, on Kill, prolong the duration of all positive effects on self, Apocalypse, and all HORSEMAN allies by +1, up to a maximum of 2.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.
If Apocalypse is an ally, or with 2 or more HORSEMAN allies, this attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Fallen Angel
passive.description:
On Kill, generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all DEATH SEED, Apocalypse, and HORSEMAN allies.

On enemy Death:
 > Attack the most injured enemy for 200% Piercing, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.
 > Reduce Speed Bar for all enemies by 10%. In RAIDS, reduce Speed Bar for all enemies by 25% instead.
 > In RAIDS, Barrier self for 10% of this character's Max Health.

On this character or DEATH SEED ally Crit, heal self and all DEATH SEED allies for 3% of this character's Max Health.
On this character, Apocalypse or HORSEMAN ally Crit, heal self, Apocalypse and all HORSEMAN allies for 3% of this character's Max Health.

Gain +30% Armor. DEATH SEED, Apocalypse, and HORSEMAN allies gain +30% Armor.
Gain +15% Crit Chance. DEATH SEED, Apocalypse, and HORSEMAN allies gain +15% Crit Chance.

basic.name: Sundering Smite
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage + clear 3 positive effects.
Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 210% damage + clear 2 positive effects.

Gain Immunity.
Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Wrath of Mars
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.
Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Stun and Disrupted.

Gain Charged.

In WAR, apply Trauma to primary target.

ultimate.name: Furious Whirlwind
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 200% damage + 25% Drain.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 250% Piercing + 25% Drain + apply Bleed for 2 turns and Ability Block for 2 turns.

Flip 3 negative effects into positive effects on self.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: God of War
passive.description:
At the start of any match, enemy characters cannot spawn with Safeguard.

On Spawn:
 > Gain Safeguard for 2 turns.
 > In WAR, after all other characters' On Spawn effects, copy and clear all positive effects, Charged, and Revive Once, from all enemies to this character (Positive effects from a room's War Bonus apply after this Passive). This clear cannot be resisted.

On Turn, if this character has Charged, gain +20% Speed Bar and lose 1 Charged.

While Charged:
 > Non-MYTHIC enemies cannot gain Charged or Immunity.
 > This character cannot gain Stun.

basic.name: Hellish Slash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Bonus Attack the enemy with the highest Damage for 150% damage.

If this character has 3 or more HELLFIRE CLUB or ACCURSED allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Tailored Strikes
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 320% damage + flip Defense Up + apply Bleed.

Bonus Attack the enemy with the highest Damage for 320% damage + apply Blind.

If this character has 3 or more HELLFIRE CLUB or ACCURSED allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Infernal Barrage
ultimate.description:
Attack the primary target for 250% Piercing + clear 1 positive effect + reduce Speed Bar by 15%.

Rebound Chain to 8 targets within infinite spaces of the previous target for 250% Piercing + clear 1 positive effect + reduce Speed Bar by 15%.

Bonus Attack the enemy with the highest Speed for 250% Piercing + clear 1 positive effect + apply Slow + reduce Speed Bar by 50%.

If this character has 3 or more HELLFIRE CLUB or ACCURSED allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.
This attack ignores Defense Up.

passive.name: The Black Bishop
passive.description:
On Spawn, if this character has 3 or more HELLFIRE CLUB or ACCURSED allies:
 > Fill Speed Bar for this character by 5%.
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy for this character.

In RAIDS, on enemy Death:
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all HELLFIRE CLUB allies.
 > Fill Speed Bar for self and all HELLFIRE CLUB allies by 15%.

Gain +15% Drain.
HELLFIRE CLUB and ACCURSED allies gain 15% Drain.

basic.name: Arcane Scourge
basic.description: Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply 2 random negative effects.

special.name: Mesmerize
special.description:
Apply Stun to the primary target.

50% chance to apply Blind to up to 4 additional random targets.
If this character has 4 or more MYSTIC allies, always apply Blind for 2 turns to 4 additional random targets instead.

Apply Slow to 2 random targets.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Demons of Denak
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 240% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 2 or more DARK HUNTER allies, reduce Speed Bar for all enemies that have Blind by 30%.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Apply 1 Bleed for each ACCURSED ally, up to a maximum of 4, to all enemies.
 > If this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies, reduce Speed Bar for all enemies by 30%.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all MYSTIC allies.

This attack cannot miss, be blocked, or counterattacked.

passive.name: Too Many Sorcerers
passive.description:
On Death of any Character:
 > Heal self and the most injured MYSTIC ally for 10% of this character's Max Health.
 > If the character that died was a MYSTIC character, heal self and the most injured MYSTIC ally for 15% of this character's Max Health instead.
 > If the character that died was a MYSTIC character, generate 2 Ability Energy for self and the most injured SUPERNATURAL ally.

basic.name: Dignified Strikes
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage and adjacent targets for 200% damage + flip 1 positive effect to a negative effect on each target.

When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist, they flip 2 positive effects to negative effects.

special.name: Volatile Experiment
special.description:
Clear 2 negative effects from self and all allies.
Heal self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Attack all enemies for 300% damage + apply Heal Block.

If this character has a Jean Grey ally:
 > Clear an additional 2 negative effects from self and all IMMORTAL X-MEN and UNCANNY AVENGER allies.
 > Clear all Vulnerable on self and all X-MEN and UNCANNY AVENGER allies.
 > This attack gains +500% Extra Focus.

ultimate.name: Mutant Enhancement
ultimate.description:
Apply Offense Up to self and all BLASTER, BRAWLER, and X-MEN allies.
Apply Defense Up to self and all PROTECTOR, CONTROLLER, and X-MEN allies.
Apply Speed Up and generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all SUPPORT and X-MEN allies.
Apply Regeneration to self and all MUTANT allies.

In RAIDS, if this character has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies:
 > Apply Offense Up, Defense Up, Speed Up, and generate 1 Ability Energy for all UNCANNY AVENGER allies.

passive.name: Stars and Garters
passive.description:
On Turn, apply Regeneration to the most injured ally. If that ally is an X-MEN, heal that ally for 15% of this character's Max Health.

In RAIDS, at the end of this character's first Turn, if this character has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies, generate 10 Ability Energy for self and all UNCANNY AVENGER allies.

Gain +20% Resistance. X-MEN allies gain +20% Resistance.

If this character has 3 or more UNCANNY X-MEN allies at the start of a match, the first ally death does not count towards the loss of a Medal in CAMPAIGNS and CHALLENGES.

basic.name: Lightning Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target and all enemies in that character's row for 300% damage. Gain +50% Damage against targets with Defense Up or Regeneration.
Flip Defense Up and Regeneration on each target.
Gain 1 Ability Energy.

This attack cannot be blocked by enemies with Defense Up or Regeneration.

In RAIDS, when this character performs a Counterattack or Assist and has Regeneration, gain an additional +100% Damage on that Counterattack or Assist.

special.name: Thunder Clap
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 420% damage.
Apply Stun to primary target.

Gain Taunt for 2 turns.

Apply +1 Defense Up, up to a maximum of 3, and 2 Deflect to self and all COSMIC allies.

ultimate.name: Battleship Skuttlebutt
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 500% damage + 50% damage per positive effect on self.
Flip all positive effects to Bleed on each enemy.

If this character has 4 or more ASGARDIAN allies, this attack gains +50% extra Damage.

This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Stormbreaker's Might
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns, 3 Deathproof, and 3 Deflect to self and all BIFROST and HERO ASGARDIAN allies.

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

On self or ally Crit, gain +1 Charged.
On any character's Turn, if this character has 4 or more Charged, attack the enemy with the highest Health for 200% damage, apply Defense Down to that character, and lose 4 Charged.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health, if this character has Taunt, clear Taunt + heal for 30% of this character's Max Health.

When an ally Vahl drops below 50% Max Health, heal self for 30% of this character's Max Health + gain Taunt.

Gain +60% Armor.
BIFROST and HERO ASGARDIAN allies gain +60% Armor.

basic.name: Beam Shot
basic.description:
Clear Counter on primary target. Attack primary target for 270% damage. Then gain +1 Counter, up to maximum of 4.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Retaliation Laser
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

If Jubilee is an ally:
 > Gain Offense Up.
 > Attack primary target for 400% damage, instead.
 > Apply Offense Up + Defense Up to a Jubilee ally.
 > This attack is unavoidable and always Crits.

ultimate.name: Blast From the Past
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 270% damage.
If Charged attack for 540%, instead. Then remove Charged.

passive.name: Energy Redirection
passive.description:
On spawn, if Charged, gain Regeneration and clear Charged. On spawn, gain Taunt + Defense Up.

On attacked, gain Charged + fill Speed Bar by 30%, then clear Taunt.
At the end of this character's turn, if this character's Health is greater than 80% and he is not Charged, gain 1 Taunt and +1 Defense Up, up to a max of 3.

While this character has Taunt, gain +20% Damage Reduction. Gain +100% chance to Counterattack.

In RAIDS, when an ASTONISHING X-MEN ally drops below 50% Health, gain Taunt + Defense Up.
In RAIDS, while this character has Offense Up, gain +20% Damage.

basic.name: Royal Strike
basic.description:
Flip 2 negative effects to positive effects on self.

Attack primary target for 400% damage + clear 2 positive effects.

special.name: Staggering Voice
special.description:
Attack primary target for 600% damage.

In CRUCIBLE, instead, attack primary and adjacent targets for 600% damage.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

ultimate.name: Sonic Scream
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 500% damage.

This attack gains +20% Crit Chance for each ILLUMINATI or INHUMAN ally.

If this character has 2 or more ILLUMINATI allies, this attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: King of Attilan
passive.description:
Characters killed by Black Bolt cannot be revived.

When an enemy drops below 25% Health, attack that enemy for 300% damage. If that enemy is VILLAIN TECH, attack that enemy for 600% damage instead.

On enemy summon, apply Disrupted + clear 3 positive effects on the summoner.

Gain +40% Resistance. INHUMAN allies gain +40% Resistance. In CRUCIBLE, ILLUMINATI allies gain +40% Resistance.
Gain +50% Max Health. INHUMAN allies gain +50% Max Health. In CRUCIBLE, ILLUMINATI allies gain +50% Max Health.

basic.name: Stealth Slice
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% Piercing + apply Slow and 2 Bleed.

Reduce Speed Bar on the primary target by 5%.
Fill Speed Bar on this character by 5%.

If this character has 30% or less Health, gain Stealth.

Gain +1 Charged.

On ARENA OFFENSE, this attack ignores Defense Up.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

special.name: Bad Luck...For You
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% Piercing and do the following effects to the primary target:
 > Apply Trauma, Bleed, Disrupted, and Stun.
 > Copy and clear 3 positive effects, except Taunt, on primary target to self.
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 10%.
 > Clear 1 Charged.

Rebound Chain to 4 adjacent targets for 300% Piercing + apply Bleed + clear 1 Charged on each target.

Fill Speed Bar by 10% for this character.
Apply +2 Charged to self and all SECRET DEFENDER allies.

This attack can Chain to Stealth targets and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Ill-gotten Gains
ultimate.description:
Do the following actions to the primary target:
 > Clear Immunity.
 > Transfer all negative effects and Vulnerable from self.
 > Copy and clear Charged and all positive effects, excluding Taunt, to self.
 > In ARENA, if this character has Trauma, apply Trauma.
 > Attack for 500% Piercing.
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 20%.

Do the following actions to this character:
 > Gain Immunity.
 > In ARENA, if primary target has Safeguard, gain +1 Safeguard.
 > Fill Speed Bar by 20%.
 > Gain +1 Charged.

On ARENA OFFENSE, apply Blind to primary target and 1 random SPIDER-VERSE enemy.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Nine Lives
passive.description:
At the start of any match, BIO enemies cannot spawn with Speed Up.

On Spawn:
 > Gain 3 Charged, 9 Deathproof, and Immunity.
 > In ARENA, apply Safeguard to self and all SECRET DEFENDER allies.
 > Clear Revive Once from all enemies. Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this action. If any enemy had Revive Once, gain Revive Once.

On any Turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged:
 > Clear all negative effects from this character + heal for 30% of this character's Max Health.
 > Fill this character's Speed Bar by 30%.
 > Gain +1 Safeguard, up to a maximum of 2, and lose 5 Charged.

While this character has Deathproof, this character and all SECRET DEFENDER allies cannot have their Speed Bar reduced.
For each Deathproof on this character, gain +10% Armor, +10% chance to Counterattack, +10% Focus, and +10% Resistance.
Gain +50% Max Health.
SECRET DEFENDER and Spider-Man allies gain +50% Max Health.

On ARENA OFFENSE:
 > Enemies cannot spawn with Deathproof.
 > Lower Damage Reduction for all enemies that do not have Deathproof by 15%.

basic.name: Flesh Wound
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% Piercing + clear 1 random positive effect.

Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5, to self or the most injured non-summoned ally. If that character is an OUT OF TIME ally, apply an additional +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack gains additional Piercing equal to this character's Bonus Armor %.

special.name: None Shall Pass
special.description:
Clear all negative effects from self and all allies. If negative effects removed from this character, heal self for 5% per negative effect removed.
Heal self for 20% of Max Health.

Attack primary target for 300% Piercing + apply Ability Block.

Gain Taunt, Safeguard, and +2 Charged, up to a maximum of 3.

Apply Speed Up and Immunity to self, 1 random adjacent ally, and all OUT OF TIME allies.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

This attack gains additional Piercing equal to this character's Bonus Armor %, ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: 'Tis but a Slash
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% Piercing + 30% of this character's Max Health as damage.

Gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 3.
Apply Defense Up to self and all allies.
Apply Offense Up to all BRAWLER allies.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

This attack gains additional Piercing equal to this character's Bonus Armor %, and cannot be dodged or counterattacked.

passive.name: Merlin's Champion
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Taunt, Defense Up for 2 turns, Immunity, and +5 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On Turn, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 3.
On any turn, the first time this character has no Charged, fill this character's Speed Bar by 100%.

When this character drops below 50% Health, Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health + clear Taunt.
When a PROTECTOR ally drops below 50% Health, if this character is above 50% Health, gain Taunt.

When an enemy attacks this character or any ally, if this character has Charged and does not have Exhausted:
 > Clear all Barrier on that enemy and attack that enemy for 30% of this character's Max Health. Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.
 > Clear Immunity on that enemy and apply Heal Block, Trauma, and 3 Bleed to that enemy.
 > Lose 1 Charged.
 > This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be blocked, and gains +1,000% Extra Focus.

In ARENA, while this character has Charged, this character's Speed Bar cannot be reduced.
Gain +50% Max Health. On DEFENSE, gain an additional +40% Max Health.
Gain +40% Armor. In WAR, gain an additional +5% Armor per OUT OF TIME ally.
Gain +50% Resistance. In WAR, gain an additional +25% Resistance per OUT OF TIME ally. While this character has Defense Up, this character gains +1,000% Extra Resistance.

basic.name: Claw Slash
basic.description: Attack primary target for 210% damage + 30% Piercing + apply Slow and Bleed.

special.name: Hunter's Spirit
special.description:
Attack primary target for 230% damage + 30% Piercing.

Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all WAKANDAN allies.
On Crit, apply 2 Counter to self and all WAKANDAN allies.

If this character has 2 or more WAKANDAN allies, this attack gains +100% Crit Chance.

ultimate.name: Panther Rush
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage. Chain to 1-3 adjacent targets for 200% damage.
Counterattack breaks this Chain.

While Charged, instead attack all enemies for 280% damage. This attack gains +40% Damage per Charged.
In CRUCIBLE or WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 4 or more Charged, fill Speed Bar by 30% for self and all WAKANDAN allies.
Lose all Charged.

All attacks have +30% Piercing and +20% Extra Crit Chance.
If this character has 4 or more WAKANDAN allies, this attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Defender of Wakanda
passive.description:
When attacked, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On Kill, fill Speed Bar by 100%.
On Defense Up, gain Deflect and Regeneration.

In CRUCIBLE or WAR OFFENSE, while Charged, gain +15% Damage and +50% Drain for self and all WAKANDAN allies.

basic.name: Prehistoric Claw
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 5.

If this character has Defense Up, repeat this attack.

special.name: Shred and Rend
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% Piercing and apply +2 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 5.
Rebound Chain to 5 targets for 350% Piercing and apply +2 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 5.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
If any WAR DOG ally has Stealth, this attack can Chain to Stealth targets, cannot be counterattacked, and gains +500% Extra Focus.

ultimate.name: Bast's Judgment
ultimate.description:
Copy and clear 5 positive effects, excluding Taunt, from the primary target. Gain +500% Extra Focus for this action.

Attack primary target for 500% Piercing.
This attack gains +100% Damage per Defense Down on the primary target.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Apply +2 Charged to self and all WAR DOG allies, up to a maximum of 10.
 > For each enemy with Charged or Revive Once, apply +1 Charged to self and all WAR DOG allies, up to a maximum of 10.
 > Gain Deathproof + Deflect + Evade.
 > If the primary target has Safeguard, apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all WAR DOG allies.

Spread all positive effects, excluding Safeguard, Stealth, and Taunt, on self to all WAR DOG and Starbrand allies.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: The First Panther
passive.description:
On Defense Up, gain +1 Offense Up.

When a non-summoned enemy drops below 50% maximum Health or is killed, if this character has Charged, fill Speed Bar by 10% for self and all WAR DOG and Starbrand allies, then lose 1 Charged.

On enemy Turn, if that character has Defense Down, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 10.

Gain +30% Armor.
In WAR, WAR DOG and Starbrand allies gain +30% Armor.
Gain +50% Resistance.
In WAR, WAR DOG and Starbrand allies gain +50% Resistance.

basic.name: Gauntlet Barrage
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 230% Piercing + apply Slow, Defense Down, and Heal Block.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has Ability Block, apply Ability Block to the primary target.

special.name: Acrobatic Hunter
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + apply Ability Block for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.
Rebound Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 250% Piercing + apply Slow for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.

In CRUCIBLE:
> Clear all Charged on the primary target.
> Generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all ILLUMINATI allies.
> On DEFENSE, this attack targets the enemy CONTROLLER with the most Speed Bar, instead, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

This attack can Chain to Stealth targets, Counterattack breaks this Chain, and this attack gains +500% Extra Focus and cannot be blocked.

If this character has 2 or more ILLUMINATI allies, this attack gains +100% Crit Chance and is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Panther's Fury
ultimate.description:
Apply Ability Block and Trauma to the primary target.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 260% Piercing.
In CRUCIBLE, apply Ability Block and Trauma to all adjacent targets.

For each Charged on this character, repeat this attack 1 time, up to a maximum of 5 Bonus Attacks.

Lose all Charged.

passive.name: Wakanda's Champion
passive.description:
On Spawn, before other characters' On Spawn effects, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On Attacked, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On Defense Up, apply 2 Bleed to all enemies.

On Kill, clear 2 random positive effects from all enemies.

Gain +50% Damage. ILLUMINATI allies gain +50% Damage.
Gain +50% Focus. ILLUMINATI allies gain +50% Focus.
Lower Max Barrier of all enemies by 10%.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > When an ILLUMINATI ally is attacked, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > Lower Max Barrier of all enemies by an additional 10%.
 > Gain an additional +100% Focus for self and all HERO allies.
 > While this character has Charged, lower the Assist Chance for all enemies by 100%.
 > While this character has Charged, VILLAIN enemies cannot gain Speed Up.

basic.name: Sabotage
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage. During Stealth, copy and clear all positive effects, excluding Taunt, on primary target to self.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to INFESTATION characters.

special.name: Camouflage Tech
special.description:
Gain Stealth for 2 turns + clear all negative effects from self.

Clear 1 negative effect from all AVENGER, SKILL MILITARY, and INFESTATION allies.

Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all S.H.I.E.L.D., AVENGER, SKILL MILITARY, and INFESTATION allies.
60% chance to apply Speed Up for 2 turns to all allies.

Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all INFESTATION allies.

ultimate.name: Widow's Bite
ultimate.description:
Transfer 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self and all SKILL MILITARY allies.

Attack primary target for 290% damage + apply Stun. Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 220% damage + apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns.

On WAR DEFENSE, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, this attack will also have the additional effects of this character's Special - Camouflage Tech.

This attack cannot be blocked and gains +1,000% Extra Focus.
Counterattack breaks this Chain.

passive.name: Saboteur
passive.description:
Gain +15% Speed. This is applied after any character has taken an action.

On self or ally Stealth, apply Offense Up to self and all SKILL MILITARY allies + apply Deathproof to all Hawkeye, Yelena, and Red Guardian allies.

On ally Hawkeye, Red Guardian, Yelena, or INFESTATION ally's turn, gain Assist Now.

On WAR DEFENSE, on Spawn, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, gain Stealth and Speed Up.

basic.name: Silver Slash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 200% Piercing + reduce Speed Bar by 10%.

Repeat this attack once.

This attack has +20% Extra Crit Damage, ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked.

special.name: Glaive Volley
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 260% Piercing + clear Speed Up + apply Slow.

Clear 1 negative effect from all allies.
Clear all negative effects from self.

This attack ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Dhampir's Fury
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 290% Piercing + reduce Speed Bar by 25% + steal 20% Health from target and redistribute to self. This bypasses Heal Block.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% Piercing + reduce Speed Bar by 25% + clear Immunity + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and Blind for 2 turns.

This attack ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Daywalker
passive.description:
Characters killed by Blade cannot be revived.

On successful attack by this character, clear Defense Up + apply Defense Down to each attacked target.

At the end of any Turn, flip Slow and Offense Down on 2 random NIGHTSTALKER allies or self that have Slow or Offense Down.

On self or ally Crit, on the following ally Turn, gain Assist Now.

This character's attacks deal an additional 20% Piercing to any VAMPIRE enemies.

Gain +30% Drain. NIGHTSTALKER allies gain +30% Drain.
Gain +10% Crit Chance. All allies gain +10% Crit Chance.

basic.name: Violent Subjugation
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage.

If this character does not have Silence:
 > Clear all negative effects on self.
 > Gain +1 Bomb-Burst, up to a maximum of 5.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:
 > If primary target has Safeguard, reduce the duration of Safeguard by 2, Immunity by 2, and Taunt by 1.
 > If the primary target does not have Safeguard, clear all positive effects on primary target.
 > Fill Speed Bar by 30% for self.
 > This attack gains +500% Extra Focus.
 > This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Concentrated Blast
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% Piercing + steal 10% Max Health and redistribute to self. This ignores Heal Block.

Apply Ability Block to primary target.

Gain Safeguard for 2 turns.
Heal for 40% of this character's Max Health. This amount is reduced by 5% per Bomb-Burst on this character, down to a minimum of 15% healing.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:
 > Apply Trauma to primary target.
 > If this character has 3 or more Bomb-Burst, apply Ability Block to all adjacent targets.
 > Barrier self and all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.
 > Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all allies.

ultimate.name: Sweeping Destruction
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 250% Piercing.

This attack gains additional benefits based on the number of Bomb-Burst on this character:
 > Gain +250% Piercing per Bomb-Burst on this character, up to a maximum of 1,250% Piercing.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more Bomb-Burst, before this attack, reduce the duration of all positive effects on all enemies by 3.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, if this character has 4 or more Bomb-Burst, gain +30% Drain for this attack.
 > If this character has 5 or more Bomb-Burst, gain +50% Crit Chance for this attack.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, if this character has 5 or more Bomb-Burst, reduce the Speed Bar of all enemies by 30%.

Clear all Bomb-Burst on this character.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: The Living Bomb-Burst
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns and Safeguard for 2 turns to self and a random Thunderstrike ally.

When a non-summoned ally uses their Basic Ability:
 > Attack primary target for 175% damage + 20% Piercing.
 > Clear all negative effects on this character.
 > If this character does not have Silence, gain +1 Bomb-Burst, up to a maximum of 5.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, if primary target has Safeguard, reduce the durations of Safeguard and Immunity by 2, and the duration of Taunt by 1 on that target. If the primary target does not have Safeguard, clear all positive effects on primary target.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, fill Speed Bar by 30% for self.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, this attack gains +500% Extra Focus.

While this character has Bomb-Burst:
 > This character's Speed Bar cannot be reduced.
 > This character cannot gain Slow or Speed Up.
 > In CRUCIBLE, gain +100% Focus for self and all allies.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, gain +20% Speed per Bomb-Burst on this character

basic.name: Heavy Handed
basic.description: Attack primary target for 340% damage + apply Slow. If the target has Disrupted, reduce the target's Speed Bar by 20%.

special.name: Meat Shield
special.description:
Copy all positive effects from BROTHERHOOD allies to this character.
Attack primary target for 350% damage. Attack all adjacent targets for 320% damage.

ultimate.name: Belly Flop
ultimate.description: Attack primary and all adjacent targets for 460% damage.

passive.name: Solid Mass
passive.description:
On Spawn gain Offense Up for 2 turns.
When a Brotherhood ally drops below 50% Health, gain Taunt.
On Enemy turn, apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 3, to adjacent allies.

Gain +50% Resistance. BROTHERHOOD allies gain +50% Resistance.
Gain +25% chance to Counterattack. Gain +25% chance to Counterattack per BROTHERHOOD ally.

basic.name: Antimatter Assault
basic.description:
Reduce the duration of Safeguard on primary target by 2.
Attack the primary target for 300% Piercing + flip 3 random positive effects. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

On Defense, this attack targets the enemy with the highest Max Health instead of the primary target, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be blocked.

special.name: Cosmic Battery
special.description:
Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Reduce the duration of Safeguard and Immunity on primary and adjacent targets by 2 + apply Slow for 2 turns to primary and adjacent targets.

Apply the opposite of all positive effects on this character to the primary target.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 380% Piercing + deal 5% of this character's Max Health as damage.
Transfer all negative effects on the primary target to each adjacent target.

On Defense, this attack targets the enemy with the least Speed Bar instead of the primary target, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be Blocked or Dodged.

ultimate.name: Dark Matter Destruction
ultimate.description:
Reduce the duration of Safeguard and Immunity on primary and adjacent targets by 2 and apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% Piercing, flip all positive effects on each target, and apply Disrupted for 2 turns and Trauma for 2 turns.
Flip Charged on each target to Bleed.

On Defense, this attack targets all enemies instead.

This attack ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be Blocked.

passive.name: Man of Marvels
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Defense Up for 2 turns, Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health, and, if this character is on DEFENSE and any enemy has Charged, fill Speed Bar by 50%.

On Turn:
 > Heal self for 20% of Max Health and Barrier self for 15% of this character's Max Health.
 > Gain +15% Damage and +15% Resistance, up to a maximum of +75%.

On enemy Turn End:
 > Reduce all negative effects on self by 2. If any negative effects were cleared, Heal self for 10% Max Health per negative effect cleared.
 > Gain +20% Speed and +20% Armor, up to a maximum of +80%.

When an enemy kills an ally or, on DEFENSE, when an enemy becomes Empowered, attack that enemy for 300% Piercing. This attack ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable and the damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

Until this character completes a turn, this character cannot gain Stun.
The Speed and Focus of this character and all allies can only be reduced by negative effects.

Gain +25% Max Barrier and +25% Drain.

basic.name: Battle Rifle
basic.description:
Attack the primary target for 300% damage + prolong all negative effects, excluding Ability Block, Stun and Trauma, by 1.
If Charged, Chain to 1 adjacent target for 300% damage + prolong all negative effects, excluding Ability Block, Stun and Trauma, by 1.

Lose 1 Charged for the first attack and each subsequent attack.

In RAIDS, these attacks can prolong Ability Block, Stun and Trauma

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Buck Shot
special.description:
Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to all INVADER allies.

Attack primary target for 350% damage.

basic.description:
Attack primary target for 200% damage + Bonus Attack 3 times for 100% damage.

In RAIDS, if this character has full energy and Crits on any of these attacks, generate 1 Ability Energy for up to 2 random BIONIC AVENGER allies who were not at full energy on start of this turn.

special.name: Gatling Sweep
special.description:
Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all BIONIC AVENGER allies.
Attack all enemies for 300% damage + apply 2 Bleed.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for all adjacent BIONIC AVENGER allies.

If this character has 3 or more BIONIC AVENGER allies, this attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.name: EMP Blast
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 450% damage.
If any target is TECH, attack that target for 500% damage instead.
Apply Ability Block to the primary target.
If the primary target is TECH, apply Ability Block for 2 turns instead.

Generate 1 Ability Energy to all adjacent BIONIC AVENGER allies.

passive.name: Refurbished
passive.description:
On Turn, gain +15% Damage and all BIONIC AVENGER allies gain +15% Damage, up to a max of +45% Damage.

In RAIDS, when this character or a BIONIC AVENGER ally gains Ability Energy, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

At the end of any turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged, attack the most injured enemy for 300% damage and lose 5 Charged.

Gain +100% Focus.

basic.name: Fatal Flourish
basic.description:
Clear all negative effects on this character. If any negative effects are removed, heal self for 5% per negative effect removed.
Heal self for 10% of Max Health.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + clear Deathproof.
Flip Stealth + Speed Up on primary and adjacent targets.
If enemy is a MINION, attack that enemy for 600% damage instead.

This attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Danse Macabre
special.description:
Transfer all negative effects from this character to the primary target.
Attack primary target for 300% damage. Attack all adjacent targets for 270% damage.

Steal 15% Health from primary and adjacent targets and redistribute to self and all MYSTIC and HERO allies.

Spread all negative effects from the primary target to all adjacent targets. This will not spread Stun.

ultimate.name: Reap What You Sow
ultimate.description:
Clear Deathproof from primary target.
Attack primary target for 500% damage + apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns, then gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
Gain +5,000% Extra Focus for this attack.

If at maximum Charged:
 > Attack primary target for 20,000% Piercing instead.
 > Clear Charged.
 > This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.
 > Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Death Comes For All
passive.description:
On enemy Death, Heal self for 10% of Max Health and attack the most injured enemy for 300% damage + clear 3 positive effects.
When this character or any NEW WARRIOR ally drops below 30% Health, apply +1 Deathproof, up to a maximum of 2, to that character.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar for self and all NEW WARRIOR allies by +10% + 5% for each NEW WARRIOR ally.

In RAIDS:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar for self and all MYSTIC allies by +10% + 5% for each MYSTIC ally.

In RAIDS or on CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > On enemy Death, generate 1 Ability Energy for 2 random MYSTIC or NEW WARRIOR allies or self that were not at full energy on start of the current turn.

Gain +5% Drain for each Charged on this character.
MYSTIC and HERO allies gain +10% Drain.
Gain +20% Max Health. NEW WARRIOR allies gain +20% Max Health.

basic.name: Tentacle Slam
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Sinister Recharge
special.description:
Apply +3 Charged, up to a maximum of 10, to self and all CHARGEABLE SINISTER SIX allies.
Summon a missing SINISTER SIX ally from the following list: Shocker, Vulture, Rhino, Mysterio, Green Goblin. If the missing SINISTER SIX ally is already summoned, fill that character's Speed Bar by 100%.

Apply 3 Regeneration for 2 turns to self and all allies.

Flip 3 negative effects into positive effects on self and all SINISTER SIX allies.

ultimate.name: Superior Villain
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% + flip 2 positive effects to negative effects.

Prolong the duration of all negative effects by 1 on each target.

This attack cannot be counterattacked or dodged.

passive.name: Master Planner
passive.description:
On Turn, if Charged, gain +1 Deflect and +2 Speed Up, up to a maximum of 5 + apply +1 Deflect and +1 Speed Up, up to a maximum of 5 to all adjacent allies and then lose 1 Charged.

On Block, heal self and all SINISTER SIX allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

In WAR or CRUCIBLE, when this character or a CHARGEABLE SINISTER SIX ally drops below 20% Health, fill that character's Speed Bar by 100% and clear Heal Block.

Gain +15% Damage. CHARGEABLE SINISTER SIX allies gain +15% Damage.
Gain +20% Block Chance. SINISTER SIX allies gain +20% Block Chance.
Gain +40% Max Health. SINISTER SIX allies gain +40% Max Health.
Gain +10,000% Resistance against Offense Down.
All allies gain +10,000% Resistance against Offense Down.

basic.name: Bolt of Balthak
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 260% Piercing + 3% of target's Max Health + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

Barrier Self for 5% of this character's Max Health.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to ASTRAL characters.

This attack is Unavoidable.

special.name: Winds of Watoomb
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 230% Piercing + 5% of each target's Max Health + flip all positive effects into negative effects.

Apply 2 random negative effects to the primary target.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

ultimate.name: Book of the Vishanti
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects from self and all  allies.

Revive 2 dead random allies with 65% Health.

Heal all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

In BATTLEWORLD and WAR:
 > Gain 3 Ability Energy.
 > Apply 2 Counter, 2 Deathproof, and 2 Deflect to self and all ASTRAL allies.

passive.name: Master of the Arcane Arts
passive.description:
On Turn:
 > Fill the Speed Bar of the ally with the least Speed Bar by 15%.
 > Heal self and all allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.

When a positive effect is applied to an enemy:
 > Heal for 5% of this character's Max Health.
 > Gain +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5.

The first time an ally dies, generate 2 Ultimate Ability Energy for this character.

When an enemy attacks this character or an ally, gain +1 Charged.
On Turn End, if this character has 5 or more Charged and does not have a summoned Wong ally:
 > Summon Wong.
 > In BATTLEWORLD and WAR, the summoned Wong spawns with 2 Deathproof, Safeguard for 2 turns, and 80% Speed Bar.
 > Clear 5 Charged on this character.

The Summoned Wong ally gains +300% Focus.

basic.name: Staff Blast
basic.description:
Transfer 1 Deathproof from primary target to self.
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Heal self and all DARK HUNTER allies by 8% of this character's Max Health.

special.name: Doctor's Orders
special.description:
Apply Ability Block and Defense Down to primary target + Apply Defense Down to adjacent targets.

Mind Control 2 adjacent enemies to attack the primary target. The controlled enemies gain +30% Damage for this attack.

Barrier self and all DARK HUNTER allies by 30% of this character's Max Health + Barrier adjacent non-DARK HUNTER allies by 20% of this character's Max Health.

On WAR OFFENSE, this attack cannot be  blocked.

ultimate.name: Soul Manipulation
ultimate.description:
Steal 20% Health from all enemies and redistribute 150% Health stolen to all DARK HUNTER allies. This bypasses Heal Block.
Clear all negative effects from all DARK HUNTER allies.

In WAR OFFENSE, apply Immunity to all MYSTIC allies.

This attack ignores Deathproof.
This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Houngan Supreme
passive.description:
Gain +5% Speed for each Deathproof on this character, up to a max of +25%.
When this character drops below 50% Max Health, gain +1 Deathproof, up to a maximum of 5.
When any ally dies, gain +1 Deathproof, up to a maximum of 5 + apply Offense Up to self and all DARK HUNTER allies.

While 5 enemies have Speed Up, self and all allies gain +30% Crit Chance and Crit Damage.

In WAR OFFENSE:
> On Spawn, if this character has 3 or more DARK HUNTER allies, generate 2 Ability Energy for 4 random DARK HUNTER allies or self that were not at full energy.

basic.name: Lucky Shot
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 210% damage. Gain +50% Crit Chance for this attack.

Gain an assist from a random X-FORCE or SECRET WARRIOR ally.

special.name: Fire in the Hole

If Deadpool is an ally, transfer all negative effects from self and each X-FORCE ally to Deadpool. Fill Speed Bar for Deadpool by 80%.

Attack the most injured enemy and all adjacent targets for 320% damage.

Clear 2 negative effects from self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies.

ultimate.name: No Scope

Attack primary target for 310% damage + apply Disrupted. Rebound Chain to 5 adjacent targets for 310% damage.

Dodge breaks this Chain.

If this character has 3 or more SECRET WARRIOR allies:
> Apply Disrupted to secondary targets.
> This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Lady Luck
passive.description:
On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 15%.

On X-FORCE ally's Turn, 75% chance to apply Evade to that ally.

Gain +10% Dodge chance. X-FORCE allies gain +10% Dodge chance.
Gain +20% Crit Damage. X-FORCE allies gain +20% Crit Damage.
Apply -15% Crit Damage to all enemies.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar for self and all X-FORCE or SECRET WARRIOR allies by 5% + apply Offense Up.
 > On SECRET WARRIOR ally's Turn, apply Evade to that ally.
 > Apply an additional -15% Crit Damage to all enemies.

basic.name: Science & Sorcery

Attack primary target for 360% damage + apply Disrupted.

If Charged, flip 2 positive effects to negative effects on the primary target and then lose 1 Charged.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

special.name: Doomsday Dictator

Attack all enemies for 500% damage + apply Heal Block.
This attack gains +100% damage per Doombot ally.

Clear all Deathproof from all Doombot allies + attack them for 5,000% damage.

ultimate.name: Time Platform

Gain 2 Charged.

Clear all negative effects from self, the most injured non-summoned ally, and the ally with the highest Damage.
Heal self and the most injured non-summoned ally for 100% of this character's Max Health.

Fill Speed Bar by 300% for self and the ally with the highest Damage.

passive.name: Doombot Legion
passive.description:
On Turn, summon a Doombot and if this character has:
>2 or more Doombot allies, gain Defense Up for 2 turns.
>3 or more Doombot allies, gain Speed Up for 2 turns.
>4 or more Doombot allies, gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

When this character or a FANTASTIC FOUR ally drops below 50% Health, grant them Ability Energy and fill their Speed Bar by 50%.

On Stun, clear all Stun and apply Slow to self.

Gain +10% Damage and +50% Focus if any FANTASTIC FOUR character is present.
Gain +50% Max Health.

basic.name: Latverian Diplomacy
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 360% damage + apply Disrupted.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Doombot Legion
passive.description:
On Death, apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 10 to an allied Doctor Doom.

On Turn, if this character has:
>2 or more Doombot allies, gain Defense Up for 2 turns.
>3 or more Doombot allies, gain Speed Up for 2 turns.
>4 or more Doombot allies, gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

basic.name: Eternal Darkness
basic.description:
Attack all enemies for 360% damage + 30% Drain.
Clear Immunity from all enemies, if an enemy does not have Immunity, clear 1 other positive effect instead.

If this character has Ability Block, fill Speed Bar by 80%.

This attack cannot miss.

special.name: Hyper Beam
special.description:
Apply Stun for 1 turn and Trauma for 2 turns to the primary target.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage.
Apply Slow for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns to all adjacent targets.

Gain 3 Charged.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Dark Rain
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects from self and clear Heal Block from all allies.
Heal self and all allies for 40% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary target for 300% Piercing.
Attack all enemies for 500% Piercing.
Apply Offense Down for 2 turns, Defense Down for 2 turns, and Slow for 2 turns to all enemies.
Apply Offense Up for 2 turns, Defense Up for 2 turns, and Speed Up for 2 turns to all allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: The Dread One
passive.description:
This character cannot be revived.
If Health is full at the start of a match and if this character is not a Clone, all allies gain Revive Once with 40% of their character's Max Health.
On Spawn and On Turn:
 > Gain Defense Up for 2 turns.
 > Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.
 > Gain Immunity for 2 turns.
On enemy Turn, if Charged, flip all positive effects to negative effects and apply 2 Bleed to that enemy.
On Turn, if Charged, lose 1 Charged.
On Stun, clear all Stun and apply Regeneration to self.
On dropping below 50% Max Health, gain Safeguard for 2 turns and Stealth for 2 turns.
Gain +50% Max Health.
Gain +50% Resistance for each MYSTIC character.
While in Stealth, gain +30% Block Chance.
Lower the Assist Chance for all COSMIC BRAWLER enemies by 100%.

basic.name: Knife Slash
basic.description: Attack primary target for 250% damage + 30% Drain.

special.name: Fast Reflexes
special.description: Gain Taunt + 2 Counter. Gain Defense Up for 1-2 turns.

ultimate.name: Good Fighting
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + 50% Drain. Chain to 3-5 adjacent targets for 240% damage + 50% Drain.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Destroyer
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Taunt.

+20% increase to Drain.

basic.name: Needle Storm
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 100% Piercing + Bonus Attack 3 times for 80% Piercing.

Apply Bleed. If the primary target is a HERO CONTROLLER, apply Bleed for 2 turns instead.

special.name: Insidious Whisper
special.description:
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.
Apply Counter to self, all BLACK ORDER, and Thanos allies.
Apply Offense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.
Clear all Counter, Deflect, and Minor Deflect from all enemies.

ultimate.name: Forced Transfusion
ultimate.description:
Steal 3% Health from all enemies and redistribute to all allies. This bypasses Heal Block.
Repeat this attack 4 additional times.
Apply Slow to all enemies for 2 turns.
Fill Speed Bar for self and all allies by 5% per BLACK ORDER and Thanos allies.
Reduce Speed Bar for all enemies by 5% per BLACK ORDER and Thanos allies.

Each attack redistributes a maximum of 25% of this character's Max Health.

This attack ignores Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.

passive.name: Envoy of Thanos
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 2 Regeneration, 2 Deathproof, and Immunity for 2 turns + fill an ally Thanos Speed Bar by 25% per BLACK ORDER ally.
On ally Thanos Turn, if he doesn't have the Reality Stone, Time Stone, or Soul Stone, grant him them + 2 Regeneration, 2 Deathproof, and Immunity for 2 turns. This character can only do this once per match.

On Death of an enemy HERO CONTROLLER, gain Charged, apply Immunity to all allies, and Barrier all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.
If Charged, on enemy Turn, apply Ability Block to all HERO CONTROLLER enemies and then lose Charged. This cannot be dodged.

Gain +30% Resistance. BLACK ORDER and Thanos allies gain +30% Resistance.
Gain +20% Max Health. BLACK ORDER and Thanos allies gain +20% Max Health.

basic.name: Avenge Without Fear
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage.
Bonus Attack for 200% damage.

This attack has 20% Extra Crit Chance.

special.name: Tonfa Bash
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage.
Chain to 2 targets within 2 spaces of the previous target for 200% damage.

This attack has 25% Extra Crit Chance.

Apply +2 Evade, up to a maximum of 5, to self and YOUNG AVENGER allies.

On WAR DEFENSE, this targets most injured enemy, ignoring Taunt.

Dodge breaks this Chain.

ultimate.name: Debilitating Brawl
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Rebound Chain to 4-6 adjacent targets for 250% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns. If a target does not have Slow, reduce that character's Speed Bar by 25%.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Perfect Mimicry
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and YOUNG AVENGER allies.

When an enemy attacks a YOUNG AVENGER ally, attack that enemy for 250% damage.

While this character does not have Blind, reduce the Assist Chance for enemies by 100%.
On Blind, gain Slow.

Gain +10% Damage if this character has any SKILL enemies.
Gain +25% Damage. YOUNG AVENGER allies gain +25% Damage.

basic.name: Mayan Might
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage.

Heal for 5% of this character's Max Health.
Heal the most injured ally or self for 5% of this character's Max Health.

Clear Full Moon and New Moon on self.
The first time this ability is used, gain Crescent Moon.

Crescent Moon:
 > Gain +100% chance to Counterattack.
 > In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, all allies gain +50% chance to Counterattack.

special.name: Earthen Strike
special.description:
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 450% damage + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and Silence for 2 turns.

Reduce the duration of Trauma by 2 on self and all DARING WARRIOR allies.
Heal self and all allies by 25% of this character's Max Health + clear all Darkness.
While this character is alive, this character and all allies cannot gain Darkness.

In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, for self and all DARING WARRIOR allies:
 > Flip all negative effects and apply Immunity.
 > Generate 2 Ability Energy.

Clear Crescent Moon and Full Moon on self.
The first time this ability is used, gain New Moon.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

New Moon:
 > On enemy Turn, 50% chance to apply Blind.
 > In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies, always apply Blind on enemy Turn.

ultimate.name: Moonlight Wrath
ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns  and Immunity for 2 turns to self and all allies.

Attack all enemies for 500% damage.

Heal self and all DARING WARRIOR allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.

Clear Crescent Moon and New Moon on self.
The first time this ability is used, gain Full Moon.

Full Moon:
 > On enemy Turn, apply Offense Down to that enemy.

passive.name: Ixchel's Avatar
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Before other characters' standard On Spawn effects, attack the enemy PROTECTOR with the highest Speed for 200% damage + in CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns and Silence for 2 turns to that enemy.
 > Apply Safeguard for 2 turns and Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all DARING WARRIOR allies.

When one or more enemies die, attack a random enemy BRAWLER for 200% damage + in CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, if this characer has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns and Silence for 2 turns to that enemy.

In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD:
 > Enemies can't Revive.
 > If this character has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies, until this character takes their second Turn, gain +100% Block Chance and +50% Block Amount, up to a maximum of +75%, for this character and all DARING WARRIOR allies.

basic.name: Electroshock
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage.

In WAR, if this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, reduce Speed Bar for the primary target by 20%.

Fill Speed Bar by 20%.

special.name: Live Wire
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Bonus Attack primary target for 150% Piercing per positive effect on the target.

In WAR, clear 1 Charged from primary target per positive effect on the target.

Gain +1 Charged. If this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, gain an additional 2 Charged.

ultimate.name: Chain Lightning
