Attack primary target for 350% Piercing.
Attack all other enemies for 280% Piercing.
Clear all positive effects on the primary target. Clear 2 positive effects on each secondary target.
Apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Defense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.

This attack gains +100,000% Extra Focus.
This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Unlimited Power
passive.description:
On Turn, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

In WAR, on ally SINISTER SIX Turn, gain +1 Charged, if that ally is also SUPERIOR SIX, gain +2 Charged instead.

At the end of any turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged, attack the most injured enemy for 300% damage, then lose 5 Charged.

Gain +25% Piercing per Charged.

basic.name: Sneak Attack
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply 2 Bleed

Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to SHADOWLAND characters.

special.name: Into Shadow
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% Piercing + apply +2 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 5 + clear 5 positive effects.

Gain Stealth for 2 turns.

ultimate.name: Vital Strike
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier from the primary target.

In RAIDS, gain +25% damage per negative effect on the target.

Attack primary target for 500% damage + 20% Piercing + apply Disrupted for 2 turns.

Gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.
In RAIDS, if the primary target has 3 or more Vulnerable, this attack deals double the damage.

On Kill, fill Speed Bar by 80%.

passive.name: Death's Grace
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Evade to self and all adjacent VIGILANTE, SHADOWLAND, and HAND allies.
 > Apply Stealth to self and all adjacent SHADOWLAND and HAND allies.
 > In RAIDS, generate 5 Ability Energy for self and all VIGILANTE allies.

On Death, 15% chance to Revive with 100% of this character's Max Health.
If this character has 4 or more SHADOWLAND or VIGILANTE allies, gain +85% chance to Revive on Death.

basic.name: Bloody Good Guns
basic.description: Attack primary target for 75% Piercing + Bonus Attack 5 times for 75% Piercing.

special.name: Trick Shot
special.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage.
Attack the most injured enemy for 370% damage, ignoring Taunt and Stealth

ultimate.name: Scatterguns
ultimate.description:
Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 280% damage + 45% damage per BRIMSTONE, DARK HUNTER, or SUPERNATURAL ally.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
In WAR:
 > Clear all Deathproof from targets before the attack.
 > This attack cannot be Blocked.

passive.description:
On Miss or on ally Miss, if this character has 3 BRIMSTONE, DARK HUNTER, or SUPERNATURAL allies, attack that target for 270% Piercing.

On enemy Dodge, attack that enemy for 270% Piercing.

Gain +10% Crit Chance. MYSTIC allies gain +10% Crit Chance.
Gain +20% Accuracy per BRIMSTONE, DARK HUNTER, or SUPERNATURAL ally.

basic.name: Fashionable Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 290% damage + flip 2 positive effects to a negative effects.

If Charged, attack primary target for 340% damage + clear 2 positive effects instead.

special.name: Diamond Form
special.description:
If Charged, clear Charged.

Barrier self for 20% of this character's Max Health.
Clear all negative effects from self and all allies. Apply Immunity to self and all MUTANT VILLAIN allies
Apply Slow to all enemies.

Gain Charged.

ultimate.name: Turn the Tables
ultimate.description:
If Charged, clear Charged.

Clear all positive effects from all enemies.
Apply Blind to the primary target.

Mind Control the 2 enemy or ally characters with the most Damage to attack the primary target. Controlled characters gain +40% Damage for this attack. If primary target is killed, apply Blind to the non-summoned enemy with the most Speed Bar. Gain +10,000 Extra Focus for this action.

This attack is unavoidable.

passive.name: The White Queen
passive.description:
On Turn, heal self for 15% of Max Health.

Apply -10% Speed to all enemies.
While Charged gain: +400% Armor and +500% Resistance.

On WAR DEFENSE, On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to all MUTANT VILLAIN allies.

basic.name: Gleaming Strike
basic.description:
Attack the primary target for 270% damage + 2 Bleed.

Apply Regeneration for 2 turns + an additional Regeneration for 1 turn to the most injured ally or self and Barrier that character for 10% of this character's Max Health.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to ASTRAL characters.

special.name: Dazzling Domination
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.
Attack primary target for 250% damage + flip all positive effects into negative effects + apply Ability Block for 1 turn and Defense Down for 2 turns.

Mind Control the enemy with the highest Damage to attack the primary target. The controlled character gains +50% Damage for this attack.
Apply Offense Down to the controlled character.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.

In BATTLEWORLD, fill Speed Bar for self and all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies by 40%.
In BATTLEWORLD and WAR, Barrier self and all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Psychic Wrath
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier on all enemies.
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 350% damage + 10% of target's Max Health + clear 3 positive effects.

If this character does not have Trauma, copy and clear all negative effects, except Stun, from all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies to self.
Copy and clear all negative effects from self to primary target.

Mind Control all enemies adjacent to the primary target to attack the primary target. The controlled characters gain +50% Damage for this attack.

Barrier self and all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Apply Immunity to self and all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies.

Fill Speed Bar for self and all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies by 20%.
In BATTLEWORLD, fill Speed Bar for self and all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies by an additional 20%.

passive.name: Reformed Queen, Brilliant Teacher
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Defense Up to self and all allies.
 > Barrier self and all ASTRAL and X-MEN allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

The first time this character or an ASTRAL ally drops below 50% Health:
 > Clear all negative effects on that character.
 > Barrier that character for 30% of this character's Max Health.

In BATTLEWORLD and WAR:
 > Whenever this character, an ASTRAL ally, or an X-MEN ally gains Disrupted, clear all Disrupted and apply Immunity on that character.
In BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 3 or more ASTRAL or X-MEN allies, the maximum Health that the Boss Knull can lose a turn is increased by 50%.

Non-MYTHIC enemies cannot have their Speed increased except by positive effects and Rage.

basic.name: Blood Axe Barrage
basic.description: Attack primary and adjacent targets for 280% Piercing + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

special.name: Execute
special.description:
Clear Barrier on primary target then attack for 350% Piercing + apply +1 Heal Block, up to a maximum of 3.

This attack ignores Defense Up.

On DEFENSE, this attack targets the most injured enemy, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > If primary target is at or below 25% Health, instead, attack for 30% of target's Max Health, ignoring Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.
 > This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Mag Dump
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing.
Apply Ability Block for 2 turns to primary target.
Bonus attack the most injured enemy for 400% Piercing.

This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be dodged.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > Before this attack, clear all Barrier on all enemies.
 > Apply Ability Block for 2 turns and +2 Trauma, up to a maximum of 4, to all enemies.
 > This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Behold My Stuff
passive.description:
Characters killed by Executioner cannot be revived.

When an enemy attacks this character or a SHADOW CONCLAVE ally, attack that enemy for 300% damage.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > Before this character completes a turn, this character and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies cannot gain Silence.
 > Enemies cannot gain Immunity.
 > Damage Reduction cannot be increased or decreased by any character for themselves, allies, or enemies except by positive or negative effects.
 > Enemy Damage can only be increased by positive effects and allied Damage can only be decreased by negative effects.

basic.name: Dual SMGs
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 230% damage.
Bonus Attack for 120% damage.

In WAR, Bonus Attack an additional time for 120% Piercing.

special.name: Redwing
special.description:
Fill Speed Bar for self and all allies by 30% + 10% for each enemy that has any positive effects.
In RAIDS, if this character has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies or on WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 4 or more MIGHTY AVENGER allies, fill Speed Bar for self and all MIGHTY AVENGER and UNCANNY AVENGER allies by an additional 20%.

Clear Stealth from all enemies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Strafing Run
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 210% damage + 100% Piercing.
For each positive effect on an enemy, Bonus Attack that enemy for 75% Piercing.

In RAIDS or on WAR OFFENSE, apply Bleed to all enemies.

passive.name: EXO-7 Wingsuit
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > In RAIDS, apply Immunity to self and all UNCANNY AVENGER allies.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, apply Immunity to self and all MIGHTY AVENGER allies.

Before this character takes a turn, this character and all MIGHTY AVENGER and UNCANNY AVENGER allies cannot gain Slow.

Gain +25% Block Chance + 5% Block Chance per POWER ARMOR, MIGHTY AVENGER, or UNCANNY AVENGER ally.
Gain +10% Block Amount.

basic.name: Redwing Assault
basic.description: Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Speed Up to self and all LIBERTY allies.

special.name: Brave Bird, Dive Bomb
special.description:
Flip all negative effects to positive effects on self and all LIBERTY allies.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage.

Heal self and all LIBERTY allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

In WAR:
> Reduce Speed Bar by 50% on the primary target. 
> Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all LIBERTY allies.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Raptor Strikes
ultimate.description:
Heal self and all LIBERTY allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.

In WAR, generate 2 Ability Energy for self and all LIBERTY allies.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 190% damage + apply +1 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 5 + reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

passive.name: Air Traffic Control
passive.description:
The first time an enemy takes a Turn, apply Defense Up for 1 turn, Speed Up for 1 turn, and Immunity for 2 turns to self and all LIBERTY allies.

On enemy with Taunt Turn, if this character has 4 or more LIBERTY allies, fill Speed Bar by 5% for self and all LIBERTY allies.

Enemies with Taunt take an additional 10% damage.

In WAR:
> On Spawn, apply Taunt for 2 turns to all enemies. Gain +500% Extra Focus for this action.
> Gain +25% Speed until this character takes a Turn.
> Enemies cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies until this character takes a Turn (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).
> Enemies with Taunt cannot gain Immunity.

basic.name: Dual Shot
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 110% Piercing.
On Crit, apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 5 .

Repeat this attack 2 times.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to X-MEN characters.

special.name: E.V.A. Assist
special.description:
Gain Taunt for 2 turns.

Attack the primary target for 400% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Taunt for 1 turn.
If the primary target has Taunt, attack the enemy with the highest Damage instead.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all UNLIMITED X-MEN allies.

ultimate.name: Stylish Shooter
ultimate.description:
Clear all Deflect and all Evade from the primary target.
Attack primary target for 50% Piercing + Bonus Attack 5 times for 50% Piercing.

In CRUCIBLE, Bonus Attack 4 additional times for 50% Piercing.

This attack gains 10% additional damage per positive effect on the primary target.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Two Guns Three Brains
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Evade to self and all UNLIMITED X-MEN allies.
On Turn, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.

On Death:
 >Apply Offense Up to all UNLIMITED X-MEN allies.
 >Apply Defense Up to all allies.
 > Call 2 UNLIMITED X-MEN allies with the highest Damage to attack the most injured enemy.

While this character has Defense Up, gain +100% chance to Counterattack.

Gain +10,000% Resistance against Bleed.
Gain +10% Dodge Chance per UNLIMITED X-MEN ally.
Gain +25% Armor. UNLIMITED X-MEN allies gain +25% Armor.

basic.name: Scorching Ray
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 240% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.

Apply Offense Up to a random NEW WARRIOR, Spider-Man, or Iceman ally that does not have Offense Up.

On Crit, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack has +25% Extra Crit Chance.

special.name: Fiery Descent
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% Piercing + apply Slow and Defense Down.

Flip 3 positive effects to negative effects on primary and adjacent targets.

ultimate.name: Microwave Burst
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 150% Piercing, apply Bleed and Offense Down, and on CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, apply Trauma and Heal Block.

Repeat this attack 3 additional times.

This attack has +25% Extra Crit Chance.

passive.name: Red Hot
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On any enemy turn, if Charged, attack the enemy with the highest Speed, ignoring Taunt and Stealth, for 250% Piercing, apply Offense Down, flip Speed Up, and lose 1 Charged.

When an enemy attacks this character, 50% chance to apply Counter to self, and all Iceman and Spider-Man allies.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, gain +50% Accuracy for self and all NEW WARRIOR allies.

basic.name: Crafted Shot
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 220% damage.

Apply Deflect and Regeneration to self and all X-MEN allies.

special.name: Boot n'Shoot
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% Damage + copy 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 400% Damage + copy 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt.

Spread all positive effects on self, excluding Taunt, to all X-MEN allies.
Clear Heal Block from self and all X-MEN allies.
Heal self and all X-MEN allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

If Charged, apply Immunity to self and all X-MEN allies, then lose 1 Charged.

ultimate.name: Engineering Support
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% Piercing + clear all positive effects.

Clear all negative effects from self and all X-MEN allies.
Heal self and all X-MEN allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Prolong the duration of all positive effects on all X-MEN allies by 1, up to a maximum of 2.
Apply Counter, Deathproof, and Deflect to self and all X-MEN allies.
In RAIDS, apply Evade, and Safeguard to self and all X-TREME X-MEN allies.

Apply +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 10, to self and all X-MEN allies.
Apply +10 Charged, up to a maximum of 40, to all Cyclops allies.

Revive 1 X-TREME X-MEN ally with 100% Health. If there are no X-TREME X-MEN allies to revive, gain 3 Ability Energy.

passive.name: Improvised Inventions
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up to self and all X-MEN allies.

On Turn, craft a random Invention this character doesn't have:
 > Rifle Upgrade: On Attack, apply +1 Vulnerable.
 > Shoulder Cannon: On X-MEN ally Turn End, attack lowest Health enemy for 200% Piercing.
 > Targeting Reticle: Gain +25% Crit Chance for self and all X-MEN allies.

On any Turn, heal the most injured X-MEN ally for 5% of this character's Max Health.

When this character or any X-MEN ally drops below 50% health:
 > Barrier all X-MEN allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.
 > Fill Speed Bar for this character by 15%.

Gain +30% Armor and +30% Resistance for self and X-MEN allies.
In RAIDS, gain an additional +60% Armor and +60% Resistance for self and X-TREME X-MEN allies.

basic.name: Powerhouse Pitch
basic.description:
Flip 3 negative effects into positive effects on self.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% damage + flip 3 positive effects into negative effects.

special.name: Starforged Striker
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 340% damage + if this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, reduce the duration of Safeguard by 2.

Copy all positive effects, excluding Taunt, Stealth, and Regeneration, from primary and adjacent targets to self.
Spread all positive effects, excluding Taunt, Stealth, and Regeneration, from self to all allies.

Flip all positive effects into negative effects for primary and adjacent targets.

ultimate.name: Starfall
ultimate.description:
Clear all Battlefield Effects and apply the Battlefield Effect, Future Foundation, to the enemy side.
In ARENA, this Battlefield Effect cannot be cleared or replaced by another Battlefield Effect and lasts until 8 characters, allies and enemies, have completed their turns.

If this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 350% damage + clear all Charged + apply Silence.
If this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, apply Silence for 2 turns instead.

Future Foundation:
 > In ARENA, on enemy Turn, apply Silence to that character.
 > In ARENA, enemy cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).
 > Enemy characters cannot assist.

This attack gains +500% Extra Focus and if this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, this attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Fantastic Son
passive.description:
When a FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) ally uses their Special or Ultimate, fill Speed Bar by 4% for self and allies.

If this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, enemies cannot have their Speed increased except by positive effects.

Lower Resistance by 50% for all enemies.

Until this character completes a turn:
 > Gain +5% Speed. This is applied after any character has taken an action. FANTASTIC FOUR allies gain +5% Speed.
 > If this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, gain an additional +45% Speed for self and all FANTASTIC FOUR allies.
 > In ARENA, if this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, all other allies gain an additional +50% Speed.

basic.name: Ante Up
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Bonus Attack the most injured enemy, ignoring Taunt, for 250% Piercing + apply Heal Block.

special.name: Winning Hand
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% Piercing + apply Bleed for 2 turns.
If Charged, apply Ability Block to the primary target, then lose 1 Charged.

Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all X-MEN allies.

When this character is AI controlled, this attack will only be used if this character has Charged.

ultimate.name: Stacked Deck
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 520% Piercing.
If this character has 3 or more X-MEN allies, apply Disrupted for 2 turns to all enemies.

Flip 2 positive effects to negative effects on all enemies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Pick a Card
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 2 Charged.
At the end of any enemy turn:
 > Attack the most injured non-summoned enemy, ignoring Taunt and Stealth, for 180% Piercing + apply Heal Block.
 > In CRUCIBLE and RAIDS, fill Speed Bar by 20% for this character.

When this character or an ally Rogue drops below 50% Max Health for the first time:
> Apply Stealth for 2 turns + Immunity for 1 turn on that character.
> Clear all Defense Down on that character.

While this character has Stealth, gain +50% Drain.
On Crit, apply Evade to self, all UNLIMITED X-MEN and X-TREME X-MEN allies.
While this character has Evade:
 > Gain +25% Crit Chance and +25% Crit Damage.
 > UNLIMITED X-MEN and X-TREME X-MEN allies gain +25% Crit Chance and +25% Crit Damage.

Gain +50% Max Health. X-MEN allies gain +25% Max Health.
UNLIMITED X-MEN allies gain an additional +25% Max Health.

basic.name: Assassin's Strike
basic.description: Attack primary target for 290% damage + Bonus attack 2 times for 240% damage.

special.name: Ruthless Blade
special.description:
Attack primary target for 330% damage + Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 250% damage. On Kill, fill Speed Bar by 100%.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

If Adam Warlock is an ally, this attack can Chain to Stealth targets and cannot be Countered.

ultimate.name: Flying Slash
ultimate.description: Gain Offense Up for 2 turns. Attack primary target for 450% damage. On Kill, fill Speed Bar by 100%.

passive.name: Deadly Methods
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain +4 Charged, up to a max of 4, lose 1 Charged for each INFINITY WATCH ally.
If Health is full at the start of a match, Revive once with 20% of this character's Max Health + 20% for each INFINITY WATCH ally.

On this character's or any INFINITY WATCH ally's turn, lose 1 Charged. On any ally Adam Warlock's turn, lose 2 Charged, instead.
On Turn, if not Charged, become Empowered. On Empowered fill Speed Bar by 50% + clear all negative effects from self + Heal for 50% of this character's Max Health. If negative effects removed, heal self for 10% per negative effect removed.

When this character's Health drops below 30%, apply Taunt to the highest Health ally and gain 2 Regeneration for self.

Gain +10% Crit Chance. GUARDIAN and INFINITY WATCH allies gain +10% Crit Chance. Apply +5% Crit Chance to additional allies.
Gain +10,000% Resistance against Defense Down.

basic.name: Intangible Strike
basic.description: Attack primary target for 300% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

special.name: Fatal Flux
special.description:
Apply 2 random negative effects to the primary target + transfer 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt, from the primary target to self.
Attack primary target for 320% damage.

Apply 2 Bleed to primary target for every 2 THUNDERBOLT allies, up to a maximum of 4 Bleed.

Gain +2,000% Extra Focus for this attack.

ultimate.name: Quantum Explosion
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% damage + prolong all negative effects by 1 on each target.
Steal 15% Health from all enemies and redistribute to all THUNDERBOLT and PYM TECH allies. This bypasses Heal Block.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.
This attack ignores Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.

passive.name: Quantum Entanglement
passive.description:
On Turn, gain Evade.
On THUNDERBOLT or PYM TECH ally Dodge, heal that ally for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Gain +25% Dodge Chance. Gain +100% chance to Counterattack.

In DARK DIMENSION:
 > On THUNDERBOLT or PYM TECH ally Dodge, instead, heal all PYM TECH allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.
 > If this character has 3 or more PYM TECH allies, when an enemy gains a positive effect, 75% chance to steal that effect and apply it to a random PYM TECH ally.
 > On any PYM TECH ally's turn, apply Evade to that ally.
 > On any enemy's turn, apply Offense Down to that enemy.
 > Gain +10% Speed.  PYM TECH allies gain +10% Speed.

basic.name: Hellfire
basic.description: Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns.

special.name: Hell Cycle
special.description:
Attack primary target for 290% damage + apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns. Attack all adjacent targets for 270% damage + apply 2 Bleed.

 This attack cannot be blocked and cannot miss.

ultimate.name: Penance Stare
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 500% Piercing + apply Offense Down and Defense Down.

If Charged, this attack gains 200% Drain and lose 1 Charged.

If Charged this attack cannot be Blocked

passive.name: Spirit of Vengeance
passive.description:
On Death, grant 2 Ability Energy to all SUPERNATURAL and DARK HUNTER allies.

On non-summoned ally Death, attack the enemy that killed the target for 500% damage and gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.  Generate 3 Ability Energy for self.

When a negative effect is applied to an enemy, fill Speed Bar of self and all SUPERNATURAL and DARK HUNTER allies by 3%.

Gain +40% Max Health. SUPERNATURAL and DARK HUNTER allies gain +40% Max Health.
Gain +40% Focus. MYSTIC allies gain +40% Focus.

basic.name: Hellfire Chain
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + apply Bleed.
On target Block, Bonus Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + apply Bleed.

Chain to 1 adjacent target for 250% Piercing + apply Bleed.

Gain +1 Charged.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

special.name: Burnout
special.description:
Attack primary target for 150% Piercing + apply Ability Block.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 280% Piercing + clear 3 positive effects + apply Heal Block, Slow, and Defense Down.

Apply Offense Up to self and all SECRET DEFENDER and CITY MYSTIC allies.
Gain Immunity for 2 turns.

In ARENA, gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

ultimate.name: Hell Drift
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + 50% Drain + apply Heal Block for 2 turns, Defense Down, and 3 Bleed.
Prolong the duration of all Bleed on all enemies by 1.

In ARENA:
 > Apply Trauma to all enemies.
 > Gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.

Apply +1 Offense Up to self and all DEFENDER allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Hotrod
passive.description:
When an ally is attacked, gain +1 Charged.

On any Turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged:
 > Attack all enemies for 150% Piercing + clear 2 positive effects + apply Bleed and Disrupted. Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
 > Lose 5 Charged.

When Bleed is applied to an enemy, fill Speed Bar by 10%.

Lower the Resistance of all BIO enemies by 100%.
Lower the Counterattack Chance for all BIO enemies with Immunity by 100%.

Gain +100% Focus
SECRET DEFENDER allies gain +100% Focus.

basic.name: Lithe Spider
basic.description:
Steal 1 Evade from primary target.

Attack primary target for 270% Damage + gain Evade.
In RAIDS, if the primary target has Slow, apply Blind and Bleed.

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Graceful Web
special.description:
Attack primary target for 160% damage with +60% Crit Chance + apply Ability Block. Chain to 4-5 adjacent targets for 160% damage.
Apply Slow for 2 turns to each target.

Apply Assist Now to 1 random SPIDER-SOCIETY or Spider-Man (Miles) ally.

In RAIDS, gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Web Snare
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 330% damage. Spread all negative effects, excluding Stun, Ability Block, and Trauma, from the primary target to all secondary targets.

If this character has 3 or more SPIDER-SOCIETY allies, clear Taunt from all enemies.

This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Percussive Punishment
passive.description:
When an ally Spider-Man (Miles) or a SPIDER-SOCIETY ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply Stealth to that character.

When an enemy attacks this character, a WEB-WARRIOR ally, or a SPIDER-SOCIETY ally, attack that enemy for 250% damage.

Gain +25% Dodge Chance.
Gain +25% Damage.

In RAIDS:
 > Gain an additional +25% Damage.
 > If this character has 3 or more SPIDER-SOCIETY allies, gain an additional +50% Damage.
 > WEB-WARRIOR and SPIDER-SOCIETY allies gain +25% Damage.
 > On Spawn, apply Speed Up and Evade to self and all HERO SPIDER-VERSE allies.
 > On Spawn, if this character has 4 or more HERO SPIDER-VERSE allies, generate 2 Ability Energy for 5 random HERO SPIDER-VERSE allies or self that were not at full energy.

basic.name: Meteoric Slam
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 270% damage.

If this character's Health is 50% or more, apply Offense Down for 2 turns to each target.
If this character is below 50% Health, this attack gains +25% Drain.

special.name: Tectonic Lift
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.

Flip all negative effects on self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.

Attack all enemies for 330% damage.
If this character's Health is 50% or more, clear all positive effects on all enemies.

Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.
If this character is below 50% Health, apply Immunity for 2 turns and 3 Regeneration for 2 turns to self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Shi'ar Showdown
ultimate.description:
If this character is below 50% Health:
 > Gain Barrier for 30% of this character's Max Health.
 > Generate 3 Ultimate Ability Energy for self.

Heal self for 50% of this character's Max Health. Heal all ANNIHILATOR allies for 40% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary target for 400% damage. This attack gains +30% Crit Chance.

If this character's Health is 50% or more:
 > Reduce Speed Bar of primary target by 50%.
 > Gain Taunt for 2 turns and Immunity for 2 turns.

passive.name: Shi'ar's Rage
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Taunt, Immunity, and Safeguard.
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self, Lilandra allies, and all ANNIHILATOR allies.

On any Turn, If this character is below 50% Health, heal self for 5% of this character's Max Health.

When this character drops below 30% Health:
 > Gain 2 Regeneration.
 > If this character has Taunt, gain Stealth.

If Lilandra is an ally or this character has 2 or more ANNIHILATOR allies, while this character's Health is 50% or more, this character and all allies cannot gain Exposed or Vulnerable.

In ARENA:
 > This character and all ANNIHILATOR allies cannot gain Slow.
 > While this character's Health is 50% or more, enemies cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).

basic.name: Symbiote Slash
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% Piercing + clear all Charged + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

special.name: Tendril Terror
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Ability Block for 2 turns.
Attack adjacent targets for 350% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

Clear all Charged and Revive Once on each target.

Clear all Stun and Ability Block from all ANNIHILATOR and SYMBIOTE allies.

This attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

ultimate.name: Berserker Blitz
ultimate.description:
If any enemy has Charged, fill this character's Speed Bar by 20%.

Attack all enemies for 320% Piercing + clear all Charged, Defense Up, Evade, and Revive Once.

Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.

Clear all Battlefield Effects on the enemy side.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: The God Butcher
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Charged and Barrier self for 20% of this character's Max Health.

On any Death, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 4.

Characters killed by Gorr cannot be revived.

On any Turn, if this character has 4 or more Charged, attack the most injured, non-summoned enemy, ignoring Taunt and Stealth, with this character's Special - Tendril Terror (the Ability Level of this attack is capped at the level of this Passive), then clear all Charged on this character.

Gain +250% Focus for each ANNIHILATOR ally.

While this character has Charged, this character cannot gain Bleed.

In ARENA:
 > While this character has Charged, ANNIHILATOR allies cannot gain Bleed.
 > Lower the Assist Chance for all enemies by 100%.

basic.name: Gravity Well
basic.description: Attack primary target for 250% damage + Bonus attack for 100% damage per negative effect on the target.

special.name: Crushing Force
special.description:
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 300% damage. Apply +2 Slow, up to a maximum of 5 to primary target and adjacent targets.

If Scientist Supreme is an ally, apply Bleed to primary target and adjacent targets.

ultimate.name: Singularity
ultimate.description: Attack primary target for 300% damage + 100% additional damage per negative effect + apply Stun.

passive.name: Weight of the World
passive.description:
When an enemy drops below 50% health, increase the duration of their negative effects by +1, up to a maximum of 5.

A.I.M. MINION allies gain +20% Damage.
A.I.M. MINION allies gain +20% Max Health.

In WAR, on Turn, reduce Speed Bar of the enemy with the highest Speed by 25%.
In WAR, when an enemy drops below 75% health, apply Disrupted.

basic.name: Goblin Bomb
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% damage + apply Defense Down.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, gain +10% Crit Chance for each SPIDER-VERSE character that is present.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Maniacal Assault
special.description:
Gain Offense Up and Speed Up.

Clear Barrier on primary target.

Attack primary target for 650% damage + do the following actions to the primary target:
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 25%.
 > Flip 1 random positive effect to Defense Down.
 > Flip all other positive effects to negative effects.
 > Apply Trauma for 1 turn + Heal Block for 2 turns.
 > In CRUCIBLE, apply Trauma for 2 turns instead.

If the primary target has Safeguard, instead:
 > Gain Offense Up and Speed Up for 2 turns.
 > Attack primary target for 750% damage.
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 25% + 10% per SINISTER SIX ally.

This attack cannot be blocked, dodged, or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Goblin Bombardment
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 150% damage + 75% damage against any target with Safeguard, flip 1 positive effect to a negative effect, and apply Heal Block.
Reduce Speed Bar for all enemies by 2% + 2% per SINISTER SIX ally.
If a target does not have any positive effects, apply Trauma to that target.
In CRUCIBLE, clear 1 Charged.

Repeat this attack 2 additional times.

If this character has 1 or more SINISTER SIX PROTECTOR allies, apply Safeguard to all SINISTER SIX allies.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, gain +2 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack cannot be dodged or counterattacked.

passive.name: True Osborn
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain +3 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > In CRUCIBLE, fill Speed Bar by 9% per SUPERIOR SIX ally.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all SUPERIOR SIX allies.

While this character has Charged:
 > Lower Damage by 15% for all enemies.
 > Lower Resistance by 200% for all enemies.
 > Ability Block and Vulnerable cannot be applied to self or any SINISTER SIX allies.
 > Gain +40% chance to Counterattack for self and all SINISTER SIX allies.

At the end of any enemy turn, if this character has Charged:
 > Attack that enemy and adjacent targets for 200% damage.
 > Apply Defense Down + flip Speed Up + flip 2 additional positive effects to negative effects for those targets.
 > Lose 1 Charged.

Gain +20% Max Health.
SINISTER SIX allies gain +20% Max Health.

basic.name: Heavy Slash
basic.description: Attack primary target for 260% Piercing + apply Heal Block.

special.name: Dark Sacrifice
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.
On WAR OFFENSE, if Iron Man (Zombie) is an ally, Clear Revive Once from the primary target.

Attack self for 2,000% Piercing damage.

This attack gains +1,500% Extra Focus.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack cannot miss.

passive.name: Undeath
passive.description:
On Death, Heal most injured, non-summoned ASGARDIAN or UNDYING ally for 180% of this character's Max Health.

On Death, reduce Speed Bar of all enemies by 10%.

On WAR OFFENSE, if Iron Man (Zombie) is an ally:
 > On Turn, gain 1 Ability Energy.
 > On Death, flip 2 negative effects into positive effects and apply Immunity for all non-summoned UNDYING allies.

basic.name: Crushing Blow
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage.

Apply 2 Regeneration for 2 turns to self and the 2 most injured allies.

special.name: Overgrowth
special.description:
Clear all negative effects on self and all allies.
Apply 2 Deathproof and Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.
Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all STARJAMMER allies.

Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip 2 random positives effects.

Call a random STARJAMMER ally to attack the primary target.
In CRUCIBLE, instead, call 2 STARJAMMER allies with the highest Damage to attack the primary target.

ultimate.name: Life Spores
ultimate.description:
Reduce the duration of all negative effects on self and all STARJAMMER allies by 2. (Any negative effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Trauma).
Clear 2 negative effects from all other allies.

Heal self and all allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self, all GUARDIAN, and all STARJAMMER allies. In CRUCIBLE, apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all STARJAMMER allies.

Generate 2 Ability Energy for a random Rocket Raccoon ally.
In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 4 or more STARJAMMER allies, instead, generate 2 Ability Energy for self and all STARJAMMER allies.

passive.name: I am Groot
passive.description:
When this character is attacked, gain +1 Counter + apply Slow to the attacker.

If this character has 4 or more STARJAMMER allies, lower the Assist Chance for all enemies by 100%.

Until this character takes a turn, this character and all STARJAMMER allies gain +500% Focus.

On Death:
 > 20% chance to Revive with 25% of this character's Max Health.
 > For each STARJAMMER ally, gain +20% Revive Chance and Revive with an additional +20% of this character's Max Health.
 > Apply Defense Up to all allies.
 > Apply Speed Up, Offense Up, and Counter to all GUARDIAN and STARJAMMER allies.
 > Apply Deathproof to a random Rocket Raccoon ally.

Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 280% damage + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3.

Apply Offense Up to self and all allies.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Slow for 2 turns.

This attack cannot miss and cannot be Blocked.

ultimate.name: Overwhelming Conviction
ultimate.description:
Flip Immunity on the primary target, then apply Stun.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 260% Piercing. Bonus attack primary and adjacent targets for 260% Piercing.
Flip Taunt on each target.
Apply Defense Down for 2 turns to each target.

Gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Canada's Guardian
passive.description:
On Spawn, Barrier self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health + apply Offense Up for 2 turns and 1 Regeneration to self and all allies.

On Turn, apply Assist Now to 1 random ALPHA FLIGHT ally.

On enemy death, apply Defense Down to all enemies.

Gain +50% Max Health. ALPHA FLIGHT allies gain +50% Max Health.
In RAIDS, gain an additional +50% Max Health for self and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies.
Gain +50% Damage. ALPHA FLIGHT allies gain +50% Damage.

In RAIDS and on WAR DEFENSE, if this character is not Exhausted:
 > On enemy Death, Barrier self and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.
 > While this character has Regeneration, this character and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies gain +50% Armor.

Clear Barrier on primary and adjacent targets.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% damage + flip 2 positive effects to negative effects + apply Defense Down.
Apply 2 Bleed to primary target.

In RAIDS, Generate 1 Ability Energy to self and all HIVE-MIND allies.

special.name: Tongue Twister
special.description:
Gain the opposite of all negative effects, excluding Bleed, on the primary target.
Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply Stun for 2 turns.
Attack adjacent targets for 320% damage.

Generate 1 Ability Energy to self and all HIVE-MIND allies.

In RAIDS, spread all positive effects, excluding Stealth, Taunt, and Regeneration, from self to all HIVE-MIND allies.

ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier from all targets.
Barrier self, all HIVE-MIND, and all SPIDER-VERSE allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Attack all enemies for 400% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

Apply Offense Up and Defense Up to self, all HIVE-MIND, and all SPIDER-VERSE allies.

In RAIDS:
 > Apply Stun to the enemy with the highest Damage, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all HIVE-MIND allies.

This attack gains +100% Extra Focus per SYMBIOTE ally.

passive.name: Symbiote Ghost
passive.description:
When this character or a HIVE-MIND ally drops below 50% Health, apply 2 Evade to that character.
On Turn, heal self and all SYMBIOTE allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.

When this character's Health is above 50%, gain +15% Dodge Chance.
When this character's Health is 50% or lower, gain +30% Drain.

Gain +150% Focus.
HIVE-MIND and SPIDER-VERSE allies gain +150% Focus.

basic.name: Quick Shot
basic.description:
Barrier self for 15% of this character's Max Health. If the primary target has any Barrier, Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health, instead.

Clear all Barrier on the primary target.

Attack primary target for 380% damage.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to a random RETCON or NEW WARRIOR ally that does not have Defense Up.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to RETCON characters.

special.name: A Cut Above
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% damage + flip all positive effects to negative effects on each target.
On WAR DEFENSE or in BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 4 RETCON allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns to all enemies.

Gain Taunt and Immunity.

Apply 3 Deflect to self and all RETCON or NEW WARRIOR allies.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, fill this character's Speed Bar by 70%.
In BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 4 RETCON allies, fill this character's Speed Bar by 70%.

Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Rocket Jump
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 550% damage.

Clear all negative effects from self and all NEW WARRIOR allies.

Apply Safeguard, Defense Up, and Speed Up to self and all RETCON and NEW WARRIOR allies.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Editorial Sight
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Taunt.
 > Apply +2 Evade, up to a maximum of 5, to self and all RETCON and NEW WARRIOR allies.

On CHARGEABLE NEW WARRIOR ally Turn:
 > Apply +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5, to that character.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, apply an additional +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5, to that character.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health:
 > If this character has Taunt, heal for 40% of this character's Max Health.
 > Gain Stealth. 
 > Clear Taunt from self.

Gain +50% Accuracy for self and all RETCON and NEW WARRIOR allies.

On WAR DEFENSE, if this character has 4 RETCON allies, enemies cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).

basic.name: Pym Punch
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Barrier self and all HERO allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Gain an Assist from a random ILLUMINATI ally.
Gain an Assist from a random HERO ally.

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Ant March
special.description:
Flip all negative effects to positive effects on self and all ILLUMINATI allies.
Barrier self and all ILLUMINATI allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary target for 80% Piercing.
Bonus Attack primary target for 320% damage.

Clear all Vulnerable from self and all HERO allies. Heal self and all HERO allies for 35% of this character's Max Health.

Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all ILLUMINATI allies.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Tank Pym

Attack all enemies for 450% damage + clear Immunity + apply Slow for 2 turns and Offense Down for 2 turns.

Heal self and all HERO allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Apply Trauma to all enemies.
 > Gain +100% Extra Focus per HERO ally for this attack.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

On Spawn:
 > Barrier self and all HERO allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.
 > Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all ILLUMINATI allies.

On Turn:
 > Attack all enemies for 30% Piercing + flip Stealth.
 > If this character has 2 or more HERO allies, repeat this attack 1 time.
 > In CRUCIBLE, repeat this attack 1 additional time.
 > Apply Offense Down to all enemies.

When this character or a HERO ally drops below 40% Max Health, Barrier that character for 40% of this character's Max Health.
The first time this character or a HERO ally drops below 40% Max Health, if this character does not have Exhausted, Clear all negative effects from that character + Heal that character for 35% of this character's Max Health.

If this character has 2 or more ILLUMINATI allies, enemies cannot gain Regeneration and HERO allies cannot gain Slow.

Gain +15% Max Barrier. ILLUMINATI allies gain +15% Max Barrier.
Gain +50% Max Health. ILLUMINATI allies gain +50% Max Health.
In CRUCIBLE, gain +25% Drain for self and all HERO allies.

Flip 2 random negative effects on self.

Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Slow.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 280% damage + apply Slow.

special.name: Energy Upheaval

Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Stun for 2 turns and Trauma for 1 turn.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.
Apply +1 Trauma, up to a maximum of 3 to each target.

On CRUCIBLE DEFENSE, these attacks target a random enemy CONTROLLER with Charged, instead, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

This attack cannot be Blocked or Counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Localized Catastrophe

Clear all positive effects and all Charged on primary target.
Attack primary target for 400% Piercing + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

On Kill, apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self, all STARJAMMER, and all X-MEN allies.
Apply +1 Defense Down to each enemy with Barrier.

This attack ignores Defense Up and gains +100% Damage if primary target has Barrier.

passive.name: Magistrate Summers
passive.description:
When an enemy attacks this character, a STARJAMMER ally, or an X-MEN ally:
 > Attack that enemy for 300% Piercing.
 > This attack is Unavoidable and gains +50% Damage if that enemy has Barrier.

On enemy Turn, if that enemy has Barrier and if this character has 2 or more STARJAMMER or X-MEN allies, apply +1 Disrupted, up to a maximum of 3 to that enemy.

Enemies with Barrier cannot gain Immunity.
Lower Damage Reduction for all enemies with Barrier by 25%.

In CRUCIBLE, this character and all STARJAMMER allies gain +5% Speed for each STARJAMMER ally, up to a max of +20% Speed.

basic.name: Deadeye
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage. Gain +20% Crit chance, +30% Crit Damage, and deal +20% Piercing with this attack.

This attack is Unavoidable.

special.name: Concussion Arrow
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 150% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 20% + clear all positive effects.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Airburst
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 190% damage + apply Slow. Apply Blind to primary target + 50% chance to apply Blind to all remaining targets.

This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Shot in the Dark
passive.description:
On turn, attack the most injured enemy with Stealth for 200% damage + clear Stealth.
Gain +100,000% Focus for this attack. This attack is unavoidable.

Gain Assist Now on an allied Black Widow's turn.

Gain +60% Focus.

basic.name: Hofund Slash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 310% damage.
Gain an assist from a random ASGARDIAN ally.

special.name: Divine Foresight
special.description:
Flip Stealth on each enemy.
Attack all enemies for 330% damage.

Clear Heal Block from self and all ASGARDIAN allies.
Clear 2 negative effects from self and all allies.

ultimate.name: Sworn Oath

Attack primary target for 360% damage. Attack all adjacent targets for 330% damage.
Apply Heal Block to primary and secondary targets.

passive.name: The All-Seeing

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

In WAR, on Turn, generate 2 Ability Energy for 2 random HERO ASGARDIAN allies or self that were not at full energy.

On Heal Block, fill Speed Bar by 20%.

Gain +10,000% Resistance against Blind.
ASGARDIAN allies gain +10,000% Resistance against Blind
ASGARDIAN allies gain +100% Accuracy.

Gain +30% Focus. ASGARDIAN allies gain +30% Focus.
Gain +25% Crit Chance. HERO ASGARDIAN allies gain +25% Crit Chance.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all ASGARDIAN allies
 > When this character or a HERO ASGARDIAN ally drops below 50% Health, apply 2 Deathproof and Speed Up for 2 turns to that character

basic.name: Black Blade
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip 1 Deathproof on target.

Attack the most injured enemy for 100% Piercing, ignoring Taunt, and apply Bleed.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

special.name: Command Undead
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and 2 Bleed.

Call a random non-summoned UNDYING ally to attack the primary target.
Gain an Assist from a random Undead Asgardian ally.

ultimate.name: Death Knives
ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier + clear 3 Deathproof from all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 350% damage + spread 4 negative effects from the primary target to all secondary targets.
If Iron Man (Zombie) is an ally, spread all negative effects from the primary target instead.
This will not spread Stun.

Apply 2 Regeneration for 2 turns to self and all non-summoned ASGARDIAN and UNDYING allies.
This attack gains +5,000% Extra Focus.

This attack cannot be blocked.
On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more non-summoned UNDYING allies, this attack is Unavoidable.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Goddess of Death
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Summon an Undead Asgardian.
 > If Kestrel (Zombie) is an ally, summon an additional Undead Asgardian + apply Taunt to all Undead Asgardian allies.
 > If Iron Man (Zombie) or Juggernaut (Zombie) is an ally, gain Stealth.

On an Undead Asgardian's Death, summon an Undead Asgardian + Gain +1 Deathproof to a maximum of 3.

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-summoned ASGARDIAN or UNDYING ally.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health, if Iron Man (Zombie) is an ally, summon an Undead Asgardian ally and apply Taunt to all Undead Asgardian allies.
This can only trigger once per match.

If this character has 2 or more non-summoned UNDYING allies, gain +300% Focus.

In WAR:
> On WAR DEFENSE, on non-summoned ASGARDIAN ally's Death, summon an Undead Asgardian.
> Non-summoned ASGARDIAN and UNDYING allies gain +25% Damage.

basic.name: Claws Out
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 180% Piercing.

In WAR, if this character has 3 or more BRIMSTONE allies, on Crit, apply Ability Block.

Apply Assist Now to a random Daimon Hellstrom ally.

special.name: Catastrophic Cuts
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed + Heal Block + Disrupted + Trauma.

This attack ignores Defense Up.
In WAR, this attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Feline Fury
ultimate.description:
Clear 2 negative effects from self.

Attack primary target for 400% Piercing + apply Stun for 1 turn and the following for 2 turns: 2 Bleed, Heal Block, Disrupted, Trauma

Chain to 4 targets within infinite spaces of the previous target for 400% Piercing + apply the following for 2 turns: 2 Bleed, Heal Block, Disrupted, Trauma

In WAR:
 > If this character has 3 or more BRIMSTONE allies, if any secondary target is a BRAWLER, apply Stun to that character.
 > If this character has 3 or more BRIMSTONE allies, if any target is a BLASTER that doesn't have Trauma, apply Ability Block for 2 turns and Blind for 2 turns to that character.
 > This attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

passive.name: Infernal Feline
passive.description:
On Spawn, if this character has 3 or more BRIMSTONE allies, generate 2 Ultimate Ability Energy for self.

In WAR, when an enemy uses their Basic Ability, if that character has Ability Block, attack the most injured enemy, ignoring Taunt and Stealth, with this character's Special - Catastrophic Cuts at level 7.

In WAR, if this character has 3 or more BRIMSTONE allies:
 > Enemies cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies.
 > Enemies cannot gain Deathproof, Speed Up, or Assist Now.

basic.name: Hellfire Claws
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 220% Piercing.
Apply Defense Down to the primary target.

If primary target has Exposed apply Defense Down for 2 turns instead.

This attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Infernal Pursuit
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Defense Down. Chain to 4 adjacent targets for 250% damage + apply Defense Down.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

If any target has Exposed:
 > Attack primary target for 10% of target's Max Health.
 > Instead attack all enemies for 250% Piercing + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Demon Fire
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + flip 1 positive effect to a negative effect + apply Defense Down.

If any target has Exposed:
 > Attack a random target with Exposed for 10% of target's Max Health.
 > Deal an additional 300% Piercing + flip all positive effects to negative effects + apply Defense Down and Trauma.
 > In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies, apply Ability Block to all enemies.
 > In CRUCIBLE, apply Disrupted + Offense Down to all HERO enemies.
 > In CRUCIBLE, reduce Speed Bar for all MUTANT VILLIAN enemies by 30%.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

This attack cannot be dodged, blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: Hell Reborn
passive.description:
On Spawn and any turn, if no enemy has Exposed, apply Exposed to the most injured enemy.

On any turn, if an enemy MINION has Exposed, attack that target for 500% Piercing. This attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

On Turn, if 2 or more enemies are Exposed, remove Exposed from all enemies and Heal self for 25% of this characters Max Health.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > While any enemy has Exposed, this character cannot have their Speed Bar reduced.
 > If this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies, enemies cannot gain Defense Up and Deathproof.

basic.name: Around the World
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Olympian Slam
special.description:
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 420% damage + 100% Drain + apply Defense Down.
Apply Ability Block and Disrupted to primary target.

Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.

Flip all negative effects into positive effects for self and all MIGHTY AVENGER and UNCANNY AVENGER allies.

This attack gains +300% Extra Focus and cannot be blocked or dodged.

ultimate.name: Labor of Strength
ultimate.description:
Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing + 50% Drain.

Reduce Speed Bar on primary target by 20%.

This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Champion of Olympus
passive.description:
In RAIDS, on Spawn:
 > Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all UNCANNY AVENGER allies.
 > If this character has 3 or more MYSTIC enemies, fill Speed Bar of self and all UNCANNY AVENGER allies by 20%.

On WAR OFFENSE, on Spawn:
 > Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all MIGHTY AVENGER allies.
 > If this character has 3 or more MYSTIC enemies, fill Speed Bar of self and all MIGHTY AVENGER allies by 20%.

Whenever this character takes an action, perform the following before the attack on the target:
 > Clear all Charged, copy and clear all positive effects, excluding Stealth, and copy and clear Revive Once.
 > In RAIDS, if this character is alive and has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies, an UNCANNY AVENGER ally performs these actions on their target before taking an action, except they do not copy Taunt.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, if this character is alive and has 4 or more MIGHTY AVENGER allies, a MIGHTY AVENGER ally performs these actions on their target before taking an action, except they do not copy Taunt.

In RAIDS, if this character has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies, or on WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 4 or more MIGHTY AVENGER allies: Enemy characters cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).

Gain +300% Focus. MIGHTY AVENGER and UNCANNY AVENGER allies gain +300% Focus.

basic.name: Perfected Blast
basic.description:
Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

special.name: Unnatural Selection
special.description:
Apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns to all enemies.

Steal 25% Health from all enemies and redistribute 200% of Health stolen to self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies.

This attack cannot be blocked.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > Reduce the duration of Safeguard by 2 on all enemies + flip all positive effects.
 > Flip all negative effects on self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies to positive effects.
 > This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Survival of the Fittest
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects on self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies.
Heal self and all allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Attack all enemies for 500% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down.

This attack ignores Defense Up and is Unavoidable.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > Heal self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies for an additional 15% of this character's Max Health.
 > This attack cannot be Blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: Intelligent Designer
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies.

The first time this character or a SHADOW CONCLAVE ally drops below 50% Health:
 > Clear all negative effects on that character.
 > In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies, steal 10% Health from all enemies and redistribute to that character. This bypasses Heal Block.

The Speed of this character and each SHADOW CONCLAVE ally can only be reduced by Slow.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > On Spawn, apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies.
 > This character and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies Speed Bar cannot be reduced.
 > Enemies cannot gain Speed Up and cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies.
 > The Speed and Resistance of all enemies can only be increased by positive effects.

basic.name: Macaque Attack
basic.description:
