 > If this character has 3 or more ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies, this attack deals an additional 300% damage to all enemies.
 > Gain +100,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
 > This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Prodigy
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all POWER ARMOR and ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies.

Gain +40% Resist. TECH allies gain +40% Resist.
Gain +15% Max Health. POWER ARMOR allies gain +15% Max Health.
Gain +15% Armor. POWER ARMOR allies gain +15% Armor.

basic.name: Mark II Repulsors
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.
Apply +1 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 3.
Prolong the duration of all negative effects, excluding Ability Block and Stun, by 1.

If this character has 4 or more P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies, gain Immunity.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Overdrive Blast
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

Apply Slow to all enemies.
Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all adjacent P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.

In RAIDS, apply Trauma for 2 turns to primary and adjacent targets.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Engineered Salvo
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% damage + clear 2 random positive effects from each enemy + apply Slow for 2 turns.

Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.
Apply Stun to the primary target for 2 turns.

In RAIDS:
 > Apply Stun to an additional random enemy that does not have Stun.
 > If this character has 4 or more P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies, apply Stun to an additional random enemy that does not have Stun.

Prolong the duration of all positive effects on self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies by +1, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack gains +50% Extra Focus for each enemy with Vulnerable.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Heart of Iron
passive.description:
On Spawn:
> Apply +2 Deflect to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.
 > On Spawn, if this character has 4 or more P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies, generate 2 Ability Energy for self and each P.E.G.A.S.U.S. ally.

When an enemy drops below 50% health, apply Disrupted for 2 turns to that enemy.

Gain +60% Armor. P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies gain +60% armor.

In RAIDS:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar for all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies by 15% + 15% per P.E.G.A.S.U.S. ally.
 > Lower Armor by 30% for all enemies with Vulnerable.

basic.name: Repulsor Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Defense Down.
Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 230% damage + apply Defense Down.

Gain an Assist from a random Hulkbuster or ILLUMINATI ally.

Counterattack does not break this Chain.
In CRUCIBLE, this attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

special.name: Rocket Barrage
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 400% damage + prolong the duration of all negative effects by 1 on each target.

In RAIDS, generate 1 Ability Energy for adjacent BIONIC AVENGER allies.

In CRUCIBLE, generate 1 Ability Energy for adjacent HERO allies + generate 1 additional Ability Energy for adjacent ILLUMINATI allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

ultimate.name: Unibeam
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 700% damage.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for 2 random BIONIC AVENGER or ILLUMINATI allies.

In RAIDS, generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all BIONIC AVENGER allies instead.

In CRUCIBLE, generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all ILLUMINATI allies instead.

If this character has 3 or more BIONIC AVENGER or ILLUMINATI allies, this attack cannot be Blocked or Dodged.

passive.name: Stark Upgrades
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all ILLUMINATI allies.

Gain +5% Damage for each BIONIC AVENGER, POWER ARMOR, WAVE I - AVENGER, or ILLUMINATI ally.

Gain +25% Crit Chance. Allies gain +10% Crit Chance.
TECH, BIONIC AVENGER, and ILLUMINATI allies gain an additional +5% Crit Chance.
Gain +40% Crit Damage. BIONIC AVENGER and ILLUMINATI allies gain +20% Crit Damage.

In RAIDS:
 > Gain an additional +15% Crit Chance.
 > BIONIC AVENGER allies gain an additional +20% Crit Chance.
 > BIONIC AVENGER allies gain an additional +20% Crit Damage.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Gain an additional +15% Crit Chance.
 > ILLUMINATI allies gain an additional +20% Crit Chance.
 > ILLUMINATI allies gain an additional +20% Crit Damage.

basic.name: Nano Repulsor
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply +1 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 3.
Attack adjacent targets for 320% damage.

Gain Speed Up.

In RAIDS:
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 10% for primary target.
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 5% for adjacent targets.

special.name: Blade Barrage
special.description:
Attack primary target for 360% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns and Ability Block for 2 turns.
Rebound Chain to 5 adjacent targets for 360% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns.

Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. and Thor (Infinity War) allies.

In RAIDS, apply an additional Bleed for 2 turns to all secondary attacks.

ultimate.name: Infinity Beam
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing, clear 3 positive effects, and apply Defense Down for 2 turns.
If Kestrel is an active ally, attack all enemies for 600% Piercing instead.

Apply Blind for 2 turns to the primary target.
Spread all positive effects, excluding Taunt and Stealth, on self to all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies and a random Thor (Infinity War) ally.

Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. and Thor (Infinity War) allies.

In RAIDS, apply Blind to all enemies with Vulnerable.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Nanotech Upgrades
passive.description:
When a positive effect is applied to this character, any P.E.G.A.S.U.S. ally, or a Thor (Infinity War) ally, heal all allies for 3% of this character's Max Health.

When this character or a P.E.G.A.S.U.S. ally drops below 50% Health:
 > Clear Disrupted on that character.
 > Apply Speed Up and 2 Deathproof to that character.
 > If the ally that dropped below 50% Health was Rescue, apply Stealth to that character and Taunt to this character.

Gain +30% Damage.
Gain +30% Max Health.
P.E.G.A.S.U.S. and Thor (Infinity War) allies gain +30% Damage.
P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies gain +30% Max Health.

 In RAIDS:
 > Gain an additional +30% Damage.
 > P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies gain an additional +30% Damage.
 > Lower Resistance by 30% for all enemies with Vulnerable.

basic.name: Patriotic Fury
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or Assist, clear Immunity + apply Defense Down for 2 turns, Heal Block for 2 turns, Disrupted for 2 turns, and Slow for 2 turns.

special.name: Stars and Strikes
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + clear all positive effects.
Apply +1 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 5 and +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3, to each target.

In CRUCIBLE, apply Trauma for 2 turns to all enemies.

Gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.name: Proton Cannon
ultimate.description:
Flip Deflect and Minor Deflect on primary and adjacent targets.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% Piercing + apply +2 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 5, Defense Down for 2 turns, Heal Block for 2 turns, and 2 Bleed.

Apply Stun to the primary target.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Iron Osborn
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply +1 Vulnerable to all enemies, up to a max of 5. This cannot be blocked or dodged. (This triggers after other On Spawn passives.)

Gain Assist Now on each CABAL ally's turn. On Turn, grant Assist Now to a random CABAL ally.

Enemies with Vulnerable take an additional 10% damage per Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 30%.
If this character has 2 or more CABAL allies, enemies cannot gain Stealth.

Gain +50% Damage.
Gain +50% Focus. VILLAIN allies gain +50% Focus.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > VILLAIN allies gain +50% Damage.
 > If this character has 2 or more CABAL allies, this character and all VILLAIN allies gain +100% Accuracy.
 > If this character has 2 or more CABAL allies, enemy characters with Vulnerable cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).
 > On VILLAIN ally Crit, apply +1 Vulnerable to all enemies, up to a max of 5.

basic.name: Hammer Slammer
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% Piercing + clear 2 positive effects.

In WAR, this attack ignores Defense Up.

special.name: Shards of Mjolnir
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% Piercing. Attack all adjacent targets for 300% Piercing.

If the primary target has Stun, reduce the target's Speed Bar by 25%.
If the primary target does not have Stun, apply Disrupted for 2 turns.

In WAR, this attack ignores Defense Up.

ultimate.name: Ride the Lightning
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% Piercing + flip 2 positive effects to negative effects.

Apply Blind to the primary target.

Gain +3 Charged.

In WAR, this attack ignores Defense Up.

passive.name: Goddess of Thunder
passive.description:
At the end of any turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged, attack the enemy with the highest Damage that does not have Trauma for 250% damage + lose 5 Charged.
In WAR:
 > Apply Trauma
 > This attack ignores Defense Up

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

When this character or a HERO ASGARDIAN attacks an enemy, apply +1 Charged to self and all non-MYTHIC CHARGEABLE HERO ASGARDIAN allies.

Gain +25% Max Health.

In WAR:
 > HERO ASGARDIAN allies gain +25% Max Health.
 > Gain +50% Resistance against Heal Block.
 > HERO ASGARDIAN allies gain +50% Resistance against Heal Block.

basic.name: Psywave
basic.description: Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.

special.name: Telekinetic Blitz
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% damage.
Prolong the duration of all negative effects for all enemies by 1.
Apply the following negative effects for 2 turns to all enemies:
 > Defense Down, Heal Block, and Disrupted

This attack gains +500% Extra Focus.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:
 > Reduce the Speed Bar of all enemies by 25%.
 > Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all IMMORTAL X-MEN allies.
 > If this character has 3 or more IMMORTAL X-MEN allies, this attack cannot miss and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

In RAIDS, if this character has 3 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies, this attack cannot miss and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Terra Throw
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 420% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed and clear Revive Once.
Apply Ability Block for 2 turns to primary target.

This attack gains +1,000% Extra Focus.
Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Marvel Girl
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Defense Up to self and all X-MEN and AVENGER allies.
 > Barrier self and all X-MEN and AVENGER allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

On Spawn, on CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:
 > If this character has 4 or more IMMORTAL X-MEN allies, reduce the Starting Ability Energy of each enemy's Special Ability by 10.
 > Apply Safeguard to self and all IMMORTAL X-MEN allies.

On Spawn, in RAIDS:
 > If this character has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies, reduce the Starting Ability Energy of each enemy's Special Ability by 10.
 > Apply Safeguard to self and all UNCANNY AVENGER allies.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, if this character has 4 or more IMMORTAL X-MEN allies, or in RAIDS, if this character has 4 or more UNCANNY AVENGER allies:
 > Before this character takes a turn, enemies cannot gain Taunt.
 > Enemies cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).

basic.name: Just a Taste
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% Piercing + apply Disrupted for 2 turns.

Generate 1 Ultimate Ability Energy for self.
Generate 1 Special Ability Energy for a random Gwenpool ally.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to RETCON characters.

special.name: Sharknado
special.description:
Clear all Barrier from all enemies.

Pull all enemies up to 2 spaces toward the primary target + reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2.
Attack all enemies for 360% Piercing + apply Disrupted for 2 turns, Defense Down for 2 turns, and Silence for 2 turns.

On WAR DEFENSE or in BATTLEWORLD:
 > On Kill, Bonus Attack all enemies for 360% Piercing.

Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.name: Deep Dive
ultimate.description: Attack all enemies for 30% of this character's Max Health + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Trauma for 2 turns.

passive.name: Cute Carcharodon
passive.description:
When an enemy uses their Ultimate Ability, apply Time Warp to self or 1 random RETCON ally that does not have Time Warp.

On enemy Death, attack the most injured enemy SUPPORT for 250% Piercing.

On WAR DEFENSE or in BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 4 RETCON allies:
 > On Spawn, if this character does not have Exhausted, apply Slow to all enemies. Gain +500% Focus for this action.
 >  Until this character completes a turn, enemies cannot gain Immunity or Speed Up.
 > Enemies cannot have their Speed increased except by positive effects.
 > Non-Boss enemies that normally cannot gain Slow can now gain Slow.
 > Allies with Time Warp, gain +616% Speed.

Time Warp:
 > On Turn, attack a random enemy with the attacker's Ultimate Ability at level 7. This does not use the attacker's Ultimate Ability Energy.
 > Lose Time Warp.

basic.name: Jaw Breaker
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 220% damage + 50% chance to Bonus Attack 1-2 times for 170% damage.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for a random DEFENDER or A-FORCE ally or self that was not at full energy. Each attack has a 50% chance to generate 1 Ability Energy for self or a random ally.

special.name: Shake it Off
special.description:
Clear all negative effects from self and all allies.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for each DEFENDER or A-FORCE ally. Generate 4 Ability Energy for random allies.

Barrier self and all A-FORCE and DARING WARRIOR allies for 20% of this character's Max Health. Barrier all other allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.

Apply +1 Defense Up, up to a max of 3 turns, to self and all A-FORCE and DARING WARRIOR allies.
Apply Immunity to self and all A-FORCE and DARING WARRIOR allies.

ultimate.name: Rejection
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + clear all positive effects.

Apply +1 Defense Up, up to a max of 3 turns, to self and all A-FORCE and DARING WARRIOR allies.

Call an assist from the A-FORCE or DARING WARRIOR ally with the highest Damage.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for this character.

Gain +100,000% Extra Focus for this attack.

passive.name: Denial
passive.description:
Gain +20% Resistance. CITY allies gain +20% Resistance.
All other allies gain +10% Resistance.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > When this character or any A-FORCE ally, with Taunt, drops below 50% Max Health, clear Taunt from that ally or self.
 > On Turn, apply +1 Defense Up, up to a max of 3 turns to self and all SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE allies.

basic.name: Firework Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 290% damage + 70% chance to apply Blind.
In RAIDS, always apply Blind.

special.name: Plasmoid Party
special.description:
Apply Offense Up to self and all X-MEN allies.

Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Gain an assist at 50% Damage from all ASTONISHING X-MEN allies.
Call 2 random non-summoned, non-ASTONISHING X-MEN allies, at 50% Damage, to attack the primary target.
This attack is unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

On Kill, spread 3 negative effects from the primary target to all other enemies. This will not spread Stun.

ultimate.name: Splitting Atoms
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 400% damage + 50% Piercing + reduce Speed Bar by 25% + apply Stun.
Attack all other enemies for 200% damage + 50% Piercing.

Apply +1 Slow to all enemies.
Apply Offense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.

passive.name: Mall Rat
passive.description:
When an ASTONISHING X-MEN ally drops below 50% Health, fill an ally Beast Speed Bar by 30% + generate an Ability Energy for a random allied Beast.

On enemy Death, fill all ASTONISHING X-MEN allies' Speed Bar by 25%.

On this character's and each X-MEN ally's turn, apply Assist Now to either self or a random X-MEN ally.

Gain +30% Max Health. X-MEN allies gain +15% Max Health.
ASTONISHING X-MEN allies gain an additional +15% Max Health.

In RAIDS:
 > Gain +20% Speed.
 > ASTONISHING X-MEN allies gain +20% Speed.
 > Gain +40% Damage.
 > ASTONISHING X-MEN allies gain +40% Damage.

basic.name: Overwhelming Blow
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 290% damage.

Gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 4.
Generate 1 Ability Energy for self.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies and has Ability Block, fill Speed Bar by 100%.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or an Assist, the attack does no additional effects besides damage.

This attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Immovable Object
special.description:
Gain Taunt for 2 turns, Defense Up for 2 turns, Immunity for 1 turn, 1 Deathproof, and 2 Regeneration for 2 turns.

Heal self and all ACCURSED allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies:
 > Reduce the duration of all negative effects on self by 1 (Any negative effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Trauma).
 > Heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health for each negative effect that expired.

ultimate.name: Crushing Charge
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 380% damage + 100% Drain.
This attack gains 80% additional damage per Charged on this character.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: I'm the Juggernaut!
passive.description:
On Spawn, clear all but 1 Charged on self. If any Charged were cleared, fill Speed Bar by 40%. On Spawn, if this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies, gain Taunt.
On Turn, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 4. While this character has Charged, this character cannot gain Stun.

On any Turn and any Turn End:
 > If this character has Immunity, apply Safeguard to self and all ACCURSED allies.
 > If this character does not have Immunity, reduce the duration of Safeguard on self and all ACCURSED allies by 10.

On attacked, if this character has a Magneto or Hellverine ally, fill Speed Bar by 20% for self and all PROTECTOR allies.
When an ACCURSED ally drops below 50% Health, clear 3 negative effects on self and, if this character's Health is above 50%, gain Taunt.

In CRUCIBLE, the first time any enemy uses their Ultimate ability, if this character does not have 2 or more Exhausted:
 > Clear 1 Exhausted from self and all ACCURSED allies + clear 5 negative effects from self and all ACCURSED allies.
 > Until this triggers, this character gains 2,000% Resistance and this character can only lose up to 20% of this character's Health each turn.
 > This can only trigger once per CRUCIBLE.

basic.name: Sky Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 200% Piercing + 50% Drain + 5% of target's Max Health.
If the primary target is a MINION, attack for 30% of the target's Max Health instead.

Flip 2 positive effects into negative effects on primary target.
In WAR, flip all positive effects into negative effects instead.

If the primary target has Exposed, apply Blind.
If the primary target has no positive effects, apply Exposed.

Apply +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 3, to the Ms. Marvel (Classic) or Wasp ally with the most Health.

Prolong the duration of 1 positive effect on this character by +1, up to maximum of 2.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage, does not flip positive effects, does not apply any negative effects, and does not apply Exposed to ABSOLUTE A-FORCE characters.

This attack cannot be Assisted, blocked, or counterattacked.

special.name: Step of the Wind
special.description:
Clear all Barrier from all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 250% Piercing + 30% Drain.
This attack deals double damage to enemies that have Safeguard.

Flip 5 positive effects into negative effects on all enemies.
Apply Offense Down for 2 turns, Heal Block for 2 turns, and 2 Bleed for 1 turn to all enemies.
If an enemy does not have any positive effects, apply Trauma for 2 turns to that character.

Apply Exposed to all SUPPORT enemies.

Redistribute total health evenly between self and all ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies.

In WAR, this attack cannot be blocked, dodged, or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Ancient Power
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% Piercing + apply Defense Down for 2 turns, Heal Block for 2 turns, Disrupted for 2 turns, and Trauma for 2 turns.
This attack deals double damage to enemies that have Safeguard.

Fill Speed Bar by 100%.

In WAR, this attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: New World Protector
passive.description:
On Spawn, after all other characters' On Spawn effects:
 > Fill Speed Bar for self by 200%.
 > Attack the enemy CONTROLLER with the highest Focus for 350% Piercing + apply Exposed.

While this character's Health is above 50%, this character cannot gain Slow.

The Focus and Damage of this character can only be reduced by Offense Down.

Enemies with Exposed:
 > In WAR, if this character has 4 or more ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies, cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).
 >  In WAR, cannot gain Stealth or Charged. This does not prevent prolonging the duration of effects already on the target.
 >  In WAR, cannot Barrier themselves or their allies.
 >  In WAR, have their Assist Chance lowered by 100%.
 > Have their Revive Chance lowered by 100%.

basic.name: Teenage Smackdown
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Barrier self for 5% of this character's Max Health.
Gain +1 Charged.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Downvote
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on the primary target.
Attack primary target for 400% damage + copy and clear 2 random positive effects, excluding Taunt, on primary target to self, SECRET DEFENDER allies, and Captain Marvel allies.

Gain Taunt.

Barrier self and all allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.
Clear 2 random negative effects from self and all allies.
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns and 2 Regeneration to self and all allies.

In ARENA, apply +1 Safeguard, up to a maximum of 2, to self and all SECRET DEFENDER allies.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Hard Light Slam
ultimate.description:
Flip Taunt to Defense Down on all enemies.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 30%. On ARENA DEFENSE, instead, attack the enemy with the highest Speed, ignoring Taunt, and adjacent targets for 500% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 30%.

Gain Taunt.

Barrier self, SECRET DEFENDER allies, and Captain Marvel allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.
Clear 2 random negative effects from self, SECRET DEFENDER allies, and Captain Marvel allies.
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns and 2 Regeneration to self, SECRET DEFENDER allies, and Captain Marvel allies.

In ARENA, apply +1 Safeguard, up to a maximum of 2, to self and all SECRET DEFENDER allies.

Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Superfan
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Fill Speed Bar for self by 10% + 10% for each SECRET DEFENDER ally.
 > Barrier self and all SECRET DEFENDER allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.
 > Apply Defense Up to self and all SECRET DEFENDER allies.

On Attacked, gain +1 Charged.
On any turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged, Barrier self for 20% of this character's Max Health, Heal self for 20% of this character's Max Health, then lose 5 Charged.

When an enemy becomes Empowered, Heal self for 20% of this character's Max Health, Barrier self for 20% of this character's Max Health and gain Taunt.

When this character or any SECRET DEFENDER ally drops below 30% Max Health the first time:
 > Clear Disrupted and apply Deathproof and Stealth to that character.
 > Clear Taunt and apply 2 Regeneration to that character (Safeguard prevents Taunt from being able to be cleared).

Gain +50% Armor. SECRET DEFENDER allies gain +50% Armor.
Gain +15% Max Barrier. SECRET DEFENDER allies gain +15% Max Barrier.
In ARENA, gain +50% Max Health.

basic.name: Temporal Blow
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 360% Piercing.
If the primary target is Vulnerable, fill this character's Speed Bar by 20%.

Attack the most injured enemy for 290% Piercing + apply Disrupted.

These attacks ignore Defense Up and cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Foreseen Strikes
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on primary and adjacent targets.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 420% Piercing + apply Slow for 2 turns.

Gain 1 Evade per Crit.

Apply Defense Up to self and all allies.
Apply +2 Offense Up to self and all MASTERS OF EVIL allies.

This attack ignores Defense Up.

ultimate.name: Time's Up
ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier, clear all Deathproof, and apply Defense Down to all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing, clear 3 positive effects, and reduce Speed Bar by 10%.

Apply +2 Speed Up to self and all MASTERS OF EVIL allies.

This attack ignores Defense Up.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Time Warlord
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > On OFFENSE, fill Speed Bar by 5% for self and all allies.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all MASTERS OF EVIL allies.

On Turn:
 > Attack all enemies for 50% Piercing + steal 3% Health from all enemies and redistribute to self. This attack bypasses Heal Block and ignores Defense Up.
 > Transfer 2 negative effects from to self to the most injured enemy.
 > In CRUCIBLE, clear Speed Up on all enemies.
 > On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, if this character has 4 or more MASTERS OF EVIL allies, apply +1 Vulnerable, to up a maximum of 5, to all enemies.

When any enemy gains Speed Up, fill Speed Bar for this character by 10%.

Gain +30% Max Health.
Gain +40% Crit Chance for self and all MASTERS OF EVIL allies.
Gain +60% Crit Damage. MASTERS OF EVIL allies gain +20% Crit Damage.
Gain an additional +20% Crit Chance and +10% Crit Damage for self or any MASTERS OF EVIL ally with Offense Up.

basic.name: Precise Attack
basic.description:
Clear Evade + attack primary target for 280% damage.
If the primary target has a negative effect, gain +25% Crit Chance for this attack.

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Crippling Blows
special.description:
Attack primary target for 260% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 20% and apply Slow for 2 turns. Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 200% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Pressure Points
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 400% damage + clear all positive effects.

If Black Bolt is an ally, gain +100,000 Extra Focus for this attack + apply Disrupted.

passive.name: The Magister
passive.description:
On Turn, choose 1 random enemy. If they have a positive effect, flip the positive effect to a negative effect. Otherwise apply Defense Down.
Gain +10% Focus. Gain +10% Focus for each INHUMAN ally.
Gain +10% Dodge chance.

basic.name: Acrobatic Archer
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 225% Piercing + clear 2 random positive effects.

On Crit, Chain to 1 adjacent enemy for 225% Piercing + clear 2 random positive effects.

On WAR DEFENSE, apply Taunt to each target.

If this character has Charged, gain +25% Crit Chance for this attack.
This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

special.name: Trick Arrows
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 275% damage. Flip 3 positive effects on each target to negative effects.

If this character has Charged, apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all YOUNG AVENGER allies.

If this character does not have Charged, fill Speed Bar by 75% + gain Charged.

This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.name: Empty the Quiver
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing.

If this character has Charged, apply Blind for 2 turns to the enemy with the highest Damage and 2 random negative effects for 2 turns to all other enemies from this list: Defense Down, Disrupted, Offense Down, Slow.

Lose Charged.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > Don't lose Charged.
 > Gain +100% Extra Focus for this attack.
 > Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all YOUNG AVENGER allies.

This attack cannot be dodged or counterattacked.

passive.name: Stubborn Defiance
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all YOUNG AVENGER allies.

On Death of a YOUNG AVENGER ally or when a YOUNG AVENGER ally drops below 50% Health, attack a random enemy for 200% Piercing + apply Blind and Slow.

When this character drops below 50% Health, gain 2 Evade.

Gain +25% Resistance. YOUNG AVENGER allies gain +25% Resistance.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > Gain 5 Charged on Spawn of their initial match. This action occurs only once per WAR.
 > On Turn, if Charged, grant 1 Ability Energy to self and all YOUNG AVENGER allies, then lose 1 Charged.

basic.name: Focus Fire
basic.description: Attack primary target for 330% damage + 30% Drain. On Crit, Bonus Attack 2 times for 240% damage + 30% Drain and lose Charged. Otherwise, gain +1 Charged up to a maximum of 5.

special.name: Full Auto
special.description:
Transfer 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self and all SKILL MILITARY allies.

Attack primary target for 200% damage 3 times. On Crit, gain Offense Up and lose Charged. Otherwise, gain +1 Charged up to a maximum of 5.

ultimate.name: Battle Frenzy
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Chain to all adjacent targets for 240% damage.
In CRUCIBLE, Rebound Chain to 7 adjacent targets for 240% damage instead.

On Crit, attack all enemies for 200% damage and lose Charged. Otherwise, gain +1 Charged up to a maximum of 5.

Counterattack does not break this Chain.

passive.name: Retribution
passive.description:
On Defense Up, attack the most injured enemy for 330% damage.
On Kill, heal for 10% of this character's Max Health.
Gain +20% Drain.
Gain +20% Crit Chance per Charged.

Gain +20% chance to Counterattack. Gain +20% chance to Counterattack for each WAKANDAN or SKILL MILITARY ally.

basic.name: Batter
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage. If this character has 3 or more non-summoned UNDERWORLD allies, gain 15% Crit Chance + 15% Crit Chance for each non-summoned UNDERWORLD ally.

On Crit, Barrier self for 10% of this character's Max Health.

50% chance to gain an Assist from a random ally.

special.name: Crime Lord
special.description:
Summon 3 Bodyguards. Bodyguards gain Taunt and 2 Deathproof when Summoned.

On WAR OFFENSE, apply Safeguard to self and all UNDERWORLD allies.

ultimate.name: Boss's Orders
ultimate.description:
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.
Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.

Gain an assist from a random UNDERWORLD ally.
Gain an assist from a random ally.

passive.name: Mastermind
passive.description:
On Spawn, summon a Bodyguard. Bodyguard gains Taunt and 2 Deathproof when Summoned.

On this character's or any VILLAIN ally's turn, 50% chance to apply Assist Now to self or a random ally.
At the end of this character's turn, if this character has Barrier, apply Speed Up and Offense Up to all Summoned allies.

On Attacked, fill this character's and all Summoned UNDERWORLD allies' Speed Bars by 20%.

Gain 60% Focus. UNDERWORLD allies gain 60% Focus.
Gain 60% Resistance. UNDERWORLD allies gain 60% Resistance.

basic.name: Shadowcat Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + clear 2 positive effects.

Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to a random Colossus ally and another X-MEN ally with the least Speed Bar that does not have Speed Up.

If Colossus is an ally, gain +50% Damage for this attack.

Gain 500% Extra Focus for this attack.

special.name: Lockheed Blast
special.description:
Attack all enemies for 280% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.
Flip Taunt to Defense Down on all enemies.

Fill this character's Speed Bar by 30%.

Heal self and the most injured ally for 30% of this character's Max Health.
Apply Evade to the most injured ally.

ultimate.name: Mischievous Sprite
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% Piercing + apply Disrupted for 2 turns.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns and Immunity for 2 turns to all X-MEN allies.

Heal self and the most injured ally for 30% of this character's Max Health.
Apply Evade to the most injured ally.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Untouchable
passive.description:
On Turn, apply Defense Up to the 2 most injured X-MEN allies or self.

On Enemy Turn:
 > In WAR and CRUCIBLE, 20% chance to apply Evade to the most injured X-MEN ally or self.
 > In RAIDS, apply Evade to the most injured ASTONISHING X-MEN ally or self.

On enemy miss or X-MEN ally dodge, heal the most injured X-MEN ally for 10% of this character's Max Health.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health, gain Stealth for 2 turns.

Gain +30% Dodge Chance.

basic.name: Void Slash
basic.description:
Apply +1 Darkness to the primary target.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 270% Piercing + apply Slow.

Mind Control a random enemy with Darkness to attack the most injured enemy. Controlled character gains +20% Damage per Darkness on that character for this attack, up to a maximum of +200% Damage.

When forced to attack an ally, this character does not apply Darkness to that ally.
This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

special.name: Symbiote Cyclone
special.description:
If this character does not have Trauma, transfer all negative effects from each ally to self, then flip all negative effects on self.
Copy 3 random positive effects, excluding Stealth and Taunt, from self to each ally.

Heal self for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% Piercing + apply +1 Darkness.

The first time this ability is used in a match, Summon 1 Carnage (Enraged) ally. The summoned Carnage (Enraged) ally gains Safeguard for 2 turns and Defense Up for 2 turns.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Oblivion Calls
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 320% Piercing + apply Slow for 2 turns, Trauma for 2 turns, and +1 Darkness to each target.

If this character does not have Exhausted, clear all Battlefield Effects on the enemy side and apply the Battlefield Effect, Enveloping Darkness, to the enemy side.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be counterattacked.

Enveloping Darkness:
 > On enemy Turn, apply +1 Darkness to that enemy + flip Immunity on that enemy.
 > On enemy Turn End, apply +1 Slow, up to a maximum of 3 to that enemy.
 > This Battlefield Effect lasts until cleared or until the end of the match.

passive.name: King In Black
passive.description:
Characters killed by Knull cannot be revived.

On Spawn, gain Defense Up for 2 turns and apply +1 Darkness to the enemy with the highest Damage.

On this character's or any ally's turn, Heal self for 5% of this character's Max Health per enemy with Darkness. If this character's Health is full, instead Barrier self for 5% of this character's Max Health per enemy with Darkness.

Gain +50% Assist Chance + 15% Assist Chance per VILLAIN ally + an additional 15% Assist Chance per SYMBIOTE ally.
Gain +10% Speed per SYMBIOTE ally. SYMBIOTE allies gain +15% Speed and Piercing.
This character cannot gain Trauma, Stun, or Slow. This character's Speed Bar cannot be reduced.
Enemies cannot become Empowered.

Darkness:
 > On Enemy Turn, if that enemy has Darkness, Mind Control that enemy to attack the most injured enemy. This attack gains +20% Damage for each Darkness on that enemy, up to a maximum of +200% Damage.
 > Enemies with Darkness cannot gain Speed Up.
 > Gain +10% Drain and +10% Speed for each enemy with Darkness, up to a maximum of +50%, for self and all SYMBIOTE allies.
 > Lower Damage Reduction, Damage, and Resistance by 25% for all enemies with Darkness.
 > This effect cannot be resisted.

basic.name: Smart-linked Rifle
basic.description: Attack primary target for 190% damage + 40% Piercing. Apply Slow for 1 turn.

special.name: Target Lock
special.description:
Attack primary target for 260% damage. Apply Taunt to target for 1 turn. Gain an Assist from an ally (greater assist chance from MERCENARY and KREE allies).

Gain +750% Extra Focus for this attack.

ultimate.name: Takedown Shot
ultimate.description: Attack primary target for 570% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns. 50% chance to apply Ability Block.

passive.name: Hot Pursuit
passive.description: On Enemy Death, gain Speed Up for 2 turns. On Spawn, gain Speed Up for 2 turns.

basic.name: Let's Rock
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 360% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.

Gain +2 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5.

special.name: Sakaaran Blast
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 420% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns. If Nova is an ally, or with 2 or more KNOWHERE allies, this attack does an additional 200% Piercing to each target.

Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all KNOWHERE allies.
Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5, to self and all KNOWHERE allies.

In WAR:
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 20% on primary and adjacent targets.
 > This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Rock Breaks Scissors
ultimate.description:
Clear all positive effects from the primary target.
Attack primary target for 550% damage.
Call the 2 KNOWHERE allies with the highest Damage to attack the primary target. These allies gains +30% Damage for this attack.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all KNOWHERE allies.

In WAR:
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 30% on the primary target.
 > This ability gains +100% Extra Focus.

passive.name: Rock and Roll
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns and 2 Deflect to self and all KNOWHERE allies.

When a KNOWHERE ally drops below 50% Health, gain Taunt and Deathproof.

While this character has Deflect or Minor Deflect, lower the Counterattack chance of all enemies by 100%.
Gain +30% Armor + 20% Armor per Deflect on this character.
KNOWHERE allies gain +30% Armor.

In WAR:
 > On Block, Barrier self for 5% of this character's Max Health.
 > Gain an additional +30% Armor for self and KNOWHERE allies.

basic.name: Knife Work
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 300% damage.
Apply Offense Down to each target.

Gain Counter.

special.name: Can't Run, Can't Hide
special.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage + flip Immunity + apply Ability Block.
Chain to 4 adjacent targets for 340% damage.
Apply Offense Down for 2 turns to each target + flip 2 random positives effect to negative effects on each target. Clear Charged.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Instead, attack all enemies for 340% damage.
 > Apply Ability Block to all CONTROLLER enemies.
> This attack gains +70% Extra Crit Chance against SUPPORT enemies.

This attack cannot be dodged or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Big Game Hunter
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% damage + apply 2 Bleed, Offense Down, and Slow.
Flip all Deathproof on each target.
Flip Stealth on each target.
Clear Charged.

If a target has Offense Down:
 > Apply 2 additional Bleed to that target.
 > Apply Slow for 2 turns to that target.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Most Dangerous Game
passive.description:
On Spawn, if this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, apply Safeguard to self and all SINISTER SIX allies.

When this character gains Charged, if they do not currently have Charged, flip Stealth to Disrupted on all enemies.

On Enemy turn:
 > Gain +1 Charged to a maximum of 10.
 > Flip Slow on a non-summoned ally that has  Slow.
 > Flip Heal Block on a non-summoned ally that has Heal Block.

Enemies with Offense Down cannot gain Deathproof.

Gain +5% Damage per Charged.
Gain +60% Focus. SINISTER SIX allies gain +60% Focus.

basic.name: Kree Sidearm
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage. Clear 1 positive effect from the target and generate 1 Ability Energy for 1-2 allies.

special.name: Imperial Decree
special.description: Apply Assist Now to an adjacent ally. If that ally is KREE, they also gain Offense Up. Attack primary target for 530% damage.

passive.name: Loyalist
passive.description: On Turn, clear 1 negative effect from 2 allies with negative effects. If those allies are KREE, remove an additional negative effect.

basic.name: Kree Sidearm
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage. Clear 1 positive effect from the target and generate 1 Ability Energy for 1-2 allies.

special.name: Imperial Decree
special.description: Apply Assist Now to an adjacent ally. If that ally is KREE, they also gain Offense Up. Attack primary target for 530% damage.

basic.name: Energy Blaster
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage.

On Kill, Chain to 1 adjacent target for 270% damage and grant 1 Ability Energy to 2 random allies.

special.name: Auto Targeter
special.description: Attack primary target for 360% damage + Bonus Attack for 260% damage.

passive.name: Integrated Systems
passive.description:
On Enemy Taunt, gain Offense Up for 2 turns and apply Offense Up to a KREE ally for 2 turns.

Gain +5% Speed per KREE ally.

On Turn, copy all positive effects from an ally Ultimus to this character.

basic.name: Predatory Strike
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage + apply Bleed.

special.name: Ferocious Pursuit
special.description: Attack primary target for 540% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

passive.name: Hunter-Killer
passive.description:
On Crit, heal self for 15% of Max Health and generate 1 Ability Energy for 1-2 random KREE allies.

Gain +15% Crit Chance.
Gain +5% Crit Chance per KREE MINION ally.

basic.name: Predatory Strike
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage + apply Bleed.

special.name: Ferocious Pursuit
special.description: Attack primary target for 540% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

basic.name: Kree Energy Pistol
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage. Generate 1 Ability Energy to 1 random ally.

special.name: Nanomachine Cloud
special.description: Apply Regeneration to all allies for 2 turns. Apply an additional Regeneration to Ronan and KREE MINION allies.

passive.name: Zeal
passive.description:
Whenever this character or an ally gains energy, heal them for 2,000 Health + 5% of this character's Max Health.

If that target is Ronan or a KREE MINION, heal them for 4,000 Health + 10% of this character's Max Health.

basic.name: Guardian Blaster
basic.description: Attack primary target for 180% damage. Gain Counter.

special.name: Call to Glory
special.description:
Gain Taunt + Defense Up. Apply Defense Up to all KREE allies. Heal self for 1,850 Health + 10% of Max Health.

If Ronan is an ally, heal for an additional 1,850 Health + 10% of Max Health.

passive.name: Royal Guard Armor
passive.description:
While in Taunt, when attacked, 75% chance to generate 1 Ability Energy for a random KREE ally.

Gain +20% Armor. Gain +5% Armor per KREE ally.

basic.name: Mystic Blades
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

On Crit, apply +1 Offense Down, up to a maximum of 3, on the primary target.

special.name: Disappearing Trick
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 250% Piercing, flip all positive effects into negative effects, and apply +1 Offense Down, up to a maximum of 3.

On Crit, prolong the duration of all negative effects by +1, up to a max of 3, on primary and secondary targets.

ultimate.name: Fan Dance
ultimate.description:
Apply Offense Up to self, all IMMORTAL WEAPON, and all THUNDERBOLT allies.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% Piercing.
Clear all Charged on the primary target.

In RAIDS, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 for primary and secondary targets.

Apply 1 random negative effect for 2 turns to primary and secondary targets. If this attack Crits, apply Slow for 2 turns, Offense Down for 2 turns, and Defense Down for 2 turns to primary and secondary targets.

This attack gains 500% Extra Focus and cannot be dodged or blocked.

passive.name: Never Misses
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all IMMORTAL WEAPON allies.
 > In RAIDS, generate 4 Ability Energy for self and all IMMORTAL WEAPON allies.

When one or more enemies with Offense Down are attacked, attack the primary target of that attack for 5% of that target's Max Health.

For each IMMORTAL WEAPON or THUNDERBOLT ally:
 > Gain +10% Crit Chance.
 > Gain +5% Crit Damage.

If this character has 3 IMMORTAL WEAPON allies: 
 > Reduce the Crit Chance of all enemies by 100%.
 > Enemies cannot have their Speed increased except by positive effects.

basic.name: Reaver Revenge
basic.description:
Transfer 1 Deflect from primary target to self.
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing.

If primary target has Bleed, repeat this attack + apply Defense Down.

This attack is Unavoidable and gains +300% Extra Focus.

special.name: Deadly Weapon
special.description:
Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 200% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed + reduce Speed Bar by 20%.

Repeat attack using a new primary target randomly chosen from the previous secondary targets. This secondary attack can target Stealth targets.

On Kill, increase the duration of all positive effects on self and all WEAPON X allies by +1, up to a maximum of 5.

ultimate.name: Adamantium Flurry
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 280% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 2 + apply 2 Bleed.

Rebound Chain to 4 adjacent targets for 280% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 2 + apply 2 Bleed.

Clear all negative effects from self and all WEAPON X allies.
Apply Immunity to self and all WEAPON X allies.

This attack cannot miss any target that has Bleed.
If this character has 3 or more WEAPON X or ORCHIS allies, this attack cannot be countered.

passive.name: Murderous Intent
passive.description:
On Turn, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.

When this character drops below 60% Health, gain 2 Deathproof and 2 Evade.

Lower Resistance by 50% for enemies with Bleed.

Gain +25% Crit Damage. WEAPON X allies gain +25% Crit Damage.

In WAR:
 > Gain +65% Focus.
 > WEAPON X allies gain +65% Focus.
 > Gain +1,000% Resistance against Bleed.
 > WEAPON X allies gain +1,000% Resistance against Bleed.

basic.name: Royal Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

If Gladiator is an ally, apply Assist Now to a random Gladiator ally.

If primary target has Barrier, gain +1 Deflect. In CRUCIBLE, instead, apply +1 Deflect to self and all allies.

special.name: Shi'ar Assault
special.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.
Attack primary target for 330% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Slow for 2 turns.
Rebound Chain to 4 adjacent targets for 330% damage + apply +1 Offense Down and +1 Heal Block.

Barrier self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

If Groot is an ally, apply 2 Regeneration for 2 turns and +2 Taunt, up to a maximum of 3 to a random Groot ally.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
If this character has 3 or more STARJAMMER allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Imperial Reign
ultimate.description:
In CRUCIBLE:
 > Clear all Barrier on all enemies.
 > If this character has 3 or more STARJAMMER allies, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 on each enemy. (Any positive effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Safeguard)

Attack all enemies for 200% damage.
Bonus Attack all enemies 2 times for 200% damage.

In CRUCIBLE, apply Trauma to all enemies on each attack.

On Kill, clear all negative effects on self and all STARJAMMER allies, then apply Immunity for 2 turns and Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all STARJAMMER allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: Galactic Queen
passive.description:
The first time this character drops below 50% Health, summon Gladiator. This can only trigger once per match.

On any Turn, if this character does not have Exhausted, flip all Vulnerable on self and all STARJAMMER allies to Regeneration.
On Enemy Turn, if that enemy has Barrier, apply +1 Offense Down, up to a maximum of 3 to that enemy.

In CRUCIBLE, enemy COSMIC PROTECTORS cannot gain Taunt.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 4 or more STARJAMMER allies:
 > Enemies cannot gain Speed Up.
 > This character and all STARJAMMER allies cannot gain Slow.

basic.name: Crypt Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or an Assist:
 > The damage of that attack is Piercing.
 > If this character has Revive Once, gain Counterattack and Speed Up.
 > Heal for 15% of this character's Max Health.

special.name: Calling the Obelisk
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage.

Gain 3 Counterattack and 3 Evade.

Clear 5 negative effects from self and all BRIMSTONE allies.
Apply Defense Up and Safeguard to self and all BRIMSTONE allies.
Heal self and all BRIMSTONE allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

ultimate.name: Wrath of Antiquity
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 600% damage.

Gain 3 Evade and Revive Once.

Apply Speed Up to self and all BRIMSTONE allies.
Heal self and all BRIMSTONE allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

passive.name: Mummy's Curse
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 2 Counterattack and Revive Once.

On any Turn, if this character has Revive Once and does not have Taunt:
 > Gain Taunt and Safeguard.
 > Heal self for 15% of this character's Max Health.

On Revive, clear 3 negative effects from self and all BRIMSTONE allies.
Revive with an additional +25% of this character's Max Health per BRIMSTONE ally.

In WAR, BRIMSTONE allies cannot gain Taunt.

In WAR, while this character has Revive Once:
 > If this character or any BRIMSTONE ally does not have Defense Up, that character gains +25% Damage Reduction and +25% Resistance.
 > This character cannot gain Bleed, Ability Block, Stun, Vulnerable, or Regeneration.

Gain +25% Drain. BRIMSTONE allies gain +25% Drain.
BRIMSTONE allies gain 7% Speed.

basic.name: Predator's Rage
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 240% Piercing + flip Regeneration + apply Bleed and Heal Block.
Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 120% Piercing + flip Regeneration + apply Bleed and Heal Block.

special.name: Tail Whip
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% Damage.
Do the following to the primary and adjacent targets:
 > Flip a random positive effect to Slow.
 > Flip another random positive effect to Heal Block.
 > Flip all other positive effects to negative effects.
 > If any target is HERO SPIDER-VERSE or is a SUPPORT, apply Ability Block to that target.

If this character does not have Trauma, transfer all negative effects from SINISTER SIX allies to self and then flip all negative effects on self to positive effects. If negative effects were flipped, heal self for 5% per negative effect flipped.

Gain Taunt.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Reptilian Assault
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Damage.
Clear Disrupted from all allies.

Copy and clear all positive effects from all enemies to self.
Spread all positive effects, excluding Stealth, Taunt, and Regeneration, from self to all SINISTER SIX allies.

Gain Taunt for 1 turn and Immunity for 2 turns.

passive.name: Cold Blooded
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply +3 Deflect to self and all SINISTER SIX allies.
 > Gain +5 Deathproof.
 > If there are any SPIDER-VERSE enemies, fill this character's Speed Bar by 40%.

When a Green Goblin (Classic) ally drops below 50% Max Health, heal this character for 30% of this character's Max Health and gain Taunt.

Gain +30% Block Chance.
Gain +50% Resistance.
SUPERIOR SIX allies gain +50% Resistance.

basic.name: Eldritch Bolt
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 260% Piercing.
If Sylvie is an ally, apply Defense Down + 2 Bleed.

50% chance to gain Evade.

In RAIDS:
 > Always gain Evade.
 > When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist and has Regeneration, gain +100% Damage on that Counterattack or Assist.

special.name: Mind Control
special.description:
Apply Defense Down for 2 turns to primary target.
On WAR DEFENSE, with 4 or more ASGARDIAN allies, apply Taunt to primary target.

Mind Control 2 enemies to attack the primary target. The controlled enemies gain +50% Damage for this attack. If Sylvie is an ally, the controlled enemies gain an additional +100% Damage for this attack.

ultimate.name: Mirror Image
ultimate.description:
Gain 2 Evade + Stealth for 2 turns.
Apply Stealth for 2 turns to all allies except Mirror Images.

Summon 2-3 Mirror Images. Mirror Images gain Evade.

In RAIDS:
 > BIFROST allies gain Speed Up and Offense Up for 2 turns.
 > Mirror Images gain Taunt.

passive.name: God of Mischief
passive.description:
On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 15%. Fill Speed Bar of MYSTIC CONTROLLER allies by 10%.

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

When this character or an ASGARDIAN ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply Stealth to that character.

Lower Resistance by 30% for all enemies.

Gain +20% Focus. MYSTIC CONTROLLER allies gain +20% Focus.
Gain +20% Resistance. MYSTIC CONTROLLER allies gain 20% Resistance.

In RAIDS:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar of a random Sylvie ally by 35% + generate 10 Ability Energy for a Sylvie ally.
 > When this character or an ASGARDIAN ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply 3 Evade + 3 Deathproof to that character.

basic.name: Eldritch Bolt
basic.description: Attack primary target for 260% Piercing. 50% chance to gain Evade.

basic.name: Bite 'n Blade
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + clear 1 positive effect.

Gain Regeneration + clear 1 negative effect from self.
Apply Regeneration + clear 1 negative effect from the most injured non-summoned ally.

In RAIDS: 
 > Apply Regeneration to all BIFROST allies.
 > When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist and has Regeneration, gain +100% Damage on that Counterattack or Assist.

special.name: What Goes Up...
special.description:
Attack primary target for 100% damage + 100% Drain. In RAIDS, attack primary target for 420% damage instead.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 420% damage.

Flip Heal Block on self and all allies.
Apply Regeneration to self and all allies.

In RAIDS:
 > Flip 2 additional negative effects to positive effects on self and all BIFROST allies.
 > Apply 2 additional Regeneration to self and all BIFROST allies.

This attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

ultimate.name: Insti-gator
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 550% damage + 100% Drain.

Redistribute total health evenly between self and all BIFROST allies.
Clear all negative effects from self and all BIFROST allies.

Apply 2 Regeneration to self and all allies.

In RAIDS: 
 > If the primary target is a COSMIC HERO, this attack deals an additional +100% damage.
 > Apply Safeguard and Immunity to self and all BIFROST allies.

passive.name: Teenage Trickster
passive.description:
On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

On self or BIFROST ally turn, transfer Defense Down from that character to the enemy with the lowest Resistance that does not have Defense Down.

Gain +100% Resistance.

In RAIDS:
 > On Spawn, apply 2 Regeneration and Immunity for 2 turns to self and all BIFROST allies.
 > On enemy COSMIC HERO Turn, apply Safeguard to self and all BIFROST allies.
 > If this character or any BIFROST ally has Regeneration, that character gains  +60% Damage and +100% chance to Counterattack.
 > BIFROST allies gain +100% Resistance.

basic.name: Blade Toss
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 240% damage + Bonus Attack for 160% damage.

If this character has any non-summoned X-Factor allies, Bonus Attack for 210% damage.

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.name: Fan of Knives
special.description: Attack all enemies for 260% damage + apply Bleed.

ultimate.name: Knife Assault
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 550% damage.
This attack has 50% Extra Crit Chance.

Damage is increased by an amount equal to this character's total Crit Chance.

This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Against All Odds
passive.description:
On self or ally Crit, fill Speed Bar by 20% for self and all X-Factor allies.
On Turn, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Gain 25% Crit Chance.
All allies gain 10% Crit Chance.
All X-Factor allies gain an additional 15% Crit Chance.

If this character has 3 or more non-summoned X-Factor allies, lower Armor by 5% for all enemies.

basic.name: Beat Up

Apply Assist Now to a random HERO ally. If that ally is a DEFENDER or a HEROES FOR HIRE they also gain Offense Up.

special.name: Bring it On!
special.description:
Gain Taunt for 2 turns + 2 Regeneration. Clear all negative effects from self. 
Apply Regeneration to all DEFENDER and HEROES FOR HIRE allies.

ultimate.name: Unbreakable
ultimate.description:
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self, all DEFENDER, and HEROES FOR HIRE allies.
Apply 2 Deflect and 2 Deathproof to self and all HEROES FOR HIRE allies.
Apply Defense Up to all additional allies.

Generate 1-3 Ability Energy for random allies.

passive.name: Power Man
passive.description:
At the start of any WAR, if this character is on DEFENSE and has 3 or more HEROES FOR HIRE allies, gain 2 Charged on Spawn of their initial match. This action occurs only once per WAR.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 80%.
 > On Spawn, if this character has 4 or more HEROES FOR HIRE allies, gain Taunt + 2 Deflect when a HEROES FOR HIRE ally drops below 60% Health.
 > At the end of any turn, if Charged, and below 50% Health, lose 1 Charged, clear all negative effects, heal for 100% of this character's Max Health, gain Offense Up for 2 turns, 2 Deflect, and Deathproof.
 > On Death, if Charged, Revive with 10% of this character's Max Health.
 > Gain +10% Damage, +10% Damage Reduction, and +175% Resistance per Charged.
 > HEROES FOR HIRE allies gain +50% Max Health.

Gain +10% Armor.
Gain +50% Max Health +25% Max Health for each DEFENDER or HEROES FOR HIRE ally.

basic.name: Psionic Smite
basic.description: Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip 3 random positive effects to negative effects.

special.name: Hellfire Vortex

If Cyclops, Phoenix, or Dark Phoenix is an enemy, Bonus Attack all enemies for 300% damage.

Apply Offense Down for 2 turns to all BRAWLER and all BLASTER enemies.
Apply Disrupted for 2 turns to all PROTECTOR and all CONTROLLER enemies.
Apply Ability Block for 1 turn to all PROTECTOR enemies and 2 turns to all SUPPORT enemies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Counterattacked.

Flip all positive effects on primary target.

On WAR DEFENSE:
> This attack targets the most injured non-summoned enemy. This attack can target Dark Phoenix.
> On Kill, generate 2 Ability Energy to a random Mister Sinister ally.

This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Goblin Queen

When an enemy attacks this character or any HELLFIRE CLUB, MARAUDER, or Cloned ally below 50% Health, Mind Control the ally with the highest Damage to attack that enemy. The controlled character gains +30% Damage for this attack.

Gain +50% chance to assist on non-attack abilities.
Gain +50% Resistance per enemy BRAWLER.
Lower Crit Chance by 50% for all MUTANT enemies.

On WAR DEFENSE, on Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 30% for a random Stryfe ally.

basic.name: Armed to the Teeth

Attack primary target for 350% damage + clear 2 positive effects + apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns.

If any enemy has 3 Wrath, do the following instead:
 > Attack all enemies for 350% damage, reduce the duration of Safeguard by 2, clear 2 positive effects, and apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns.
 > Gain Speed Up for 2 turns.
 > This can only trigger once per match.

special.name: Silver Spoils

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 450% damage + flip all positive effects into negative effects.

Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health and gain Speed Up.

For enemies with Wrath:

 > Deal 10% of this character's Max Health as damage.

Clear Barrier on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing + prolong the duration of all negative effects by 1, except for Ability Block, Bleed, and Stun.

Gain Speed Up for 2 turns and Safeguard for  for 2 turns.

For enemies with Wrath, apply 3 Bleed and Defense Down before the attack.

This attack ignores Defense Up and enemies killed by this attack cannot be Revived.

passive.name: Trophy Tyrant

On Spawn, gain Safeguard and Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health.

On Turn, while this character has 2 or more enemies, gain +30% Drain, up to a maximum of +90% Drain and +10% Speed, up to a maximum of +30% Speed.

When this character is attacked:

 > If no enemies have Wrath, apply Wrath to the attacking enemy.

This character cannot gain Defense Up or Minor Defense Up.
While this character is above 50% Health:
 > This character is immune to all negative effects, except Stun.
 > This character is immune to Darkness.
 > Gain +50% Focus, +50% Resistance, and +50% Damage Reduction, up to a maxmimum of +80% Damage Reduction.

basic.name: Soulsword Strike
basic.description: Attack primary and adjacent targets for 230% Piercing + clear 2 random positive effects.

Heal self and all NEW MUTANT allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + flip Immunity and Regeneration.

Reduce the Speed Bar of primary target by 30%.

Apply +10 Charged, up to a maximum of 20, to self and all CHARGEABLE UNCANNY X-MEN allies.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Limbo Strike

Clear Disrupted and Ability Block from self and all X-MEN allies.

Attack primary target for 450% damage + Drain 25%.

passive.name: Darkchild

When an enemy attacks an X-MEN ally, gain +2 Charged, up to a maximum of 20. If that ally is Colossus or Kitty Pryde, gain +3 Charged, up to a maximum of 20, instead.

At the end of any turn, if this character has 20 or more Charged, attack the enemy with the highest Damage for 500% damage, then lose all Charged.

On Crit by self or a NEW MUTANT ally, clear Heal Block from the most injured NEW MUTANT ally + heal that character for 5% of this character's Max Health.

The first time this character or a NEW MUTANT ally drops below 40% Health, heal that ally for 30% of this character's Max Health + reduce the duration of Disrupted by 2 on that character + apply 2 Deathproof and 2 Evade.
If that character drops below 40% Health again, heal that character for 15% + apply 1 Deathproof and 1 Evade instead.

Gain +20% Drain. X-MEN allies gain +20% Drain.

basic.name: Magnetic Force

Attack primary target for 220% damage + 20% Piercing. Chain to 2 additional targets for 220% damage + 20% Piercing.

In RAIDS. if this character has 3 or more DEATH SEED allies, prolong all negative effects by 1 on each target.

special.name: Polarized Beam

Attack primary target for 250% damage + 20% Piercing + clear all positive effects + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and Slow for 2 turns.
In RAIDS, apply Ability Block for 2 turns to the primary target.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

Gain +60% Resistance. BROTHERHOOD and DEATH SEED allies gain +60% Resistance.
Gain +60% Focus. BROTHERHOOD and DEATH SEED allies gain +60% Focus.
Gain +30% Max Health. BROTHERHOOD and DEATH SEED allies gain +30% Max Health.

When forced to attack an ally this character does less damage and does not apply negative effects to MUTANT allies.

On enemy Turn end, Barrier self for 10% of this character's Max Health.

While this character is above 50% Health, this character cannot gain Stun.

When this character drops below 50% Health, if this character has Taunt:

Apply 2 Counter to self and all WAKANDAN allies.
Gain +2 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all WAKANDAN allies.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 2 or more WAKANDAN allies, Lower Armor by 30% for all enemies with Vulnerable.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to ABSOLUTE A-FORCE characters.

If Black Bolt is an ally or if this character has 3 or more ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies, this attack gains +60% Crit Damage.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be blocked or dodged.

Enemies cannot Spawn with Evade or Deathproof.

 > Enemies cannot Spawn with Defense Up or Speed Up.
 > PROTECTOR and BLASTER enemies cannot Spawn with Charged.
 > PROTECTOR enemies cannot Spawn with Safeguard.

 > Lower Resistance for all enemies by 80%.

If any attack is a Crit, gain 3 Regeneration for 2 turns.

Gain +1 Immunity, up to a maximum of 3.

For this character and all Ghost Rider, Ghost Rider (Robbie), and Cosmic Ghost Rider allies:

If this character has any HERO allies, apply Taunt for 2 turns to all HERO allies. If this character does not have any HERO allies, apply Taunt for 2 turns to the VILLAIN ally with the highest Health.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.

Mind Control the enemy with the highest Damage to attack the primary target. The controlled character gains +50% Damage for this attack.

Apply Offense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.

For all MYTHIC enemies:
 > Apply Vulnerable.

Attack all enemies for 750% damage + apply Trauma for 2 turns. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

Clear all Battlefield Effects on allied side and apply the Battlefield Effect, Mark of Mephisto, to allied side.

Mark of Mephisto:

 > Allies cannot have their Speed Bar reduced.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

This character cannot be revived. While this character is alive, allies and enemies cannot be revived.

On Spawn, if this character is not a Clone and does not have 2 or more Exhausted:

 > If this character has any MYTHIC enemies, gain Charged.

The first time this character gains Stun, clear Stun and heal self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.
When this character or an ally drops below 20% Max Health, apply Stealth and 1 Deathproof to that character.

On any non-summoned Death, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 10.
For each Charged, gain +10% Armor, Damage, Focus, and Resistance.
Gain +20% Max Barrier.
Gain +50% Max Health. Allies gain +20% Max Health.
Enemies cannot gain Stealth.
Enemies with Exposed cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).

basic.name: Assault Rifle

On WAR DEFENSE, when an enemy attacks this character or an adjacent ally, heal most injured MERCENARY ally for 1,500 Health + 10% of this character's Max Health.

>  On Enemy Turn, apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 4, to self and adjacent allies.
>  Gain +10% Block Chance per MERCENARY ally.

basic.name: Bio-Weapon

 Apply Regeneration to the most injured non-summoned ally.

On enemy Death, heal the most injured non-summoned ally for 15% of this character's Max Health. If that ally is KREE, also apply a random positive effect.
