special.name: Stopping Power
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Stun and Heal Block.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 300% damage + apply Ability Block and Heal Block.

On WAR DEFENSE:
> This attack targets the enemy with the highest damage instead of the primary target and will instead Chain to an enemy with the most Speed Bar, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.
> Clear all Deathproof on all enemy summons + attack them for 500% damage.  This part of the attack cannot be dodged.
> Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this attack.

If Colleen Wing is an ally, this attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Armed Response
ultimate.description:
Clear all positive effects on the primary target and then attack for 500% damage + apply Ability Block and Disrupted.

On WAR DEFENSE:
> This attack targets the enemy with the highest health instead of the primary target, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.
> Gain +5,000% Extra Focus for this attack.

If Colleen Wing is an ally, this attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Crew Captain
passive.description:
At the start of any WAR, if this character is on DEFENSE and has 3 or more HEROES FOR HIRE allies, gain 2 Charged on Spawn of their initial match. This action occurs only once per WAR.

At the end of any turn, if Charged and below 50% Health, lose 1 Charged, clear all negative effects, heal for 100% of this character's Max Health, gain Offense Up for 2 turns, 2 Deflect, and Deathproof.
On Death, if Charged, Revive at 100% of this character's Max Health.
On enemy Death, apply Speed Up to 2 random HEROES FOR HIRE allies or self that do not have Speed Up.

Gain +5% Max Health.
On WAR DEFENSE, gain +10% Damage, +10% Damage Reduction, and +175% Resistance per Charged.
On WAR DEFENSE, gain +70% Focus.

On WAR DEFENSE, On Spawn:
 > Fill Speed Bar by 20% for self and all HEROES FOR HIRE allies.
 > Grant 10 Ability Energy to self and all HEROES FOR HIRE allies.
 > Gain Speed Up for 2 turns.

basic.name: Pecking Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Heal self and all NEW AVENGER allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.
Heal all other allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Fighting Flight
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage. Rebound chain to 4 adjacent targets for 280% damage.

Clear Bleed from self and all NEW AVENGER allies.
Clear 3 random negative effects from self, all NEW AVENGER, and all S.H.I.E.L.D. allies.
Apply +1 Stealth, up to a maximum of 3, to all AVENGER and S.H.I.E.L.D. allies below 50% Max Health.

Heal self and all NEW AVENGER allies for 15% of this character's Max Health. Heal all other allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for 4 random NEW AVENGER allies or self that were not at full energy on start of the current turn.

This attack cannot be blocked.

In WAR:
 > This attack cannot be counterattacked.
 > Apply Immunity to this character and all NEW AVENGER allies.

ultimate.name: All-Out Takedown
ultimate.description:
Flip 2 random negative effects to positive effects on all S.H.I.E.L.D. allies.
Flip all negative effects to positive effects on self and all NEW AVENGER allies.

Attack all enemies for 350% damage + flip Taunt on each enemy.

Spread all positive effects on self to all NEW AVENGER and S.H.I.E.L.D. allies, excluding Taunt, Stealth, and Regeneration.
Heal self and all NEW AVENGER allies for 15% of this character's Max Health. Heal all other allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.

Summon 1 S.H.I.E.L.D. Medic. Apply Defense Up and Deathproof to summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. Medic.

Fill Speed Bar for a random Ronin ally by 20%.

In WAR:
 > Reduce Speed Bar for all enemies by 7% + 7% per NEW AVENGER ally.
 > Apply Stealth to summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. Medic.
 > Gain +2,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
 > This attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

passive.name: Tactician
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

When this character, a non-summoned NEW AVENGER, or a non-summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. ally drops below 50% Health, summon 1 S.H.I.E.L.D. Assault. Apply Defense Up and Deathproof  to summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. Assault. If that ally is a NEW AVENGER, apply +1 Stealth, up to a maximum of 2, to that ally.

On End of any Turn, if this character or a NEW AVENGER ally has Stealth and Health greater or equal to 75%, clear Stealth on that character and fill that character's Speed Bar by 10% + 10% for each non-summoned ally.

Gain +15% Max Health. NEW AVENGER allies gain +15% Max Health.

In WAR:
 > Apply Taunt to summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. Assault.
 > Summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. Assault and S.H.I.E.L.D. Medic allies gain +40% Max Health.
 > Summoned S.H.I.E.L.D. Assault and S.H.I.E.L.D. Medic allies gain +30% Damage.

basic.name: Psionic Assault
basic.description:
If there is more than 1 non-summoned enemy, Mind Control 1 non-summoned enemy to attack the primary target. The controlled character gains +40% Damage for this attack.

Attack primary target for 280% damage + 5% of the target's Max Health.

Apply Assist Now to 1 random Phyla-Vell ally and 1 random ASTRAL ally.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to ASTRAL characters.

special.name: Meditation Wave
special.description:
Flip Immunity on primary target.

Clear all positive effects from all enemies.
Attack primary target for 320% damage + 5% of the target's Max Health + apply Slow for 2 turns + reduce Speed Bar by 50%.

Heal all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health + apply Defense Up + Deflect.
Apply Immunity to self and all INFINITY WATCH and ASTRAL allies.

Gain +1,000% Focus for this attack.

ultimate.name: Telepathic Burst
ultimate.description:
Heal all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Apply Defense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.

In BATTLEWORLD and WAR, apply Disrupted for 2 turns to all enemies.
Attack all enemies for 400% damage.

passive.name: Psychic Discipline
passive.description:
When this character, an INFINITY WATCH ally or an ASTRAL ally drops below 50% Health, apply +1 Evade, +1 Defense Up and +1 Deflect to that character.

In BATTLEWORLD and WAR, when an enemy attacks this character or an ASTRAL ally, Barrier self and all allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.

Gain +30% Drain. ASTRAL allies gain +30% Drain.

basic.name: Water Gun
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage.

In RAIDS or WAR, reduce Speed Bar of primary and adjacent targets by 3% + 3% per CHAMPION or ABSOLUTE A-FORCE ally.

This attack cannot be Counterattacked.

special.name: Tail Slap
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns, Heal Block for 2 turns, and Disrupted for 2 turns.

Flip 3 random negative effects to positive effects + apply Stealth to the most injured INHUMAN ally.

If Charged, lose 1 Charged.

This attack cannot be Counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Devilsaur Rampage
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier from all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 400% damage + flip all positive effects to negative effects + apply Slow for 2 turns. In RAIDS, apply Trauma for 2 turns and prolong the duration of all negative effects by 1, up to a maximum of 3.

If any target has Vulnerable, apply 2 Bleed to that target.

If Charged, lose 1 Charged.

This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be Counterattacked, and, in RAIDS, cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Supergenius Girl
passive.description:
In RAIDS, if this character has 3 CHAMPION allies:
 > On Spawn, gain 3 Charged.
 > When this character loses all Charged, reduce Speed Bar of all enemies by 50%, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 3 on all enemies, and apply Stun to the 3 enemies with the highest Damage.

On self or CHAMPION ally turn, apply Deathproof to that character, and, in RAIDS, flip 1 random negative effect to Evade.

In RAIDS or WAR, if this character has 3 CHAMPION or 3 ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies, enemies cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, enemies, or allies.

basic.name: Lunar Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage.

Gain a random positive effect for 2 turns from this list:
Counter
Offense Up
Speed Up

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to SHADOWLAND and NIGHTSTALKER characters.

special.name: Night Guardian
special.description:
Attack primary target for 360% damage + Rebound Chain to 6-7 adjacent targets for 290% damage.

Gain +100% Crit Chance on any target that has a negative effect.

This attack cannot be Blocked.

In RAIDS, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

ultimate.name: Death From Above
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 380%-500% damage + apply Heal Block.
50% chance to apply up to 3 additional negative effects for 2 turns to each enemy from this list:
Bleed, Blind, Defense Down, Disrupted, Offense Down, Slow.
Gain +100%-200% Focus for this attack.

If this character has 3 or more NIGHTSTALKER allies:
 > Clear all positive effects on each enemy.
 > This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Fist of Khonshu
passive.description:
This character cannot Block.
On any character's turn, if this character has Deflect or Minor Deflect, flip them to Offense Up + fill Speed Bar by 20%.

Gain +15% Damage Reduction.
Gain +40% Resistance.
Gain +30% Max Health. SHADOWLAND allies gain +30% Max Health.
Gain +50% Damage.

basic.name: Spiteful Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.
If the target is Vulnerable, gain 1 Ability Energy.

special.name: Dark Whispers
special.description:
Reduce Speed Bar of the enemy with the highest Damage, excluding the primary target, by 20% +  Mind Control that enemy to attack the primary target.

Attack primary target for 400% damage + apply Defense Down and Stun.

In CRUCIBLE, apply Disrupted and Trauma to the primary target.

ultimate.name: Phasing Punishment
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 250% damage + apply +2 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Apply Stun to the primary target.
 > Reduce Speed Bar for primary and adjacent targets by 20%.

passive.name: Meteorite
passive.description:
On Turn:
 > If this character has at least 1 ally, gain +1 Evade, up to a maximum of 3.
 > If this character has 1 or more MASTERS OF EVIL allies, heal for 10% of this character's Max Health.
 > If this character has 2 or more MASTERS OF EVIL allies, Barrier self for 10% of this character's Max Health.
 > If this character has 3 or more MASTERS OF EVIL allies, clear 1 positive effect from the enemy with the lowest Resistance.
 > If this character has 4 or more MASTERS OF EVIL allies, transfer 1 negative effect, excluding Ability Block and Stun, from self to the enemy with the lowest Resistance.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Gain +50% Focus. MASTERS OF EVIL allies gain +50% Focus.
 > On OFFENSE, gain an additional +100% Focus.
 > On OFFENSE, MASTERS OF EVIL allies gain an additional +100% Focus.

basic.name: Sanguine Slash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 200% damage.
If primary target has Bleed, steal 10% Health from primary target and redistribute to self. This bypasses Heal Block.

On WAR OFFENSE, apply 2 Bleed.

special.name: Vampiric Spread
special.description: Attack primary and adjacent targets for 250% damage + apply 3 Bleed to primary and secondary targets.

ultimate.name: Nocturnal Frenzy
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 450% damage + flip Defense Up, Deflect, and Minor Deflect. Chain to 5 adjacent targets for 310% damage + flip Defense Up and Deflect.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more DARK HUNTER allies, apply Trauma, Heal Block, and Disrupted for 2 turns to HERO CITY primary target + apply Trauma and Heal Block for 2 turns to all HERO CITY secondary targets.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

On WAR OFFENSE, this attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

passive.name: The Living Vampire
passive.description:
Gain +30% Piercing.
Gain +20% Drain. DARK HUNTER allies gain 20% Drain.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, if this character has 3 or more DARK HUNTER allies, apply Blind to the 5 highest Damage CITY HERO enemies.
 > If this character as 4 or more CITY HERO enemies, gain +300% Focus.
 > Gain +30% Damage.
 > DARK HUNTER allies gain +30% Damage.

basic.name: Soul Siphon
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage + copy and clear 2 positive effects, excluding Taunt.
On Crit, instead, copy and clear all positive effects, excluding Taunt.

Steal 10% Health from the primary target and redistribute to self.

special.name: Time Warp
special.description:
Reduce Speed Bar for self, all allies, and all enemies by 100%.
Clear all positive effects from all enemies.
Clear all negative effects from self.
Heal self for 100% of this character's Max Health.
Deal 10% of this character's Max Health, as damage, to all enemies.
Apply Speed Up for 2 turns and Immunity for 1 turn to self, an Apocalypse ally, all DARKHOLD allies, and all HORSEMAN allies.

This attack is unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Reality Break
ultimate.description:
Clear Immunity from the primary target.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 325% Piercing.
This attack has 50% Extra Crit Chance.

Apply Disrupted and Slow to the primary target.
Spread all negative effects from the primary target to all adjacent targets. This will not spread Stun or Ability Block.

Apply Trauma and Ability Block to all CONTROLLER enemies.
Flip 2 positive effects into negative effects on all non-CONTROLLER enemies.

Reduce Speed Bar of all enemies that do not have any negative effects by 30%.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Fae Queen
passive.description:
On Spawn:
> Barrier self and all DARKHOLD allies for 20% of this character's Max Health
> Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all DARKHOLD allies
> Fill Speed Bar by 5% per MYSTIC enemy, up to a max of 20%.

On enemy Turn, fill Speed Bar by 10% for self and all DARKHOLD allies.

Lower the Assist Chance for all enemies by 25% per DARKHOLD ally, up to a max of 100%.

Gain +50% Max Health. DARKHOLD allies gain +50% Max Health. Apocalypse and all HORSEMAN allies gain +50% Max Health.
Gain +100% Resistance. DARKHOLD allies gain +100% Resistance. Apocalypse and all HORSEMAN allies gain +100% Resistance.

In ARENA, Gain +30% Max Barrier. In ARENA, DARKHOLD allies gain +30% Max Barrier.

basic.name: Tensile Strength
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Rebound Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 300% damage.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 2 or more ILLUMINATI allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Entangle
special.description: Attack primary target for 400% damage + apply Stun.

ultimate.name: Orbital Assault
ultimate.description:
Clear Defense Up on primary target and most injured enemy. Attack both targets for 450% damage.

If this character has any ILLUMINATI allies, instead, clear Defense Up on all enemies then attack all enemies for 450% damage.

If this character has 2 or more ILLUMINATI allies, this attack does 450% Piercing, instead.

This attack gains +100,000 Extra Focus and cannot be Blocked.
In CRUCIBLE, this attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: For Science!
passive.description:
On this character's and each FANTASTIC FOUR, ILLUMINATI, or She-Hulk ally's turn, apply Assist Now to self, Namor, She-Hulk, or a random FANTASTIC FOUR or ILLUMINATI ally. If Assist Now is applied, clear Blind on that ally.

On Turn, clear 1 random positive effect from 3 random enemies that have a positive effect.

Gain +60% Focus for self, FANTASTIC FOUR, ILLUMINATI, Namor, and She-Hulk allies.
Gain +60% Resistance for self, ILLUMINATI, Namor, and She-Hulk allies.

basic.name: Elastic Attack
basic.description: Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply Offense Down.

special.name: Calculated Breakthrough
special.description:
Apply Stun to the primary target.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + 10% of each target's Max Health.

Gain Taunt for 2 turns.

If this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR allies, reduce the duration of all negative effects on this character and each ally by 2. (Any negative effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Trauma)

Apply 2 Deathproof and Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all allies.

This attack cannot be dodged and if this character has 2 or more FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) allies, this attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Reinventing the Wheel
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier from all enemies.
Attack all enemies for 320% damage + 5% of each target's Max Health.

Barrier self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Gain Taunt for 2 turns + Safeguard for 2 turns.
Gain Charged.

passive.name: Smartest Man Alive
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain 4 Deathproof, Taunt for 2 turns, and Safeguard for 2 turns.
 > Barrier self and all allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

When a FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) or FANTASTIC FOUR ally uses their Special or Ultimate abilities, Barrier self and all allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.

On Turn, if this character has Charged, lose 1 Charged.
While this character has Charged, this character and all allies gain +100% Block Chance and gain +10% Block Amount.

Gain +20% Block Chance per FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) ally.
Gain +5% Block Amount per FANTASTIC FOUR (MCU) ally.

basic.name: Negative Strike
basic.description:
Flip 2 positive effects to negative effects on primary target.
Attack primary target for 300% damage. Gain +20% Damage per Summoned ally.

special.name: Demonic Assistance
special.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage + apply Defense Down and Ability Block.
On WAR OFFENSE, apply Trauma to the primary target.

Mind Control the primary target to attack the lowest speed, non-summoned enemy 2 times. The controlled character gains +25% Damage for each attack.
Spread all negative effects from the primary target to the lowest speed, non-summoned enemy.
This will not spread Stun.

ultimate.name: Wave of Negativity
ultimate.description:
On WAR OFFENSE, clear Revive Once and 1 Charged from the primary target.
Attack all enemies for 350% damage + flip all positive effects to negative effects.

This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Inner Demons
passive.description:
On Spawn, summon an Inner Demon (Cyclops) and gain Defense Up for 5 turns.
On Turn, summon 1 Inner Demon in the following order: Inner Demon (Dragon), Inner Demon (Demon), Inner Demon (Cyclops).

On WAR OFFENSE, on Death of a summoned ally, clear 3 random negative effects from all non-summoned UNDERWORLD allies with a negative effect.

Gain +50% Max Health.
Gain +50% Focus.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > UNDERWORLD  allies gain +50% Max Health.
 > UNDERWORLD allies gain +50% Focus.

basic.name: Psionic Beam
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + 50% damage per non-Cloned MARAUDERS ally.

Gain an assist from a random Cloned ally.
Gain an assist from a random MARAUDERS ally.

special.name: Gene Therapy
special.description:
Clear Heal Block from the 2 most injured allies. Gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Transfer all positive effects, excluding Taunt and Stealth, from an ally Mystique to this character. Spread all positive effects from this character to all MUTANT or Cloned allies.

Heal all allies for 2,000 Health + 20% of this character's Max Health.
Heal all Clones for 1,500 Health + 10% of this character's Max Health.

ultimate.name: Clone
ultimate.description:
Summon a Clone of the primary target. This Clone scales with Mister Sinister's stats instead of the primary target.
Clone gains Defense Up for 2 turns.

On WAR DEFENSE:
> Generate 2 Ability Energy for all MARAUDERS and Cloned allies.
> This ability targets the non-summoned enemy with the highest Damage, ignoring Taunt and Stealth. This ability can target Dark Phoenix.

passive.name: Mutant Geneticist
passive.description:
On Spawn, generate 3 Ability Energy for this character if non-Cloned.

On turn, Heal 15% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per MARAUDERS or Emma Frost ally. Apply Regeneration to the 2 most injured MUTANT allies. Apply Regeneration to an ally Stryfe.

On Emma Frost or MARAUDERS ally's turn, if this character's Health is greater than 50%, redistribute 10% Health from this character to that ally.

Gain +50% Focus. MARAUDERS allies gain +50% Focus.
Gain +20% Max Health. Emma Frost and MARAUDERS allies gain +20% Max Health.

On WAR DEFENSE, Emma Frost and MARAUDERS allies gain an additional +30% Max Health.

basic.name: Big Bash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 200% damage.

Gain 2 Deflect.

In RAIDS, generate 1 Ultimate Ability Energy for a random CHAMPION ally or self that was not at full energy.

special.name: Rejuvenate
special.description:
Heal self for 50% of this character's Max Health.
If no other ally has Taunt, gain Taunt.

Apply Counter to all SUPPORT and CONTROLLER allies.

In RAIDS:
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns and 2 Deathproof to self and all CHAMPION allies.
 > Prolong the duration of all positive effects, excluding Taunt, on self and all CHAMPION allies by 1.

ultimate.name: Embiggen
ultimate.description:
Clear barrier from all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 250% damage + 60% chance to generate 1 Ability Energy per target hit. Energy is granted to random HERO allies.

Apply Stun to primary target.

passive.name: Fangirl
passive.description:
Gain Assist Now on each CHAMPION, YOUNG AVENGER, or HERO BRAWLER ally's turn.
On Turn, apply Assist Now to a random CHAMPION, YOUNG AVENGER, or HERO BRAWLER ally.

When a HERO ally drops below 50% Health, gain Taunt for 2 turns.
When this character drops below 50% Health, clear Taunt.

In RAIDS, On Spawn:
 > Apply Immunity to self and all CHAMPION allies.
 > Generate 2 Ability Energy for self and all CHAMPION allies.

basic.name: Classic Beatdown
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Apply Defense Up and Regeneration to the most injured ABSOLUTE A-FORCE ally that doesn't have Defense Up.

In WAR, heal self and all ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.

If this character has 2 or fewer Charged, gain +3 Charged, up to a maximum of 3.

special.name: Flying Kree
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage + 20% Drain.

Heal self and all A-FORCE allies for 30% of this character's Max Health + apply 2 Evade and 2 Regeneration.

In WAR, this attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

ultimate.name: Close the Distance

Attack primary target for 550% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.
This damage is increased by 50% per Charged on this character.

Clear all negative effects from self and all allies.
Heal self and all ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies for 40% of this character's Max Health + apply 2 Regeneration for 1 turn, Defense Up for 2 turns, Immunity for 1 turn, and Safeguard for 1 turn.

In WAR, this attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Air Superiority

When this character is attacked, if this character has Charged, and does not have 2 or more Exhausted:
 > Heal self and all ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies for 10% of this character's Max Health + flip 2 Bleed + clear 2 negative effects.
 > Lose 1 Charged.

On any Turn and Turn End, if this character has Charged, gain Taunt.
While this character has Charged, this character cannot gain Trauma, Heal Block, Disrupted, Defense Down, Slow, or Stun.

When this character loses Charged:
 > Clear Taunt from this character.
 > Clear 3 negative effects from self and all ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies + apply Offense Up, Speed Up, and 2 Counter.

In WAR:
 > On Spawn, gain +5 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > When this character or a ABSOLUTE A-FORCE ally drops below 40% Health, clear Disrupted from that character + apply Defense Up, 2 Evade, 2 Deathproof, and Safeguard.
 > On Enemy Death, apply Safeguard and Immunity to self and all ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies.
 > While this character has Charged, gain +25% Damage Reduction and +1,000% Resistance.

basic.name: One-Two Punch

Attack primary target for 320% damage.
This attack gains +10% damage per Dupe ally.

Summon 2 Dupes. Remove all negative effects from all Dupe allies. Apply Taunt + Deathproof to all Dupe allies.

If Polaris is an ally, clear all negative effects from self.

Gain Immunity for 1 turn.

ultimate.name: One Man Army

Apply Offense Up for 2 turns and 2 Counter to all X-Factor and Dupe allies.
Fill Speed Bar by 30% for all Dupe allies.

When an enemy attacks Multiple Man, summon 1 Dupe.
On death of an ally Dupe, Heal for 5% of this character's Max Health.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Summon an additional Dupe when Multiple Man is attacked.
 > On Spawn, summon 2 Dupes.
 > Gain +30% Resistance
 > Non-summoned X-Factor allies gain +30% Resistance.

basic.name: All for One
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + copy and clear 1 positive effect, excluding Regeneration.
Spread all positive effects, excluding Taunt and Regeneration, to Multiple Man.

Gain +75% Extra Focus for this attack.

This attack cannot Crit.

On Spawn, apply Counter to the Multiple Man that summoned this Dupe.
Gain +25% Focus.

basic.name: The Ol' One-Two
basic.description:
Clear 3 positive effects from primary target.
Attack primary target for 250% damage.

In WAR, gain 2 Evade.
Gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

special.name: Master of Illusion
special.description:
Apply Blind to the primary target.
If this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, apply Blind to all enemies instead.
Apply Ability Block for 2 turns to the primary target.
Apply Ability Block to 1 random adjacent enemy.

Gain an assist from a random SINISTER SIX ally.
Gain an assist from a random ally.

ultimate.name: Smoke and Mirrors

Attack all enemies for 350% damage.

If this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, flip all positive effects on all enemies.

Apply Heal Block for 2 turns and Disrupted for 2 turns to all enemies.

Summon a Mirror Image for each Charged on this character, up to a maximum of 5 Mirror Images, then lose all Charged.

In WAR, this attack gains +100,000% Extra Focus.

passive.name: Grand Masquerade
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply 2 Deflect to self and all SINISTER SIX allies.
 > Gain Immunity.
 > In WAR, gain +2 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > Summon 3 Mirror Images.

If this character has 2, or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, enemies cannot gain Immunity.

On Death, summon 2 Mirror Images with 2 Deathproof. One of the Mirror Images has their Special Ability.
In WAR, summon an additional Mirror Image with 2 Deathproof.

On Mirror Image Death, gain Stealth.

Gain +20% Focus per non-summoned SPIDER-VERSE ally.
SPIDER-VERSE allies gain +20% Focus.
SPIDER-VERSE allies gain +20% Max Health.

basic.name: The Ol' One-Two
basic.description:
Clear 3 positive effects.
Attack primary target for 250% damage.

50% chance to generate 1 Ability Energy for Mysterio.

special.description:
If Mysterio is an ally and dead, Revive him with 100% base Health.

Attack self for 10,000% damage.

basic.name: Mimic Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 245% damage + Bonus Attack 1-2 times for 205% damage + copy 2 positive effects, except Taunt, and apply it to self.

If Magneto or Madelyne Pryor is an ally, copy all positive effects, except Taunt.

On WAR DEFENSE, when this character performs a Counterattack or Assist, apply 1 Bleed.

special.name: Infiltrate
special.description:
Attack primary target for 255% damage. Attack 3 additional targets that do not have Stealth for 185% damage.

Attack all additional targets that do have Stealth for 185% damage + clear Stealth from each target.

If no enemies had Stealth, gain Stealth.
This ability does not remove Stealth from the primary target.
If Magneto or Madelyne Pryor are an ally, this attack is Unavoidable.
If Mister Sinister is an ally, flip 2 positive effects to negative effects on each target.

ultimate.name: Shapeshifter
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 165% damage.

Trick 1 random enemy to attack the primary target. The tricked enemy gains +200% Damage for this attack.

Always gain  Evade.

On WAR DEFENSE:
>This attack is Unavoidable.
> This attack targets a non-summoned enemy with lowest Speed instead of the primary target, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.
> Apply Taunt to the primary target.
> If this character has 3 or more MARAUDER allies, apply Stun to that target

passive.name: Subterfuge
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Evade. Gain 1,000% Resistance against Bleed.

On a non-Cloned Magneto's or Mister Sinister's turn, prolong all positive effects on self and Magneto by a duration of 1, up to a maximum of 3.

On WAR DEFENSE, if Mister Sinister is an ally, assist on non-attack abilities.

basic.name: Ring Blade Assault
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + clear 2 positive effects.
Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 250% damage + clear 2 positive effects. Dodge breaks this Chain.

If any attack Crits, gain +1 Stealth, up to a maximum of 5.

special.name: Twin Rings
special.description:
Clear all negative effects on self.

Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply +1 Disrupted.

Gain +2 Stealth, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack cannot be blocked.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy for all adjacent WAR DOG allies.
 > Clear Taunt and Immunity on primary target before the attack.
 > Apply +2 Disrupted instead.
 > This attack gains +500% Extra Focus.

ultimate.name: From the Shadows
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
On WAR OFFENSE, apply Ability Block for 2 turns to the primary target. This action gains +500% Extra Focus.

Rebound Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 300% damage.

If this character has Stealth:
 > Rebound Chain to +1 adjacent target per Stealth on this character.
 > Each attack deals Piercing instead.
 > Lose all Stealth.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Wakandan Spy
passive.description:
On Defense Up, gain +1 Stealth, up to a maximum of 5.

While Charged, on any enemy or WAR DOG ally's turn, attack the most injured enemy for 100% Piercing, ignoring Stealth, then lose 1 Charged. On WAR OFFENSE, attack for 350% Piercing instead.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, gain 1 Charged + 1 Charged per WAR DOG ally, up to a maximum of 10.
 > When a WAR DOG ally drops below 50% Health, if this character has at least 2 Stealth, transfer 1 Stealth from this character to the most injured WAR DOG ally.

Gain +30% Damage.
On WAR OFFENSE, WAR DOG allies gain +30% Damage.
Gain +50% Focus.
On WAR OFFENSE, WAR DOG allies gain +50% Focus.

basic.name: Neptune's Trident
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage + 50% Piercing + apply Heal Block for 2 turns and Bleed for 1 turn.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or an Assist, this attack always Crits + apply an additional 2 Bleed.

special.name: Tidal Wave
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage.

Bonus Attack 2 times to primary and adjacent targets for 100% Piercing.

In CRUCIBLE, primary and secondary attacks apply Bleed to primary and adjacent targets.

ultimate.name: Giganto
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% damage + flip all positive effects on each target.

Reduce Speed Bar of all enemies that have Vulnerable by 50%. On WAR OFFENSE, reduce Speed Bar of all enemies by 50% instead.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be counterattacked. This attack always Crits.

passive.name: Imperius Rex
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Offense Up for 2 turns + 2 Deflect to self, all FANTASTIC FOUR allies, and all CABAL allies.

On self or VILLAIN ally Crit, Barrier self and all VILLAIN allies for 5% of this character's Max Health + apply Speed Up to self and all CABAL allies.

Gain +30% Damage.
Gain +30% Armor.
CABAL allies gain +30% Damage.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 2 or more CABAL allies, enemies cannot gain Deathproof.

basic.name: Relentless Pursuit
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + 10% of target's Max Health.
Gain Speed Up.

special.name: Challenging Foe
special.description: Attack primary target for 310% damage + gain 2 Counter. Apply 2 Counter to all INFINITY WATCH allies.

ultimate.name: Mayhem
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Heal Block.
Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 270% damage + apply Heal Block. If this character has 3 or more INFINITY WATCH allies, chain to 10 adjacent targets.
Gain 2 Evade. Apply Evade to all INFINITY WATCH allies.

Counterattack breaks this Chain. If this character has 3 or more INFINITY WATCH allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.
Attacks always Crit if the target is Summoned or Cloned.

passive.name: Exploit Weakness
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Speed Up.
If Health is full at the start of a match, Revive once with 10% of this character's Max Health + 15% for each INFINITY WATCH ally. On Revive, gain Deathproof.

On Turn, apply Assist Now + Speed Up to 1 random Gamora ally.

Gain +20% Assist Chance + 20% per INFINITY WATCH ally.

basic.name: Energy Blasts
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage + apply Bleed.

On WAR OFFENSE, if Phantom Rider is an ally, this attack does an additional 50% Damage.

special.name: Particle Charge
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + clear all positive effects from each target.

On WAR OFFENSE, if Phantom Rider is an ally, this attack does an additional 50% Damage.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Warhead
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 360% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > If Phantom Rider is an ally, this attack does an additional 50% Damage.
 > Clear Defense Up on all enemies.
 > If this character has 3 or more SECRET WARRIOR allies, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 on all enemies. Gain +500% Extra Focus for this action.
 > If this character has 3 or more SECRET WARRIOR allies, clear 2 random negative effects on self and  all SECRET WARRIOR allies.

passive.name: Ticking Timebomb
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Barrier self and SECRET WARRIOR allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, fill this character's Speed Bar by 10% + 5% per X-FORCE or SECRET WARRIOR ally.

On enemy Turn, Barrier self for 10% of this character's Max Health + fill Speed Bar by 10%.

On successful dodge by a SECRET WARRIOR ally, Barrier that ally for 10% of this character's Max Health.

When a Phantom Rider ally drops below 40% Health, Barrier self for 15% of this character's Max Health + gain Taunt for 2 turns.

If this character has Barrier, gain +30% Armor.

basic.name: Exo-Punch
basic.description: Attack primary and adjacent targets for 240% damage + Steal 5% Health from each target and redistribute to self and all DEATH SEED allies. This bypasses Heal Block.

special.name: Bio-Energy Eruption
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 250% damage + Steal 10% Health from each target and redistribute to self and all allies. This bypasses Heal Block.

Transfer all positive effects from a random non-summoned Archangel ally to self.
Spread all positive effects on self to all non-summoned DEATH SEED allies.
These actions will not spread Taunt, Stealth, Regeneration, or Safeguard.

Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all DEATH SEED allies.

ultimate.name: Plasma Meltdown
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% damage + Steal 10% Health from each target and redistribute to self and all allies. This bypasses Heal Block.
Apply Slow for 2 turns and 2 Bleed to all enemies.

In RAIDS, apply Trauma for 2 turns to all enemies.

passive.name: Armor Breach
passive.description:
Gain +30% Damage. DEATH SEED allies gain +30% Damage.
Lower Armor by 30% for all enemies with Bleed.

In RAIDS:
 > On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all DEATH SEED allies.
 > When this character or a DEATH SEED ally drops below 50% Max Health, fill Speed Bar for this character by 30% + gain Speed Up.

basic.name: Custom I.C.E.R.
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 230% damage + Chain to 1 adjacent target for 180% damage. Generate 1 ability energy on each Crit. Energy is granted to non-summoned adjacent allies.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Rally
special.description:
Gain Defense Up for 2 turns + 2 Deathproof. Spread all positive effects on self to all allies, excluding Taunt.

Heal self, Kestrel, Coulson, all INVADER allies, and all S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

ultimate.name: Reinforcements
ultimate.description: Summon 3 S.H.I.E.L.D. Agents. Gain a positive effect for 2 turns. Apply Defense Up, 2 Deathproof, and Taunt for 2 turns to summoned agents. Possible Summons: > S.H.I.E.L.D. Operative + Nick Fury gains Speed Up > S.H.I.E.L.D. Security + Nick Fury gains Offense Up

passive.name: Director of S.H.I.E.L.D.
passive.description:
On Spawn:
> Apply Speed Up to self, Coulson, and all S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION allies.
> Fill Speed Bar for self by +10% + 10% per INVADER ally.

On Turn, 50% chance to apply Speed Up to self, S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION, Coulson and Kestrel allies. In RAIDS, always apply Speed Up.

On any HERO ally's turn, 30% chance to apply Assist Now to self or a random ally. If the ally granted Assist Now is Kestrel, Coulson, Nick Fury, a S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION, or INVADER, also apply Offense Up.
In RAIDS, with 3 or more INVADER allies, always apply Assist Now to self or a random ally.

S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION, INVADER, Coulson, and Kestrel allies gain +10% Armor.
S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION, INVADER, Coulson, and Kestrel allies gain +30% Resistance.

basic.name: Blood Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage.

Clear all Heal Block and all Stun from the ally with the highest Damage.
Call that ally to attack the primary target.

After every use of this ability after the first time during a match, randomly choose one of the following effects:
> Apply Bleed to the primary target.
> Gain Defense Up.
> Heal the most injured ally or self by 15% of this character's Max Health.

special.name: Occult Bloodletting
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply 2 Bleed and Disrupted.
Gain 2 Regeneration and Immunity.

After every use of this ability after the first time during a match, randomly choose one of the following effects:
> Apply Ability Block to the primary target.
> Gain Deathproof.
> Apply 2 Counter to adjacent allies.

On WAR OFFENSE, this attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Grimm Tidings
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing + flip all the following positive effects to negative effects:
> Deflect, Minor Deflect, Speed Up, and Defense Up.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more A-FORCE allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns and Disrupted for 2 turns to the primary target, the enemy with the highest Health, and the enemy with the highest Damage.

After every use of this ability after the first time during a match, randomly choose one of the following effects:
> Gain 2 Evade.
> Apply 2 Deflect to self and all allies.
> Revive a dead ally with 20% base Health.

This attack cannot be dodged.

On WAR OFFENSE, gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.
On WAR OFFENSE, this attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

passive.name: Blood Sorcery
passive.description:
When a negative effect is applied to this character or any A-FORCE ally, fill Jessica Jones' Speed Bar by 20%.

Gain +50% Drain.
Gain +50% Focus + 40% Focus for each A-FORCE ally.
Gain +10% Max Health. A-FORCE allies gain +10% Max Health.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, apply Speed Up to self and all A-FORCE allies.
 > On Spawn, apply Safeguard, Immunity, and Deathproof to the highest health A-FORCE ally.
 > On Spawn, apply Immunity and Deathproof to the lowest Health ally.

 > On Turn, heal self and all SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE allies for 5% of this character's Max Health and clear 2 negative effects.

basic.name: Night Slash

Attack primary target for 200% Piercing + flip 1 positive effect into a negative effect.

In RAIDS, if this character has 3 or more X-MEN allies, on the last Bonus Attack, apply Ability Block to the primary target.

On Crit, gain 1 Regeneration. For each other Crit from this ability, prolong the duration of that Regeneration by 1.

This attack gains +100% Crit Chance against targets with Exposed.

special.name: Shifting Strikes

Attack primary target for 440% Piercing + apply Stun, Bleed, and Exposed.
Rebound Chain to 3 targets within infinite spaces of the previous target for 230% Piercing + apply Bleed.

Apply Evade to the 2 most injured allies.
Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.
Gain Safeguard for 2 turns.

If Charged:
 > Fill Speed Bar by 20% for self and all X-MEN allies.
 > Fill Speed Bar by 20% for the non-X-MEN ally with the highest Damage.
 > In RAIDS, fill Speed Bar by an additional 20% for self and all X-TREME X-MEN allies.
 > Lose 1 Charged.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Shadow Barrage
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 500% Piercing and do the following to all enemies:
 > Clear all positive effects.
 > Apply +2 Slow, up to a maximum of 3.
 > Apply +1 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 5.

Clear all Charged on the primary target.

Apply +1 Speed Up to self and all X-MEN allies, up to a maximum of 3.
Prolong the duration of all positive effects on self and all allies by 1, up to a maximum of 3.

This attack gains +500% Extra Focus, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: BAMF!
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Speed Up and 2 Charged.
 > Apply Evade to self and all X-MEN allies.
 > In RAIDS, fill Speed Bar by 25% for self and all X-TREME X-MEN allies.

On Turn, flip 2 negative effects on self into positive effects.
On Crit, fill Speed Bar by 10% for self and all X-TREME X-MEN allies.
On Dodge, heal this character for 10% of this character's Max Health.

When this character drops below 30% Health for the first time, do the following to this character:
 > Clear 3 negative effects and gain +3 Evade.
 > Heal and Barrier for 30% of this character's Max Health.
 > Fill Speed Bar by 30%.

The Speed of this character and each ally can only be reduced by Slow.
Gain +60% Max Health.
X-MEN allies gain +30% Max Health.
X-TREME X-MEN allies gain an additional +30% Max Health.

basic.name: Self Defense
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.
If this character has 2 or more SHADOWLAND allies, flip 2 positive effects to negative effects on the primary target.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to SHADOWLAND characters.

special.name: First Aid
special.description:
Clear 3 negative effects from the most injured ally and all adjacent allies.
Heal the most injured ally and all adjacent allies for 4,200 Health + 20% of this character's Max Health.

Call the ally with the highest Damage to attack the primary target.

ultimate.name: Urgent Care
ultimate.description:
Flip 3 negative effects on self and all SHADOWLAND allies.
Heal all allies for 4,000 Health + 15% of this character's Max Health.
Apply 2 Regeneration to each ally.

passive.name: Triage
passive.description:
On turn, 25% chance to heal the most injured ally for 15% of this character's Max Health.
When this character or any SHADOWLAND ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply Defense Up to that character + fill this character's Speed Bar by 30%

In WAR, on Turn, heal the most injured SHADOWLAND ally for 15% of this character's Max Health.

basic.name: Radical Wrath
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% Piercing + clear 2 positive effects.
Chain to 1 adjacent enemy for 220% Piercing + clear 2 positive effects.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Boardslide Beatdown

Attack primary target and all enemies in that character's row for 300% damage + apply Bleed and Defense Down.

Apply 2 Deflect and 2 Deathproof to self and all allies.

ultimate.name: Daring Demolition

Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing + clear all Charged and apply Trauma.

Clear all Battlefield Effects on the allied and enemy sides.

In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies:
 > Reduce the duration of all positive effects on all enemies by 2.
 > Apply Disrupted to all enemies.
 > Apply Ability Block to 2 random CONTROLLER enemies with the highest Speed.
 > This attack gains +300% Extra Focus, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Street Shredder
passive.description:
In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, until this character completes a turn:
 > This character and all DARING WARRIOR allies cannot gain Slow and enemies cannot gain Speed Up.
 > If this character has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies, enemies cannot fill or reduce Speed Bar for themselves, allies, or enemies.

On Turn, if this character has Deathproof, apply Offense Up to self and a random ally that does not have Offense Up.

In CRUCIBLE or BATTLEWORLD, if this character has 3 DARING WARRIOR allies, enemies cannot have their Speed increased except by positive effects and this character and all DARING WARRIOR allies cannot have their Speed reduced except by negative effects.

basic.name: Hunter's Beam
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 280% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

This attack is Unavoidable.

special.name: Future Blitz

Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + flip all positive effects to negative effects on each target.
This attack gains +25% Piercing per Sentinel Reinforcement ally.

Apply Ability Block for 2 turns to primary target.

In RAIDS:
 > Apply Stun to primary target.
 > Apply Ability Block to all MUTANT targets.

This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.name: Eradicate
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Disrupted for 2 turns.
If this character has 3 or more ORCHIS allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns to primary and adjacent targets.

This attack gains +100% Crit Chance.

This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Sentient Sentinel
passive.description:
On Kill, gain Stealth.

While this character has Stealth, gain +30% Damage and +30% Crit Damage.

Gain +10% Speed for each summoned TECH ally, up to a maximum of +50%.

In RAIDS:
 > ORCHIS allies gain +10% Speed for each summoned TECH ally, up to a maximum of +50%.
 > On successful attack by this character or any ORCHIS ally, apply Heal Block to each attacked target.
 > If this character has 4 or more ORCHIS allies, lower the Dodge Chance of all enemies by 100%.

basic.name: Shadow Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 330% damage + apply Bleed.
Apply Stealth to self and the most injured ally.

Gain assist from a random HAND or UNDERWORLD ally.

special.description: Summon 3 Hand Ninjas with Offense Up and Regeneration. Clear all negative effects from self. Possible Summons: > Hand Blademaster + Nobu gains Regeneration > Hand Archer + Nobu gains Regeneration

ultimate.name: Ready the Trap
ultimate.description:
Apply 2 Counter to self and all allies.
Apply 2 Deflect to self and all allies.

On WAR OFFENSE, apply 2 Deathproof to self and all allies.

passive.name: Secrets of Death
passive.description:
All HAND and UNDERWORLD allies gain 10% chance to Revive with 20% of Max Health. All other allies gain 5% chance to Revive with 15% of Max Health.


On WAR OFFENSE:
 > If this character, any HAND ally, or any UNDERWORLD ally has Counter, those characters gain +50% Crit Chance.
 > If this character, any HAND ally, or any UNDERWORLD ally has Stealth, those characters gain +20% Crit Damage.

basic.name: Bright Barrage
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + 25% per Charged.

If this character has:
 > 1 or more Charged, apply Offense Down to the primary target.
 > 10 or more Charged, apply Trauma to the primary target.

special.name: Shining Strike
special.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage + apply Blind for 2 turns.

If Charged:
 > Rebound Chain for 170% damage to a number of adjacent targets equal to the number of Charged on this character, up to a max of 10.
 > 50% chance to apply Blind on each secondary attack.
 > In RAIDS, apply +1 Blind, up to a maximum of 3, on each secondary attack instead.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Hyperlight Twister
ultimate.description:
Flip all positive effects + clear Revive Once on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 240% damage + 10% per Charged.

Apply Slow for 2 turns, Disrupted for 1 turn, and prolong the duration of all negative effects, excluding Stun, Trauma, and Ability Block, on all enemies by 1.

On WAR DEFENSE, clear Charged on all enemies.
This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: True North
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply 2 Evade to self and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies.
 > Clear all Charged from this character.

On enemy Death, apply Speed Up to self and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies.

When this character or any ALPHA FLIGHT ally is attacked, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 10.

Gain +50% Focus.
Gain +50% Resistance. ALPHA FLIGHT allies gain +50% Resistance.

In RAIDS, enemy characters cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).

In RAIDS or on WAR DEFENSE:
 > On enemy Death, apply Slow to all enemies.
 > While this character does not have Exhausted, self and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies cannot gain Slow and cannot have their Speed Bar reduced.
 > While this character does not have Exhausted, enemies cannot gain Charged.
 > While this character does not have Exhausted, gain +250% Focus for self and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies.
 > Gain +25% Speed. ALPHA FLIGHT allies gain +25% Speed.

basic.name: Cosmic Beam
basic.description:
On WAR OFFENSE, clear all Barrier on primary and adjacent targets.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + clear 2 positive effects.
In WAR, clear 4 positive effects instead.

Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5, to self and all KNOWHERE allies.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has applied Nova Force this match, Bonus Attack the primary target for 250% damage.

50% chance to revive a dead Korg ally with 10% Max Health. In WAR, always revive a dead Korg ally with 10% Max Health.
On WAR OFFENSE, characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

special.name: Nova Blast
special.description:
On WAR OFFENSE, clear all Barrier on primary and adjacent targets.
In WAR, clear Revive Once from primary and adjacent targets.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% damage + flip Defense Up and 2 random positive effects + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.
Apply Stun to the primary target.

In WAR:
 > On OFFENSE, if this character has applied Nova Force this match, apply Bleed to the primary and adjacent targets.
 > Apply Trauma to the primary target for 2 turns.
 > Apply +1 Safeguard to self and all KNOWHERE allies.
 > On OFFENSE, characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
 > This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Neutron Star
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 700% damage.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

Clear all negative effects from self.
Barrier self and all allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.
Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5, to self and all KNOWHERE allies.
Clear all Battlefield Effects on allied side and apply the Battlefield Effect, Nova Force, to allied side.

In WAR:
 > Apply +1 Safeguard to self and all KNOWHERE allies.
 > Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all KNOWHERE allies.
 > Fill Speed Bar by 20% for self and all KNOWHERE allies.

Nova Force:
 > On this character's or ally's Turn, that character clears 1 negative effect, gains +2 Deflect, up to a maximum of 10, and heals for 5% of Max Health.
 > For this character and each ally, when that character drops below 50% health, heal that character for 50% of Max Health. This can only occur once per match for self and each ally.
 > This character and all allies gain +5% Damage per Deflect on that character.
 > This Battlefield Effect lasts until cleared or until the end of the match.

passive.name: The Human Rocket
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 1 Charged.
On Spawn in WAR:
 > Gain +2 Charged. This can only trigger once per WAR.
 > Fill Speed Bar for self by 10% + 15% for each KNOWHERE ally.
 > Apply Evade and Safeguard to self and all KNOWHERE allies.

On Turn, clear 1 negative effect from self and heal self for 15% of this character's Max Health.
At the end of any turn, if this character is Charged and below 75% Health, clear Heal Block on this character, heal self for 50% of this character's Max Health, fill this character's Speed Bar by 25%, then lose 1 Charged.

Gain +60% Max Health. KNOWHERE allies gain +30% Max Health.
For each Charged on this character, gain +1,000% Focus and +4,000% Resistance.
While this character has Deflect or Minor Deflect, this character and KNOWHERE allies gain +20% Block Amount.

In WAR:
 > Gain an additional +30% Max Health for self and all KNOWHERE allies.
 > While this character has Charged, any KNOWHERE ally or self with Safeguard, cannot have Trauma applied to them.
 > While this character has 3 or more Charged, Stun cannot be applied to self or any KNOWHERE allies.
> On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has CHARGED and 2 or more KNOWHERE allies, COSMIC enemies cannot gain Defense Up.

basic.name: Nova Beam
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage.

Gain Regeneration for 2 turns.
If Charged, clear all negative effects from self and lose Charged.

special.name: Cosmic Impact
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + in RAIDS, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2.

If any target has Slow, apply Ability Block to that target.
Apply Slow to primary and adjacent targets.

Heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health + gain Taunt.

ultimate.name: Gravimetric Pulse
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 370% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns.

Flip Taunt + if this character has any CHAMPION allies, apply Stun to the primary target.

Barrier self and all CHAMPION or STARJAMMER allies for 10% of this character's Max Health + clear all negative effects.

In RAIDS, apply Safeguard for 2 turns and Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all CHAMPION allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and, in RAIDS, cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Kid Nova

On Spawn, gain Charged and Taunt.

When this character loses Charged or Taunt, heal self and all CHAMPION or STARJAMMER allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.

In RAIDS, on enemy Death, generate 1 Special Ability Energy for self and all CHAMPION allies. If not Charged, gain Charged.

While Charged:
 > On self or CHAMPION or STARJAMMER ally Turn, Barrier self and all CHAMPION or STARJAMMER allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.
 > If this character has 4 CHAMPION or STARJAMMER allies, enemies cannot gain Safeguard or Immunity.
 > Gain +20% Block Amount, +50% Block Chance, and +1,000% Resistance.

CHAMPION and STARJAMMER allies gain +100% Counterattack chance.

In RAIDS, steal 40% Health from the primary target instead.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.description:
On Spawn, On OFFENSE, fill Speed Bar by 5% for self and all allies.

On this character's or any NIGHTSTALKER ally's Turn End:

On enemy Death:

In RAIDS:

Clear all Battlefield Effects on enemy side and apply the Battlefield Effect, All-Father's Fury, to enemy side.

If All-Father's Fury is active at the start of an enemy turn, on enemy turn end, Odin will use his Basic - Gungnir's Onslaught, at the Basic's unlocked level.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to them.

This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Odin Sleep

Clear Exposed from this character.

If this character does not have 2 or more Exhausted, clear 1 Exhausted from self and all allies.

Heal self and all allies for 50% of this character's Max Health + apply the following for 2 turns: Offense Up, Defense Up, Speed Up, and Immunity.

Barrier self and all ASGARDIAN allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

If this character has used their Basic, Counterattack, or Assist, clear all Battlefield Effects on enemy side and apply the Battlefield Effect, All-Father's Fury, to enemy side.

This character cannot be revived.

On Turn, lose 1 Charged.

This character cannot gain Minor Defense Up, Defense Up, Safeguard, or Trauma.

On Turn, attack all enemies for 325% damage + clear all Charged + reduce the duration of 3 random positive effects by 1. If any Charged were cleared, heal self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies for 10% of Max Health.
