On SECRET WARRIOR ally Death, flip Disrupted on self, gain Offense Up for 2 turns, and, on WAR OFFENSE, fill Speed Bar by 100%.

On Revive, clear all negative effects from self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies + apply 2 Deathproof and Speed Up for 1 turn + Barrier self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies for 25% of this character's Max Health. On WAR OFFENSE, Revive with 100% of this character's Max Health.

While this character has Revive Once:
 > Gain 25% Dodge Chance and 3,000% Focus.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, if this character spawned with 3 SECRET WARRIOR allies, enemies cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, enemies cannot gain Deflect, Counterattack, or Evade.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, this character's Passive Revive Chance cannot be reduced or prevented. (Hit-Monkey and Mephisto are two characters who can lower Passive Revive Chance)

basic.name: Psychic Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + clear 2 positive effects.

Apply Assist Now to a random Omega Red (Phoenix Force) ally.

special.name: Bestow Light
special.description:
Apply Stealth for 2 turns and Defense Up for 2 turns to all allies.

Heal all X-MEN and PHOENIX FORCE allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.

Redistribute 25% of this character's Max Health from self to all allies. All allies receive an additional 10,000 Health. This bypasses Heal Block.

Transfer all negative effects from all allies to self.

If this character has 2 or more X-MEN allies, or an Omega Red (Phoenix Force) ally, attack primary target for 320% damage + copy all negative effects, excluding Stun and Trauma, from this character to the primary target.
If this character has an Omega Red (Phoenix Force) ally, clear all negative effects on this character.

If this character has no allies, attack self for 5,000% Piercing.
If this character dies, their Passive Ability will trigger.

ultimate.name: Phoenix Force
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 400% damage + clear all positive effects.

Clear all negative effects from self and all X-MEN and PHOENIX FORCE allies.
Clear 2 negative effects from all other allies.

Gain +50,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > If this character has an Omega Red (Phoenix Force) ally, apply Trauma and Ability Block to primary target.
 > If this character has a Magneto (Phoenix Force) ally, this attack is Unavoidable and gains +30% Piercing.

passive.name: Phoenix Rising
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all X-MEN and PHOENIX FORCE allies.

On Death, summon Dark Phoenix.
Phoenix cannot be revived.

Whenever an ally gains Taunt that's not from an On Spawn Passive Ability, gain Taunt for 2 turns.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has an Omega Red (Phoenix Force) or Magneto (Phoenix Force) ally, this character and all PHOENIX FORCE allies cannot gain Stun.

X-MEN allies gain +15% Damage and +15% Max Health.
UNCANNY X-MEN allies gain an additional +15% Damage and an additional +15% Max Health.

basic.name: Light Show
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 360% damage + 5% of the target's Max Health + clear 3 positive effects.

Gain +1 Charged.

special.name: Aurora Blast
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 360% damage + apply Blind and Slow + clear all Deflect and Minor Deflect.

On WAR OFFENSE, heal self and all SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

This attack gains +1,000% Extra Focus and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Full Spectrum Flash
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 450% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.
Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE allies.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE allies.

passive.name: Radiant Light
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 2 Charged.
When an A-FORCE or SECRET DEFENDER ally uses an Ultimate ability, gain +1 Charged.

On any turn, if this character has 5 or more Charged:
 > Attack all enemies for 360% damage.
 > Fill Speed Bar for self and all SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE allies by 20%.
 > Lose 5 Charged.

Lower the Accuracy of enemies with Blind by an additional 100%.
The Speed of this character and each SECRET DEFENDER and A-FORCE ally can only be reduced by Slow.
Gain +30% Damage and +15% Max Health.
SECRET DEFENDER allies gain +30% Damage and +15% Max Health.

In ARENA:
 > Gain an additional +30% Damage.
 > SECRET DEFENDER allies gain an additional +30% Damage.
On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Turn, heal self and all A-FORCE allies for 5% of this character's Max Health.
 > This character and all A-FORCE allies Speed Bar cannot be reduced until this character takes a turn.

basic.name: Meteoric Slash
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns. Chain to 1 target within 2 spaces of previous target for 300% damage + apply Offense Down.

If Moondragon is an ally, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Quantum Cutter
special.description:
Clear all negative effects from self and all INFINITY WATCH allies. Clear 2 random negative effects from all other allies.

Barrier self and all allies for 10% of this character's Max Health. If Adam Warlock is an ally, Barrier self and all INFINITY WATCH allies for an additional 10% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage + 25% Piercing.

ultimate.name: Marvelous Finish
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 600% damage + 25% Piercing + apply Offense Down.

Apply Defense Up for 2 turns + Offense Up for 2 turns to all INFINITY WATCH allies. If primary target has any positive effect apply 2 Deathproof to all INFINITY WATCH allies.

passive.name: Avatar of Oblivion
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all INFINITY WATCH allies.
When this character or any INFINITY WATCH ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply 2 Deathproof to that character.

While this character has Deathproof, gain +50% Drain. While any ally has Deathproof, that ally gains +50% Drain.
Gain +30% Damage.
INFINITY WATCH allies gain +30% Damage.
Lower enemy Crit Chance by 15% while this character does not have Ability Block.

basic.name: Sanguine Iron
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 230% damage and adjacent targets for 200% damage + apply Bleed.

Barrier the most injured non-summoned ally for 10% of this character's Max Health.

special.name: Electrostatic Field
special.description:
Barrier self for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 190% damage.
If any target has Bleed, attack that target for 250% Piercing instead. 

This attack will always Crit the primary target.
This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Reverse Polarity
ultimate.description:
Pull all enemies up to 2 spaces toward the primary target.

Attack primary and adjacent targets within 2 spaces for 300% damage + apply Disrupted for 2 turns + flip all Regeneration to Bleed.

If this character has a Jean Grey or Multiple Man ally, gain +100,000% Extra Focus to flip Regeneration to Bleed.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Mistress of Magnetism
passive.description:
On self or ally Crit, remove all Deflect from the most injured non-summoned enemy that has Deflect.

When an enemy attacks this character or any ally with Barrier, apply Bleed to that enemy.

On OFFENSE, before this character takes a turn, this character and all allies cannot gain Defense Down.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, lower the Crit Chance of all enemies by 25% per IMMORTAL X-MEN ally, up to a maximum of 100%.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Gain +10% Max Barrier.
 > X-FACTOR allies gain +10% Max Barrier.

basic.name: Starless Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage + clear 2 positive effects. Gain an Assist from an ally Corvus Glaive.

This attack cannot be dodged. If Corvus Glaive is an ally, this attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Star Throw
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns. Chain to 3 targets within 2 spaces of previous target for 250% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

Gain an Assist from an ally Corvus Glaive.

Dodge breaks this Chain.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Last Light
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 300% Piercing + Reduce Speed Bar by 50%.
Apply Stun and Slow.

Gain an Assist from an ally Corvus Glaive.

This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Embrace the Void
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Speed Up.
On ally Thanos Turn, if he doesn't have the Space Stone, grant him the Space Stone + Speed Up for 2 turns. This character can only do this once per match.

On Turn, clear Stealth from the most injured enemy.

Gain +80% Focus.
BLACK ORDER and Thanos allies gain +80% Focus.

basic.name: Psi Knife
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% Piercing damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

special.name: Telekinetic Armament
special.description:
Attack primary target for 200% Piercing damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns. Chain to 5 adjacent targets for 200% Piercing damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns.
Clear 3 positive effect from each target.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

In RAIDS:
 > Clear Immunity before clearing the other positive effects.
 > This attack gains +5,000% Extra Focus.

ultimate.name: Astral Butterflies
ultimate.description:
Transfer 2 negative effects from each ally to primary target. Transfer all negative effects from self and each X-MEN and DEATH SEED ally to primary target.

Attack primary target for 350% Piercing damage + reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

This attack cannot miss.

passive.name: Reinvigorate
passive.description:
On Spawn:
> Gain Evade + Counter + Deflect.
> DEATH SEED allies gain Evade + Counter + Deflect.

When this character or any UNCANNY X-MEN or DEATH SEED ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply Evade + Counter to that character.

Gain +1,000% Resistance against Disrupted.

basic.name: M4 Carbine
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 260% Piercing.

Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 260% Piercing.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Grenade Launcher
special.description:
Transfer 3 positive effect, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self, all VIGILANTE, and all MILITARY allies.

Attack primary target for 260% Piercing.

Attack all adjacent enemies for 260% Piercing.

ultimate.name: Fully Loaded
ultimate.description:
If this character has 4 or more VIGILANTE allies, clear Barrier from all enemies.

Attack primary target for 250% Piercing.

Attack all enemies for 250% Piercing.

passive.name: Lock and Load
passive.description:
When an enemy attacks a VIGILANTE ally, if this character has 4 or more VIGILANTE allies, attack that enemy for 125%  Piercing.

When a VIGILANTE or DEFENDER ally uses their Special Ability, attack the most injured enemy for 125% Piercing.

On Hit, apply +1 Vulnerable, up to a maximum of 5 + In RAIDS, apply Bleed.

This character's attacks deal an additional 50% Damage to any VILLAIN enemies.

basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + clear 3 positive effects + apply Bleed.
Apply 1 random negative effect from the following list to the primary and adjacent targets:
 > Ability Block, Blind, Slow, or Trauma.

Apply 2 random negative effects from the following list to the primary and adjacent targets:
 > Defense Down, Disrupted, Heal Block, or Offense Down.

On primary and adjacent targets with Darkness, apply +1 Darkness.
If primary target doesn't have Darkness, apply Darkness to primary target.

Gain 1 random positive effect from the following list:
 > Defense Up, Deflect, or Offense Up.

Gain an assist from a SYMBIOTE ally.
If this character has 10 or more Rage, gain +1 Rage.

This attack cannot be dodged by the primary target.

special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 320% damage. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by 25% of the damage dealt.

Clear all positive effects on primary and adjacent targets.
Spread all negative effects from the primary target to adjacent targets.

On primary and adjacent targets with Darkness, apply +1 Darkness.
If primary target doesn't have Darkness, apply Darkness to primary target.

Barrier self for 100 Barrier.

Summon a random ally from the following list:
Agent Venom, Gwenom, Scream, Spider-Man (Symbiote), or Venom.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% damage + apply +1 Darkness. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by 50% of the damage dealt.

Summon 2 random allies from the following list:
 > Agent Venom, Scream, Spider-Man (Symbiote), or Venom.

Summon an additional 2 random allies from the following list:
 > Anti-Venom, Carnage, Gwenom, Red Goblin, or Void Knight.

Gain +5 Rage.

If this character has 50 or more Rage, reduce the duration of all positive effects on each enemy by 10.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be counterattacked.

passive.description:
On Death, Revive this character with 100% Max Health and this character's Revive cannot be prevented.
This character cannot be cloned or have its Max Health reduced.
Characters killed by Knull cannot be revived.

On Turn, for every 10 Rage on this character, generate 1 Ability Energy for self, up to a maximum of 5.
On SYMBIOTE ally Turn and on SYMBIOTE ally Death, gain +2 Rage.
On enemy Turn, fill this character's Speed Bar by 20%.

Gain +10% Damage and +10% Speed per Rage.
SYMBIOTE allies gain +25% Speed and +25% Max Health.
For every 10 Rage on this character, SYMBIOTE allies gain +50% Damage, up to a maximum of 250%.
Lower the Passive Assist Chance for all enemies by 100%.

While this character does not have Barrier, gain +% Damage Reduction.
This character can only lose up to 50 Health each turn.
This character's Max Barrier is 1% of this character's Max Health and cannot be reduced.
This character cannot have their Speed Bar reduced.
This character is immune to the following list of negative effects:
Ability Block, Exhausted, Exposed, Slow, and Stun.

basic.description:
Attack the enemy that has Wrath for 300% damage + transfer all Bleed from self to target.
If the target is at full energy at the start of the current Turn, the damage of this attack is increased by +300%.

This attack reduces the Max Health of the target by 25% of the damage dealt.

This character gains +25% damage and 5% Max Health Reduction based on the number of Rage on this character:
 > Rage needed to gain additional damage: 10 / 30 / 50 / 70
 > Rage needed to increase Max Health Reduction:  15 / 35 / 55 / 75

This attack cannot be dodged.

special.description:
Attack the enemy that has Wrath and adjacent targets for 350% damage + apply Defense Down, Disrupted, and Trauma.

This attack reduces the Max Health of the target by 25% of the damage dealt.

Gain Offense Up for 3 turns and Immunity for 3 turns.
Gain +10 Rage.

This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 200% damage + apply Slow for 3 turns. 
Bonus Attack all enemies for 300% damage + apply Silence. 

This attack reduces the Max Health of the target by 25% of the damage dealt.

Gain +20 Rage.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Wrath to the enemy with the most Health.
On Revive, gain +20 Rage.

On any Turn:
 > If more than 1 enemy has Wrath, clear Wrath from all enemies.
 > If no enemy has Wrath, apply Wrath to the enemy with the most health.

On enemy Turn, fill Speed Bar by 35% + gain +1 Rage.

On Stun, Ability Block, or Blind:
 > Clear that negative effect and gain + Rage.

This character cannot gain Trauma, Exhausted, Exposed, Regeneration, Stealth, Darkness, Silence, Slow, and is immune to Speed Bar reductions, Speed Stat reductions, and attacks that deal damage based on Maestro's Max Health.
Enemies cannot gain Deathproof, Immunity, Safeguard, Charged, and cannot be Revived.

When this character has 100 Rage, this character will ENRAGE, ending the match.

basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply Offense Down for 3 turns and Defense Down for 3 turns.

This attack is Unavoidable.

special.description:
Attack all enemies for 400% damage + clear all positive effects.

Apply Offense Up to self and all allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.description:
Flip all positive effects into negative effects on all enemies.
Attack all enemies for 500% damage.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain 6 Heroism.
 > Summon some AVENGER allies. (Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Iron Man, Hawkeye, Hulk, and Black Widow)

On Attacked, lose 1 Heroism.
When this character does not have Heroism:
 > Kill all summoned AVENGER allies and gain +10 Rage for each AVENGER ally killed.
 > Become Empowered, transform into The Void, and gain 4 Void. (This character becoming Empowered cannot be prevented.)
 > Summon some VILLAIN allies. (U.S. Agent, Iron Patriot, Ares, Moonstone, Daken, and Bullseye)

On enemy Turn, fill this character's Speed Bar by 20% and, if this character has 10 or more Rage, fill the Speed Bar for all allies by 10%.

Gain +5% Damage and Speed per Rage.

This character can only lose up to 4,000,000 Health each turn.
Enemies cannot Passively Assist and cannot revive.
This character cannot have their Speed or Speed Bar reduced and is immune to the following list of effects:
Ability Block, Darkness, Exhausted, Exposed, Regeneration, Silence, Slow, Stealth, Stun, and Trauma.

basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 270% damage.

If this character's Health is 50% or more, apply Offense Down for 2 turns to each target.

If this character is below 50% Health, gain +1 Rage.

special.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.

Flip all negative effects on self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.

Attack all enemies for 330% damage.
If this character's Health is 50% or more, clear all positive effects on all enemies.

Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.

If this character is below 50% Health, gain +3 Rage.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.description:
If this character is below 50% Health:
 > Generate 3 Ultimate Ability Energy for self.

Attack primary target for 400% damage. This attack gains +30% Crit Chance.

If this character's Health is 50% or more:
 > Reduce Speed Bar of primary target by 50%.
 > Gain Taunt for 2 turns and Immunity for 2 turns.

If this character is below 50% Health, gain +5 Rage.

passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Taunt, Immunity, and Safeguard.
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self, Lilandra allies, and all ANNIHILATOR allies.
 > Gain Bonus Speed for this character's first turn.

When this character is attacked, fill this character's Speed Bar by 50%.

This character cannot gain Ability Block, Exhausted, Exposed, or Stun.
This character's Speed Bar cannot be reduced.

Gain +10% Damage and +10% Speed per Rage.

basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 280% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

This attack is Unavoidable.

special.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + flip all positive effects to negative effects on each target.
This attack gains +25% Piercing per Sentinel Reinforcement ally.

Apply Ability Block for 2 turns to primary target.

In RAIDS:
 > Apply Stun to primary target.
 > Apply Ability Block to all MUTANT targets.

This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Disrupted for 2 turns.
If this character has 3 or more ORCHIS allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns to primary and adjacent targets.

This attack gains +100% Crit Chance.

This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Stealth for 3 turns.
Stealth cannot be prevented from being gained by this character except by Disrupted.
On Kill, gain Stealth.

When this character drops below 25%, 50%, or 75% Health, gain +1 Stealth up to a max of 5.

On Death of a Sentinel ally, reduce the duration of Stealth on this character by 5.

While this character has Stealth:
 > Gain +80% Damage Reduction, up to a maximum of 80%.
> Gain +30% Damage and +30% Crit Damage.

Gain +10% Speed for each summoned TECH ally, up to a maximum of +50%.

This character cannot gain Disrupted.

basic.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage + apply 2 Bleed for 1 turns.
In BATTLEWORLD, apply Blind to the primary target.

Mind control the enemy with the highest Damage to attack the primary target.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to those allies.

special.description:
Apply 2 Evade and Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all ASTRAL allies.

Flip all positive effects into negative effects on primary and adjacent targets.
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Trauma for 2 turns, Ability Block for 1 turn, Defense Down for 2 turns.

In BATTLEWORLD, spread all negative effects, except Stun and Trauma, from the primary target to all adjacent targets.

Attack adjacent targets for 300% damage.

This attack gains +500% Extra Focus and is Unavoidable.

ultimate.description:
Reduce the duration of all negative effects on this character and each ally by 2. (Any negative effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Trauma).
Heal self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Copy and clear all positive effects, except Taunt, from all enemies to self.

Attack all enemies for 550% damage.

In BATTLEWORLD, Prolong the duration of all negative effects by 1 for all enemies.

This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Possessed and the following positive effects for 3 turns: Stealth, Safeguard, and Defense up.
 > Summon a clone of all enemies. These clones scale with this character's stats.

When this character or when any ASTRAL ally has Possessed, at the End of that character's Turn or when any non-Summoned Ally uses their Ultimate Ability:
 > Clear all barrier from the most injured enemy.
 > Attack the most injured enemy for 300% Piercing + 50% Drain + Steal 5% of that enemy's Max Health and redistribute to the Possessed character.
 > Fill the Possessed character's Speed Bar by 15% + clear 1 negative effect on Possessed character.
 > Characters that have Possessed cannot gain Trauma or Stun.
 > When a character that has Possessed dies, apply Possessed to a random ASTRAL ally that does not have Possessed.

At the end of any Turn, if this character has no Clone allies, reduce the duration of Stealth on this character by 100 and apply Stun for 2 turns to this character.

This character cannot gain Exhausted, Exposed, or Taunt.

While this character has Stealth, gain +80% Damage Reduction, up to a maximum of 80%

basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip Immunity and 1 positive effect to negative effect + apply Slow and 2 Bleed.

If the target has Disrupted, apply Blind.
If this character has Ability Block, reduce the Speed Bar of the primary target by 60%.

Clear 2 negative effects from this character. If any negative effects are removed, heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health per negative effect removed. Gain Evade + Offense Up.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or Assist, they only deal damage.
When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to them.

This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be Blocked, or Counterattacked.

special.description:
Do the following to self and all allies:
 > If this character does not have 2 or more Exhausted, clear 1 Exhausted and Exposed.
 > Reduce the duration of all negative effects by 2 + Heal for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Do the following to the primary and adjacent targets:
 > Reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 + Clear all Charged.
 > Apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Blind for 2 turns.
 > Apply Trauma and Disrupted + apply Ability Block to enemy CONTROLLERS.

Mind Control any 2 characters with the most Damage to attack the primary target. Controlled characters gain +100% Damage. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

Clear the Battlefield Effect on allied side. This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be Blocked, or Counterattacked.

ultimate.description:
Flip Offense Down on self.

Clear Barrier on all enemies. Reduce the duration of all positive effects on all enemies by 2.

Attack all enemies that are under 25% Health for 25% of target's Max Health. This ignores Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.

Attack all other enemies for 750% Piercing. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived. This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be Blocked, or Counterattacked.

passive.description:
Until this character completes a turn:
 > Enemies cannot assist + gain Taunt, Speed Up, or Defense Up. Allies cannot gain Darkness or Slow.
 > All characters' Speed Bar can only be filled or reduced by normal means.

 On enemy Turn:
 > Mind Control that enemy to attack the enemy with the highest Damage + apply Defense Down to the target. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.
 > Fill this character's Speed Bar by +15% + flip Defense Down.

Enemies with Defense Down that normally cannot gain Trauma can now gain Trauma.
If this character has any MYTHIC enemies, enemies cannot have their Max Health increased through Passive Abilities.
The Focus and Damage of this character can only be reduced by negative effects.

On Spawn and On Turn, gain +1 Deflect and if this character has 4 or more Deflect, attack the enemy with the highest Damage and all adjacent targets for 100% damage and clear all Deflect on this character.

This character cannot gain Ability Block, Stun, or Heal Block.
While this character has any allies, this character cannot take any damage and heals to his current maximum Health at the end of any Turn.
When this character does not have any allies, lose 25% of this character's Max Health and their Health is reduced by the same amount.

basic.description:
Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Gain Evade and Defense Up.

special.description:
Clear all Bleed and Taunt from self.

Gain Regeneration.

basic.name: Flame Thrower
basic.description: Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 150% damage. Apply Bleed to each target.

special.name: Pyrotechnics
special.description:
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 180% damage. Apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns + Clear 2 positive effects from each target.

If Magneto is ally, clear all positive effects from each target.

ultimate.name: Firecrafting
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 230% damage + apply Disrupted for 2 turns.

If Magneto is ally, each target has Bleed prolonged by a duration of 1.

passive.name: Stoke the Flames
passive.description:
Gain +25% Extra Focus.

When Pyro is attacked, fill Speed Bar by 15%.

If Magneto is ally, when an enemy drops below 50% health, apply Heal Block.

basic.name: Seismic Blast
basic.description: Attack primary and adjacent targets for 280% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.

special.name: Shockwave
special.description:
Attack primary target for 240% damage + clear 2 positive effects + apply Disrupted. Chain up to 2 targets for 240% damage + clear 2 positive effects.

If Coulson, Yo-Yo, or Phantom Rider is an ally, apply Slow to primary target and secondary targets.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

ultimate.name: Earthquake
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier from all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 320% damage.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more SECRET WARRIOR allies:
 > Apply Ability Block to primary and adjacent targets.
 > Gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.

passive.name: Secret Warrior
passive.description:
When a SECRET WARRIOR ally drops below 40% health, clear 3 random negative effects on that ally.

On SECRET WARRIOR ally Turn End, attack the most injured enemy for 150% damage and apply +1 Heal Block, up to a maximum of 3.

Gain +100% Focus.
SECRET WARRIOR and S.H.I.E.L.D. allies gain +100% Focus.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more SECRET WARRIOR allies:
 > On Spawn, apply Immunity and Safeguard to self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies.
 > On Spawn, Generate 2 Ability Energy for self.
 > Lower Crit Damage by 100% for all enemies with Ability Block.

basic.name: Quantum Blast
basic.description:
On WAR OFFENSE, Flip Disrupted on self.

Gain +1 Offense Up, up to a maximum of 3.

Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply Slow.
If target is COSMIC, Steal 10% Health from the primary target. On WAR OFFENSE, instead, always Steal 10% Health from the primary target.

special.name: Cosmic Crush
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% Piercing + deal 15% of this character's Max Health as damage.

Apply Defense Down for 2 turns, Slow for 2 turns, Offense Down for 2 turns, and Exposed to primary target.
Apply Defense Down for 2 turns to each adjacent target. On WAR OFFENSE, apply Slow for 2 turns, Offense Down for 2 turns, and Exposed to each adjacent target.

On WAR OFFENSE, clear all Battlefield Effects on the enemy side.

Call the ally with the highest Damage to attack the primary target.

ultimate.name: Meteor Smackdown
ultimate.description:
Clear all Charged on all enemies. Flip all negative effects on this character and Heal for 15% of Max Health.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% Piercing.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Clear all Battlefield Effects on allied side and apply the Battlefield Effect, Quantum Constructs, to allied side.
 > If this character has Trauma, reduce the duration of all negative effects on self by 2, then Heal for an additional 15% of Max Health.
 > Apply Ability Block for 2 turns and Trauma for 2 turns to primary and adjacent targets.
 > This attack gains +1,500% Extra Focus.

This attack ignores Defense Up, is unavoidable, and cannot be Blocked or Counterattacked.

Quantum Constructs:
 > On enemy Turn, reduce the duration of 1 random positive effect by 2 on that enemy.
 > Reduce enemy Assist Chance by 100% and Active Healing by 30%.
 > Enemies cannot gain Charged or Safeguard.
 > This Battlefield Effect cannot be cleared or replaced by another Battlefield Effect. It lasts until 18 characters, allies and enemies, have completed their turns.

passive.name: Galactic Knight
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Defense Up for 2 turns and apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all allies.
On Turn, heal self for 25% of this character's Max Health.
The first time any character takes a turn, if any enemy is LEGENDARY or MYTHIC, gain +1 Immunity, up to a maximum of 3.

When enemy with Exposed gains a positive effect, attack that enemy for 300% Piercing + Steal 5% Health + reduce Speed Bar of that enemy by 15%.

Gain +25% Drain.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On any Turn, clear Barrier on all enemies.
 > On End of any Turn, if this character does not have Safeguard, gain +1 Safeguard.
 > While this character's Health is 50% or more, enemies cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies.
 > This character and all allies cannot gain Exhausted.
 > All allies gain +25% Drain.
 > Lower Damage Reduction for LEGENDARY and MYTHIC enemies by 35%.
 > The Focus and Damage of this character and all allies can only be reduced by Offense Down.
 > Enemies cannot gain Immunity.
 > The Speed of all characters can only be altered by Positive and Negative effects.

basic.name: Speed Strikes
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 180% Piercing + clear 2 random positive effects. Repeat this attack 1 time.

Repeat this attack an additional time if the primary target has any positive effects, if it has none, instead Bonus Attack for 220% Piercing + apply Disrupted.

These attacks ignore Defense Up and cannot be counterattacked.
Bonus attacks cannot be blocked or dodged.

special.name: Mach Punch
special.description:
Clear all negative effects on this character.

Attack primary target for 700% Piercing + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Slow for 2 turns.
Clear all Charged on the primary target + reduce Speed Bar by 30%.

Gain Offense Up for 3 turns and Defense Up for 3 turns.

This attack ignores Defense Up and it cannot be blocked or dodged.

ultimate.name: Super Sonic Blitz
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects on this character.

Attack all enemies for 500% Piercing.
Apply 2 random negative effects to each enemy from the following list: 2 Bleed, Defense Down for 2 turns, Disrupted for 2 turns, Heal Block for 2 turns, Offense Down for 2 turns, Slow for 2 turns, 2 Vulnerable.
Clear 2 random positive effects on all enemies.

Gain 2 Evade and 2 Counter.
Gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be blocked, and cannot be counterattacked.

passive.name: Maximoff Velocity
passive.description:
This character cannot be revived and his Speed Bar cannot be reduced.
On Spawn, gain +4 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On any character's turn, if this character has Slow, clear Slow and fill Speed Bar by 20%.
On Turn, if Charged, fill Speed Bar by 100%, then lose 1 Charged (this will not trigger on any additional turn granted from this ability).
On End of Turn, if this character has Deathproof, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.
On Ally Turn, gain a random positive effect from this list: 2 Counter, Defense Up for 2 turns, 2 Deflect, 2 Evade, Offense Up for 2 turns, Regeneration for 2 turns, Speed Up for 2 turns, Immunity for 2 turns.

If this character's Health is full at the start of a match, the first time this character drops below 50% Health, clear all negative effects on this character, Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health, gain 2 Deathproof, and summon Scarlet Witch with Defense Up, Offense Up, and 2 Deathproof.

On Death, Apply Evade to a random Hawkeye ally.

Gain +50% Max Health. Scarlet Witch allies gain +30% Max Health.
Gain +100% Focus per Charged.

basic.name: Psychic Spark
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Defense Down.
Bonus Attack the enemy with the highest Damage for 280% damage + apply Defense Down.

special.name: Psionic Ignition
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% damage + flip 3 positive effects into negative effects + reduce Speed Bar by 25%.
Bonus Attack the most injured enemy for 400% damage + clear 3 positive effects + reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

Spread Stun and 3 other negative effects from primary target to the most injured enemy.

ultimate.name: Mental Devastation
ultimate.description:
Attack primary for 500% Piercing + flip all positive effects into negative effects. Attack adjacent targets for 500% Piercing + clear all postive effects + spread Stun and all other negative effects from primary target to all adjacent targets.

Apply Immunity to self and all HELLFIRE CLUB and IMMORTAL X-MEN allies.

On Kill:
Fill Speed Bar for self, a random Jean Grey, and a random Sebastian Shaw ally by 70%.

This attack ignores Defense Up, cannot be dodged, or blocked.

passive.name: Bright Lady
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Immunity.
 > If this character has 3 or more IMMORTAL X-MEN allies, apply Immunity to all IMMORTAL X-MEN allies.
 > If Cable is not an ally and if this character has 3 or more IMMORTAL X-MEN allies, fill Speed Bar by 5% for self and all IMMORTAL X-MEN.

On enemy turn, if that character has Speed Up or Stun, attack for 250% Piercing + flip 3 positive effects into negative effects.

When an enemy gains Slow, if this character has 3 or more HELLFIRE CLUB or IMMORTAL X-MEN allies, reduce that character's Speed Bar by 15% + apply Trauma.

PROTECTOR enemies cannot Spawn with Immunity or Safeguard.
SUPPORT enemies cannot Spawn with Immunity and cannot gain Speed Bar on Spawn.

If this character has 3 or more IMMORTAL X-MEN allies:
 > Enemy characters can only have their Resistance increased by positive effects
 > Enemy characters cannot gain Assist Now.

Gain +25% Drain. HELLFIRE CLUB and IMMORTAL X-MEN allies gain 25% Drain.

basic.name: Plasma Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage + apply Slow.

Gain Speed Up.

special.name: Full Blast
special.description:
Attack primary target for 270% damage and adjacent targets for 220% damage.
Reduce Speed Bar by 30% for primary and secondary targets + fill Speed Bar by 30% for self.

passive.name: Heavy Artillery
passive.description:
15% chance to Assist RAVAGER allies. 10% chance to Assist non-RAVAGER allies. On WAR OFFENSE, always assist non-MINION RAVAGER allies.

On Spawn, apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all RAVAGER allies.

basic.name: Plasma Blast
basic.description: Attack primary target for 340% damage.

special.name: Full Blast
special.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage. Attack all adjacent targets for 220% damage.

basic.name: Disintegrator
basic.description:
Clear Deathproof from the primary target.

Attack primary target for 280% Piercing + apply Heal Block.

If primary target has Defense Down, instead, attack primary target for 380% Piercing + apply Heal Block.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

special.name: Stitcher Kit
special.description:
Steal 10% Health from the primary target and redistribute to the most injured ally. Heal the most injured ally for 3,500 Health + 10% of this character's Max Health + apply Immunity.

Then steal 10% Health from the primary target and redistribute to the most injured ally. Heal the most injured ally for 3,500 Health + 10% of this character's Max Health + apply Immunity.

passive.name: Stimutox Treatment
passive.description:
Gain +25% Max Health.

On Spawn, apply Regeneration for 2 turns to self and all RAVAGER allies.

basic.name: Disintegrator
basic.description: Attack primary target for 290% damage + 30% chance to apply Bleed.

special.name: Stitcher Kit
special.description: Heal lowest Health ally for 3,500 Health + 8% of this character's Max Health. Then Heal lowest Health ally for 3,500 Health + 8% of this character's Max Health.

basic.name: Cutlazz
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage. If the primary target is a PROTECTOR, apply Defense Down + Disrupted.

If the primary target has Taunt, clear Taunt from the target + gain +2 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5. On WAR OFFENSE, gain +3 Deflect instead.

Gain Taunt.

special.name: Avast!
special.description:
Apply Defense Up to self and all RAVAGER allies for 2 turns. Heal self for 2,000 Health + 20% of this character's Max Health.

Copy 3 positive effects, except Stealth, from the primary target. On WAR OFFENSE, copy all positive effects, except Stealth, instead.

Flip 3 positive effects on the primary target.

passive.name: Seasoned Fighter
passive.description:
Gain +25% Block Chance.

On Spawn, apply Defense Up to self and all RAVAGER allies for 2 turns.

RAVAGER allies gain +25% Armor.
In WAR, RAVAGER allies gain +25% Drain.

basic.name: Goblin Assault
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage + apply 2 Bleed.

Gain 2 Regeneration.
Apply 2 Regeneration to the most injured HIVE-MIND ally.

special.name: Slash n' Burn
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and 2 Bleed.

In RAIDS, apply Trauma for 2 turns to primary and adjacent targets.

Clear all negative effects from all allies.
Heal self and all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.
Apply 2 Regeneration to self and all HIVE-MIND allies.

ultimate.name: Out for Blood
ultimate.description:
If this character does not have Trauma, transfer 5 negative effects from each HIVE-MIND ally to self, excluding Stun.

In RAIDS, copy 5 negative effects from self to each enemy.

Clear all negative effects from self + heal 15% of this character's Max Health + 5% per negative effect cleared.

Attack all enemies for 320% damage + 125% additional damage per positive effect on this character + apply Slow for 2 turns.

In RAIDS, prolong the duration of all negative effects on all enemies by 1.

Apply 2 Regeneration to self and all SYMBIOTE allies.

This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Scarlet Shredder
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Charged.
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns and 2 Deflect to self and all HIVE-MIND allies.
 > In RAIDS, apply Taunt for 2 turns to the highest Health HIVE-MIND ally.

On Turn:
 > Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.

When this character or a HIVE-MIND ally drops below 50% Max Health, if that character has Taunt, do the following to that character:
 > Clear Taunt + apply Safeguard and 2 Deathproof.

On Death of a HIVE-MIND ally, fill this character's Speed Bar by 25%.
When an enemy takes damage from Bleed, apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5, to all HIVE-MIND allies.

Gain +60% Damage. HIVE-MIND allies gain +60% Damage.
Gain +25% Block Amount. HIVE-MIND allies gain +25% Block Amount.

basic.name: Soviet Slam

Attack primary target for 340% damage + Chain to up to 1 adjacent target for 280% damage.

Gain Defense Up.
In WAR, apply Defense Up to adjacent allies.

Gain an assist from a Yelena Belova ally.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Iron Curtain
special.description:
Clear 4 negative effects + reduce the duration of Trauma by 2 on self and all WINTER GUARD allies.
If this character is above 50% Health, gain Taunt, otherwise heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Apply Defense Up to self and all allies.
Heal self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.
Apply Regeneration to self and all allies.
Gain an assist from a Yelena Belova ally.

ultimate.name: Red Star
ultimate.description:
Transfer 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self and all allies.

Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 500% damage + clear all Evade and Deflect.
Apply Ability Block to the primary target.

Gain an assist from a Yelena Belova ally.

In WAR, if this character has 3 WINTER GUARD allies, this attack gains 2,000% Extra Focus and cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Maskirovka
passive.description:
On Spawn:
> Gain Taunt.
> Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all allies.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health, if Taunting:

In WAR, on any enemy Turn before this character takes a Turn, if this character has 3 WINTER GUARD allies:

 > If this character has Safeguard, apply Immunity to self and a PROTECTOR WINTER GUARD ally.

Gain +50% Block Chance. Gain +20% Block Amount.

basic.name: Fiery Fist
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 275% damage + flip 1 positive effect to a negative effect.
Repeat this attack 1 additional time.
In WAR, repeat this attack 2 additional times instead.

When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist and has 5 or more Charged, that Counterattack or Assist gains +100% Damage and flips 1 additional positive effect to a negative effect.

special.name: Pavement Pummel
special.description:
Clear Barrier on primary and adjacent targets.
Clear Revive Once on the primary target. If Apocalypse is an ally, or with 3 or more HORSEMAN allies, clear Revive Once on adjacent targets as well. This clear cannot be resisted.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage, apply Offense Down for 2 turns, and reduce Speed Bar by 10%.

Repeat this attack 1 additional time.
In WAR, repeat this attack 2 additional times instead.

Fill Speed Bar for 1 random, adjacent HORSEMAN ally by 10%.
Fill Speed Bar for 1 random Apocalypse ally by 15%.

ultimate.name: Meteor Crash
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 450% damage + flip all positive effects into negative effects.
Apply Trauma for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns to all enemies.

Gain 500% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be blocked or dodged.

Clear all Battlefield Effects on the enemy side and apply the Battlefield Effect, Gamma Radiation, to the enemy side.

Gamma Radiation:
 > On enemy Turn, attack that enemy for 250% Piercing damage + apply 3 Bleed.
 > Attacks from this Battlefield Effect are unavoidable.
 > This Battlefield Effect lasts until cleared or until the end of the match.

passive.name: Seeing Red
passive.description:
On Spawn, if Charged, clear Charged.
On Spawn, if Hulk is an ally, gain Safeguard and Immunity.

On Turn, Heal self for 20% of this character's Max Health.
At the end of any turn, when this character has 5 or more Charged, gain 7 ability energy and fill this character's Speed Bar by 50%. This can only trigger once per match and only once per WAR.

When an enemy attacks this character, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
At the end of this character's turn, if Apocalypse is an ally, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

Gain +60% Focus. GAMMA allies gain +60% Focus. Apocalypse and all HORSEMAN allies gain +60% Focus.
For each Charged, gain +10% Speed, +20% Block Chance, and +20% chance to Counterattack.

In WAR:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 10% + 10% per GAMMA ally.
 > If this character has 3 or more GAMMA allies, when an enemy attacks this character, gain an additional +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > When an enemy attacks a GAMMA ally, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.
 > Gain +50% Damage Reduction. GAMMA allies gain +50% Damage Reduction.
 > Gain +50% Resistance. GAMMA allies gain +50% Resistance.
 > Defense Up and Minor Defense Up cannot be applied to self or any GAMMA allies.

basic.name: Hydra-99 Pistol
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 200% Piercing + apply Defense Down. On WAR DEFENSE, apply Taunt.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 180% Piercing + apply Defense Down.

special.name: Elite Guard

ultimate.name: Storm Assault

Apply Offense Up to all allies and self.

Attack primary target for 400% damage.
Gain assist at 50% Damage from 5 HYDRA allies.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

passive.name: Hail Hydra

On Spawn, if Health is full, this character has 1 or more HYDRA MINION allies, and no Charged, gain 8 Charged.

On non-Summoned HYDRA MINION ally death, if Charged, Revive that ally at 50% of Max Health + apply 2 Deathproof and lose 1 Charged.

Gain +15% Speed and Damage. HYDRA MINION allies gain +15% Speed and Damage.

On WAR DEFENSE:
 > Gain +25% Damage Reduction per non-summoned HYDRA ally.
 > Gain +10,000% Resistance against Defense Down and Bleed.

basic.name: Sonic Repulsor
basic.description: Attack primary target for 260% damage. Chain to an adjacent target for 260% damage. Apply Slow and Defense Down to each target.

special.name: Tech Shield

Steal 5% Health from each target and redistribute 500% of the Health stolen to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies. This bypasses Heal Block.

Barrier self and all allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Apply 2 Regeneration to self and all allies.
Apply 2 Deathproof and 2 Deflect to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.

ultimate.name: Firewall
ultimate.description:
Revive a dead P.E.G.A.S.U.S. ally with 60% Max health.

Clear all negative effects from self and all allies.
Heal self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.
Apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self, POWER ARMOR, and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.

Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all allies.
Apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.

When this character or any ally drops below 50% Health, Barrier that character for 10% of this character's Max Health. In WAR and RAIDS, Barrier that character for an additional 10% of this character's Max Health.

On enemy Turn, if that character has Vulnerable, Heal self and all POWER ARMOR and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies for 3% of this characters Max Health.

On Death of an Iron Man (Infinity War) ally, clear all negative effects from self and all POWER ARMOR and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies, then apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all POWER ARMOR and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.

Gain +15% Max Health. POWER ARMOR and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies gain +15% Max Health.

On Spawn:
> Barrier self and all POWER ARMOR and P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.
> Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies.

In RAIDS, On Death of any P.E.G.A.S.U.S. ally, fill Speed Bar for this character by 50% + generate 3 Ability Energy for self.

basic.name: Pummel
basic.description: Attack primary target for 290% damage + apply Defense Down.

special.name: Furious Charge

Gain Taunt.
Clear 1 negative effect from self and each adjacent ally.
Attack primary and all adjacent targets for 350% damage.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Stampede

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 380% damage.
Apply Taunt to the primary target.

If this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, fill Speed Bar for self by 75%.

On Blind, clear Blind and 1 random negative effect from self and each ally, then fill Speed Bar for self by 100%.

In WAR, if this character has 2 or more SUPERIOR SIX allies, enemies with Slow cannot gain Charged.

Gain +5% Damage per HERO enemy.
Gain +25% Max Health per SINISTER SIX ally.

basic.name: Rocket Rifle

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 270% damage + 20% Crit Chance.

If Groot is an ally, this attack is Unavoidable.

Attack primary target for 350% damage + 8% Crit Chance per STARJAMMER ally.

Apply Taunt for 2 turns and Immunity for 2 turns to a random Groot ally.

Call a random Groot ally to attack the primary target. Gain an Assist from a random ally.

If this character has 4 or more STARJAMMER allies, this attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Maximum Damage

Attack all enemies for 310% Piercing.
Gain 2 Counter.

If Groot is an ally:
 > Flip all negative effects on self and Groot.
 > Apply 2 Counter to self, all GUARDIAN, and all STARJAMMER allies.
 > This attack ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be blocked.

On Turn, apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and 2 random allies that do not have Offense Up.

Gain +5% Damage. Tech allies gain +5% Damage.

If this character has 4 or more STARJAMMER allies:
 > Lower enemy Crit Chance by 100%.
 > Lower Max Barrier of all enemies by 25%.

basic.name: Mega Punch
basic.description:
Clear all Barrier on the primary target + attack for 300% damage.
If primary target did not have Barrier, Bonus Attack for 300% damage. If this character has 1 or more HORSEMAN or Apocalypse allies, always Bonus Attack for 300% damage + gain 25% Crit Chance for each HORSEMAN or Apocalypse ally for this attack.

Apply all of the following negative effects to the primary target for 2 turns: Trauma, Slow, Defense Down, Offense Down, Ability Block, Heal Block, Disrupted.
Reduce Speed Bar of the primary target by 50%.
Attack primary target for 375% damage.
Gain all of the following positive effects for 2 turns: Safeguard, Speed Up, Taunt, Defense Up, Offense Up, Immunity.
Gain 2 Evade + 2 Deathproof. Fill Speed Bar by 50%.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

In CRUCIBLE, gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.

On CRUCIBLE DEFENSE, this attack targets the enemy with the highest Speed Bar instead of the primary target, ignoring Taunt and Stealth.

ultimate.name: Belle Ringer
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 450% damage + apply Stun.
Attack all other enemies for 450% damage.
Copy and clear 2 positive effects from each enemy.

Gain +100% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all UNLIMITED X-MEN allies. In CRUCIBLE, apply Safeguard to self and all UNLIMITED X-MEN allies.

On Turn, Heal for 10% of this character's Max Health.
At the end of this character's turn, gain Defense Up.

When an X-MEN ally drops below 50% Health, gain Taunt for 2 turns.
When this character drops below 50% Health, clear Taunt from self (Safeguard prevents Taunt from being able to be cleared).

Gain +30% Max Health.
Gain +25% Damage. UNLIMITED X-MEN allies gain +25% Damage. Apocalypse and all HORSEMAN allies gain +25% Damage.
Gain +10% Drain per UNLIMITED X-MEN ally. UNLIMITED X-MEN allies gain +10% Drain per UNLIMITED X-MEN ally, up to a max of +40%.
While this character has Deathproof, gain +100% Resistance.

Clones of this character and all HORSEMAN and Apocalypse allies have reduced Max Health and Speed compared to standard Clones and they cannot reach maximum Ability Levels.

basic.name: Hammer Smash

Clear 2 positive effects from primary target.
Attack primary target for 180% damage + 25% Piercing.

This attack is Unavoidable.

special.description: Summon 2 KREE allies at 340% normal Damage and 100% of normal Health. Clear 2 negative effects from all allies. Possible Summons: > Kree Reaper > Kree Noble

ultimate.description: Attack all enemies for 290% damage. Apply Ability Block to the primary target for 2 turns. Apply Ability Block to 2 additional enemies.

passive.name: Accuser

Whenever this character or a KREE ally gains energy, they fill Speed Bar by 20% and are healed for 4,200 Health + 15% of this character's max Health. This effect may be triggered by another passive.

 Gain +30% Resist. Apply +30% Resist to KREE allies.
Apply +20% Max Health and +20% Damage to non-summoned KREE MINION allies.

basic.name: Vengeful Strikes
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% Piercing. Chain to 1 adjacent target for 230% Piercing.

When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist, they reduce Speed Bar for primary target by 5% + 5% per NEW AVENGER ally.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
This attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Cleaning House
special.description:
Attack primary target for 320% Piercing + apply Stun + 2 Bleed. Rebound Chain to 5 targets within 2 spaces of previous target for 250% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.

This attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

ultimate.name: Merciless

Clear Revive Once on the primary target.

Attack primary target for 50% Piercing + Bonus Attack 4 times for 50% Piercing.
Bonus Attack an additional time for 250% Piercing + apply Blind + 2 Bleed.
In WAR, apply Trauma.

This attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

On enemy Revive, apply Blind to that enemy.

If Black Widow is an ally, when this character or any Black Widow ally drops below 50% Max Health for the first time, Heal that character for 10% of this character's Max Health + Redistribute total health evenly between self and each Black Widow ally.

Gain +80% Focus. NEW AVENGER allies gain +80% Focus.
Gain +15% Speed. NEW AVENGER allies gain +15% Speed.

In WAR:
 > Gain an additional +20% Speed.

 > At the start of any match, if this character has 3 or more NEW AVENGER allies, enemy characters cannot fill Speed Bar.

basic.name: Claw Rake

Attack primary target for 340% damage + flip Defense Up.

In WAR:
 > Apply Offense Down to the primary target.
 > This attack gains 500% Extra Focus.

special.name: Thrash

Attack primary target for 460% damage + 80% Piercing + apply Offense Down.
Attack all adjacent targets for 320% damage + apply Offense Down.

If Omega Red is an ally, this attack does an additional 80% Piercing to each target.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Blood Rush

Attack primary target for 380% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns. Rebound Chain to 5-6 targets for 330% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns.

If Omega Red is an ally, apply Disrupted to each HERO PROTECTOR target. Gain +1,000% Extra Focus for this action.

This attack cannot be counterattacked and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Feral Healing

On Turn, Heal for 15% of this character's Max Health.
When this character drops below 60% Health, gain 2 Deathproof and 2 Deflect.

Gain +5% damage per BROTHERHOOD, MUTANT, or WEAPON X ally.
If Mister Sinister or Omega Red is an ally, gain +20% Crit chance.

Heal self and all SINISTER SIX allies for 25% of this character's Max Health.
