Generate an additional 2 Special Ability Energy for self, Vulture, Shocker, and all INSIDIOUS SIX allies.

passive.name: Identity Theft
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Immunity to all SINISTER SIX allies.
 > Apply Immunity for 2 turns to self, Vulture, Shocker, and all INSIDIOUS SIX allies.

When an enemy with any negative effect is attacked:
 > Heal self and all SINISTER SIX allies for 6% of this character's Max Health.
> If this character has 2 INSIDIOUS SIX allies and 2 other SINISTER SIX allies, fill Speed Bar for self and all SINISTER SIX allies by 3% + fill an additional 3% Speed Bar for self, Vulture, Shocker, and all other INSIDIOUS SIX allies.

On OFFENSE, if this character has 2 INSIDIOUS SIX allies and 2 other SINISTER SIX allies, lower enemy Dodge Chance by 100%.

basic.name: Skrull Barrage
basic.description:
If the primary target has Exposed, clear all Barrier on the primary target.

Attack primary target for 400% Piercing + Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 370% Piercing.
Flip 3 positive effects into negative effects on each target.

Gain Defense Up for 2 turns and Safeguard for 2 turns + Barrier self for 10% of this character's Max Health.

If this character spawned with or has 2 or more VILLAIN allies, this attack ignores Defense Up.
If this character spawned with or has 2 or more HERO allies, apply Disrupted for 2 turns to each target.

This attack can Chain to Stealth targets. Counterattack breaks this Chain.
This attack gains +200% Extra Focus and is Unavoidable.

special.name: Bending Flames
special.description:
Attack primary target for 450% damage + apply Exposed.
If this character spawned with or has 2 or more HERO allies, apply Ability Block for 2 turns to the primary target.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 400% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 20% for each target.
If this character spawned with or has 2 or more VILLAIN allies, reduce Speed Bar for all targets by an additional 40%.

Clear Stealth on all enemies.
Gain the following positive effects:
 > +2 Defense Up, up to a maximum of 5
 > +2 Offense Up, up to a maximum of 5 
 > 3 Deflect
 > Immunity for 2 turns
 > Stealth

This attack gains +500% Extra Focus and cannot be blocked, dodged, or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Psionic Super Nova
ultimate.description:
Apply Trauma for 2 turns to the primary target.

Flip Defense Up on all enemies.
Attack all enemies for 700% Piercing + apply Heal Block for 3 turns and Offense Down for 2 turns.

If this character spawned with or has 2 or more VILLAIN allies, this attack deals an additional +300% Piercing.
If this character spawned with or has 2 or more HERO allies, apply Trauma for 2 turns to all enemies.

Barrier self and all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.

This attack gains +1,000% Extra Focus, is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: Fantastic One
passive.description:
The first time this character falls under 50% Health, clear all negative effects from this character, heal self for 50% of this character's Max Health, and gain Stealth.

While this character has Stealth, allies gain +20% Damage Reduction.

On Stun, clear all Stun and apply Stun to the attacker.

When an enemy gains a positive effect or when this character or an ally gains a negative effect, heal self for 5% of this character's Max Health + fill this character's Speed Bar by 10%.

Lower Armor for all enemies by 25%.
Gain +50% Max Health. Allies gain +25% Max Health.
Gain +10% Damage and Focus + 10% for each HERO ally, up to a max of +50%.
Gain +10% Armor and Resistance + 10% for each VILLAIN ally, up to a max of +50%.

Enemies with Exposed:
 > Cannot gain Safeguard, Deflect, or Evade. This does not prevent prolonging the duration of effects already on the target.
 > Once per turn, when any enemy with Exposed is attacked, this character attacks all enemies for 5% of this character's Max Health and Barrier this character for 5% of this character's Max Health.

basic.name: Bee Ball
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage + 50% Drain. Rebound Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 240% damage + 50% Drain.
If Charged, lose 1 Charged. If not Charged, attack self for 300% damage.

Counterattack does not break this Chain.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to INFESTATION characters.

special.name: Bee Scream
special.description:
Attack primary target for 200% damage + apply Disrupted.
Bonus Attack for 120% damage + apply Defense Down.
Bonus Attack for 120% damage + apply Slow.

If Charged, lose 1 Charged. If not Charged, attack self for 400% damage.

On WAR DEFENSE, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, this attack will also have the additional effects, without losing an additional Charged, of this character's Ultimate - Bee Gone, targeting the primary target.

ultimate.name: Bee Gone
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% damage + apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns.

If Charged, lose 1 Charged. If not Charged, attack self for 500% damage.

This attack will also have the additional effects, without losing an additional Charged, of this character's Special - Bee Scream, targeting the primary target.

passive.name: Buzzkill
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain 8 Charged.

On Turn, heal self for 20% of this character's Max Health + flip 2 negative effects to positive effects.

Gain +3% Dodge Chance per Charged.

basic.name: Star Cutter
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3.

Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 320% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Whirling Assault
special.description:
If this character has 3 or more IMMORTAL WEAPON or MIGHTY AVENGER allies:
 > Reduce the duration of Immunity and Safeguard by 2 on all enemies.
 > In RAIDS, reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 on all enemies instead.

Attack all enemies for 300% Piercing + apply +2 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3, Trauma for 2 turns, and Heal Block for 2 turns.
In RAIDS, apply Stun to enemy with the highest Damage.

This attack cannot be blocked, counterattacked, or dodged.

ultimate.name: Omni Slash
ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies.

Apply Stun to the primary target + apply +3 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3 + attack primary target for 300% Piercing.

Bonus attack 3 times for 100% Piercing.

In RAIDS, this ability deals double damage.

On Kill, apply Stun to all adjacent targets.

This attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Descendent of Fu Xi
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Safeguard to self and all IMMORTAL WEAPON allies for 2 turns.

When an enemy with Defense Down is attacked:
 > 50% chance to generate 1 Ability Energy for self and all IMMORTAL WEAPON allies.
 > Heal self and all IMMORTAL WEAPON allies by 5% of this character's Max Health.
 > In RAIDS, always generate 1 Ability Energy to self and all IMMORTAL WEAPON allies.

Lower Armor by 25% for enemies with Stun.

In RAIDS:
 > Lower Armor by an additional 75% for enemies with Stun.
 > If this character has 3 or more IMMORTAL WEAPON allies, enemies cannot gain Offense Up.

basic.name: Aerial Ace
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 370% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns. Chain to 1 adjacent target for 310% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Lightspeed Blitz
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 270% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns to each target.
Repeat this attack 1 additional time.
Apply Speed Up for 2 turns + Defense Up for 2 turns + Immunity for 2 turns to self.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Dimensional Assault
ultimate.description:
Clear all positive effects from primary target.
Apply Defense Down to the primary target for 2 turns + attack for 600% Piercing.

Gain +5,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

passive.name: Dimension Hopper
passive.description:
On Spawn gain Charged + Offense Up for 2 turns.

On Turn, heal self for 20% of Max Health + clear all negative effects from Self. If negative effects removed, heal self for 5% per negative effect removed.
On Turn, if Charged and any enemy has attempted to Summon or Clone this match, clear Charged.

During ally turn, if an enemy with Defense Down is attacked, attack the most injured enemy for 400% damage.

Gain +20% Max Health. If at least one ally is COSMIC or Nick Fury, gain +20% additional Max Health. Nick Fury allies gain +40% Max Health.

P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies gain +30% Focus. 
P.E.G.A.S.U.S. allies gain +30% Resistance.

While this character has Charged, enemies cannot Summon or Clone.

basic.name: Slashing Fury
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip 2 random positive effects on primary target.
Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 300% + flip 2 random positive effects on each target.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
This attack cannot be blocked.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Variant Vendetta
special.description:
Attack primary target for 380% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Stun for 2 turns + copy and clear 2 positive effects, excluding Taunt and Stealth.

Chain to 4 adjacent targets for 380% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns + copy and clear 2 positive effects, excluding Taunt and Stealth.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Timeless Trickster
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 400% damage + apply +1 Slow, up to a maximum of 3.
If Loki or Executioner is an ally, this attack gains +25% Piercing.

This attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > Reduce the duration of all positive effects on each enemy by 2.
 > Apply +2 Disrupted, up to a maximum of 3 to all enemies.
 > This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Goddess of Mischief
passive.description:
On Turn:
 > Heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.
 > Mind Control 1 random enemy to attack a different random enemy. The controlled enemy gains +75% Damage for this attack. If Loki or Executioner is an ally, the controlled enemy gains an additional +100% Damage.

On Death of an ally Loki or Loki Mirror Image, fill Speed Bar for self and all BIFROST allies by 15%.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies, until this character completes a turn, lower the Damage of all enemies by 30%. This will not stack with other effects, such as Offense Down.

In RAIDS or WAR, on successful attack by this character, a BIFROST or SHADOW CONCLAVE ally, reduce a random positive effect by 1 on each attacked target.

basic.name: Cosmic Corruption
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage.
Flip 3 negative effects into positive effects on self. If this character has no negative effects, flip 3 positive effects into negative effects on the primary target instead.

In RAIDS, always flip 3 positive effects into negative effects on the primary target, regardless if this character has any negative effects.

This attack cannot be Counterattacked.

special.name: Scourge of the Spaceways
special.description:
Steal up to 1 Ability Energy from the primary target. In RAIDS, steal up to 3 Ability Energy from the primary target.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% Piercing + apply Defense Down for 2 turns.

This attack cannot be Counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Dark Horizon
ultimate.description:
Pull all enemies up to 2 spaces toward the primary target, then attack primary and targets within 2 spaces for 320% damage + flip 3 positive effects into negative effects on all targets.
Flip all positive effects on SPIDER-VERSE enemies.

Apply Ability Block for 2 turns to the primary target.
In RAIDS, apply Ability Block to all targets.

This attack gains 5,000% Extra Focus, is Unavoidable, and cannot be Counterattacked.

passive.name: Enter the Void
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Generate 2 Ability Energy for all HIVE-MIND allies.
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy + 1 additional Ability Energy per HIVE-MIND ally for this character.
 > Fill this character's Speed Bar by 25%.

On end of any Turn, Heal for 3% of this character's Max Health.

When an enemy takes damage from Bleed, Heal self and all HIVE-MIND allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.

Gain +60% Max Health. HIVE-MIND allies gain +30% Max Health.
Gain +60% Armor. HIVE-MIND allies gain +30% Armor.

In RAIDS:
 > On Spawn, apply Speed Up to self and all HIVE-MIND allies.
 > On Spawn, apply Slow to the enemy with the highest Speed.
 > Enemies cannot gain Immunity.
 > HIVE-MIND allies gain an additional +30% Max Health.
 > HIVE-MIND allies gain an additional +30% Armor.

basic.name: Symbiote Slinger
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 210% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns. Rebound Chain to 2 adjacent targets for 170% damage + apply Defense Down for 2 turns

This attack cannot be Countered.

special.name: Spider Slingshot
special.description: Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage. Increase the duration of all their negative effects by 1 + apply Bleed to each target.

ultimate.name: Web Slam
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 340% damage + apply Stun. Attack all other enemies for 260%. Apply Slow to all targets for 2 turns.

This attack is unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

passive.name: Perfect Host
passive.description:
In RAIDS and DARK DIMENSION:
> When a negative effect is applied to an enemy, heal self and all HERO SPIDER-VERSE and SYMBIOTE allies for 3% of this character's Max Health.
> Gain +100% Drain. SYMBIOTE allies gain +100% Drain.

Gain +15% Dodge chance.
Gain +30% Max Health. HERO SPIDER-VERSE and SYMBIOTE allies gain +30% Max Health.

basic.name: Imitating Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Transfer 3 positive effects, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self.

special.name: Adaptive Assault
special.description:
Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Stun. This action gains +300% Extra Focus.

Rebound Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 300% damage + apply Offense Down.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
If this character has 3 or more non-summoned UNDERWORLD allies or 4 or more THUNDERBOLT allies, this attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Incendiary Arrow
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 300% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns.

Apply Blind and Heal Block to primary target and 2 additional random enemies.
In WAR and RAIDS, apply Blind and Heal Block to all enemies instead.

Bonus Attack all enemies with Bleed for 200% Piercing.

If this character has 3 or more non-summoned UNDERWORLD allies or 4 or more THUNDERBOLT allies, gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.

This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Copycat Criminal
passive.description:
Gain Assist Now on each MERCENARY VILLAIN or UNDERWORLD ally's turn.

Gain +25% Block Chance. Gain +25% Block Amount.
Gain +20% chance to Counterattack + 20% per MERCENARY, THUNDERBOLT, or UNDERWORLD ally.

In WAR:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar for self and all MERCENARY VILLAIN and UNDERWORLD allies by 10% + 10% per MERCENARY or UNDERWORLD ally.
 > Assist allies on non-attack abilities.
 > On turn, if this character has 2 or more MERCENARY VILLAIN or UNDERWORLD allies, apply Taunt to enemy with highest Damage.
 - This is Unavoidable.
 - Gain +10,000% Extra Focus for this action.

basic.name: Element Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage + Bonus Attack for 250% damage.

Gain Offense Up.

special.name: Gravity Repulsor
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% damage + apply Blind. Apply Defense Down.
On WAR OFFENSE, if Yondu is an ally, apply Defense Down to all enemies instead.

If the primary target has Blind, steal up to 2 Ability Energy from that target.

This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Ravager Rocket
ultimate.description:
Copy all positive effects, excluding Safeguard, Taunt, and Regeneration, from adjacent allies.

Attack primary target for 530% damage.

Increase the duration of all positive effects, excluding Regeneration, for self and all RAVAGER allies by +1, to a maximum of 3.

passive.name: Rousing Ravager
passive.description:
On Turn, gain Evade + clear 1 negative effect from self and all RAVAGER allies.

On non-summoned enemy death, gain +30% Speed Bar.

Gain +30% Damage.
In WAR, RAVAGER allies gain +30% Damage.
RAVAGER allies gain +25% Max Health.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Gain +25% Max Health.
 > RAVAGER allies gain an additional +25% Max Health.

basic.name: Power Punch
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage.
Gain 2 Counter.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies, Bonus Attack the primary target for 260% damage and apply 2 Counter to a random SHADOW CONCLAVE ally who does not have Counter.

special.name: Brutal Assault
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.
Gain Taunt for 2 turns.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > Before this attack, clear all negative effects from self and all SHADOW CONCLAVE allies.
 > Clear all Charged and Revive Once on primary target.

ultimate.name: Energy Bomb
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 350% damage + 100% Drain.

This attack cannot miss.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > If this character's Health is greater than 50%, gain Taunt for 2 turns.
 > This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: Titan Eternal
passive.description:
On Turn, if this character has at least 1 Infinity Stone, become Empowered.

On enemy Death, generate 1 Ability Energy for self and 1 Ability Energy for 2 random adjacent COSMIC allies.

Gain +2,500% Extra Resistance while Taunting.

In WAR, with 3 SHADOW CONCLAVE allies:
 > On Spawn, fill Speed Bar for self by 50%.
 > When a non-SUMMONED enemy drops below 25% Health, generate 1 Special Ability Energy for an Executioner ally and fill that Executioner's Speed Bar by 25%.
 > If this character does not have 2 or more Exhausted, SHADOW CONCLAVE allies gain +2,500% Extra Resistance while this character is Taunting.
 > This character's ability to fill Speed Bar for self and allies cannot be prevented.

basic.name: Balanced Strikes
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns and 2 Bleed for 1 turn + reduce Speed Bar by 5%.

Repeat this attack once.

special.name: Unavoidable Future
special.description:
Barrier self and all allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Copy all negative effects on this character and each ally to primary target.

Attack primary target for 350% damage + apply Exposed, Trauma for 2 turns, and Stun for 2 turns.

Chain to 5 adjacent enemies for 300% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

ultimate.name: Inevitable Culling
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects on self + gain Offense Up.

Attack all enemies for 270% Piercing + reduce the duration of all positive effects on each enemy by 2 + apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns (Any positive effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Safeguard).

This attack ignores Defense Up.

passive.name: Rain Fire
passive.description:
The first time this character drops below 50% Health:
 > Clear all negative effects on self and all ANNIHILATOR allies.
 > Reduce the duration of all positive effects by 5 on all enemies (Any positive effect that has a duration of 0 expires instantly, including Safeguard).
 > Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing + 30% Drain.
 > This attack gains +1,000% Extra Focus, is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked or counterattacked.

Once per turn, when any enemy with Exposed is attacked, generate 1 Ability Energy for 2 random allies or self that were not at full energy on start of the current turn.

In ARENA:
 > Enemies cannot gain Immunity.
 > This character and all ANNIHILATOR allies cannot gain Trauma.

basic.name: Hellish Munitions
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 50% Piercing.
Bonus Attack 5 times for 50% Piercing.

In CRUCIBLE, this attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Ballistic Rain
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + apply Ability Block.
Attack all adjacent targets for 200% damage.

If the primary target does not have Ability Block, Bonus Attack primary target for 250% damage.

In CRUCIBLE, this attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

ultimate.name: Bullet Time
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 200% damage + flip 1 positive effect into a negative effect.
If a target does not have any positive effects, apply Trauma to that target.
This attack deals an additional +200% damage to any target with Safeguard.

Repeat this attack 2 times.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
In CRUCIBLE, this attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Demonic Thief
passive.description:
On successful attack by this character or an ACCURSED ally, apply Bleed and Heal Block to each attacked target.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > Enemies can only gain bonus Damage and Focus through positive effects.
 > HERO enemies can only gain bonus Resistance and Speed through positive effects.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 or more ACCURSED allies:
 > Enemies cannot gain Speed Up, Charged, or Offense Up.
 > HERO enemies cannot gain Taunt.
 > Enemies cannot Assist.
 > Enemies cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies (this does not apply to Speed Bar gained through normal means).
 > The Speed of this character and each ally can only be reduced by Slow.

basic.name: Calculated Shot
basic.description:
Attack the primary target for 300% damage.

Heal self and all VILLAIN and GAMMA allies for 10% of this character's Max Health. 

Clear 1 negative effect from self and all VILLAIN allies.
Gain an assist from a random CABAL or GAMMA ally.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or Assist:
 > Flip 2 negative effects into positive effects on self and all CABAL allies.
 > Gain Stealth for 2 turns.

special.name: Seek n' Destroy
special.description:
Apply 3 Regeneration to self and all VILLAIN allies.
Heal self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

Attack primary target for 350% damage.

Call 2 VILLAIN allies that have the highest Damage, that do not have Assist Now, to attack the primary target. Those allies gain +25% Damage for this attack.

In CRUCIBLE, apply Safeguard to self and all VILLAIN and GAMMA allies.

If this character has 2 or more CABAL allies, prolong the duration of all positive effects on self and all CABAL and VILLAIN allies by +1, up to a maximum of 3.

ultimate.name: Mind Over Matter
ultimate.description:
Apply Speed Up for 2 turns + 2 Counter to self and all VILLAIN allies.

Clear Revive Once from primary and adjacent targets.
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 350% damage.

Barrier self and all VILLAIN allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.

Generate 3 Ability Energy for all CABAL allies.
In CRUCIBLE, generate an additional 3 Ability Energy to all VILLAIN allies.

passive.name: Two Steps Ahead
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain 3 Evade. Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all VILLAIN allies.
 > Apply Safeguard to self and all CABAL allies.
On Spawn and On Turn, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 50, for the following:
 > For each ally with a different Class (BLASTER, BRAWLER, CONTROLLER, PROTECTOR, SUPPORT).
 > For each CABAL ally.
 > For each HERO enemy, gain +2 Charged, instead.

When this character or any CABAL ally drops below 50% Max Health for the first time, do the following to that character: 
 > Flip all Disrupted, apply Stealth and Defense Up, and Barrier for 10% of this character's Max Health.

Until this character takes a turn, On enemy Turn, Barrier self and all VILLAIN allies for 10% of this character's Max Health.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 2 or more CABAL allies, enemies with Vulnerable cannot gain Safeguard.

For every 5 Charged, gain +5% Crit Chance, +5% Crit Damage, and +5% Block Chance for self and all VILLAIN allies.
Gain +50% Max Health and +50% Armor.
In CRUCIBLE, VILLAIN allies gain +50% Max Health and +50% Armor.

basic.name: Knuckle Sandwich
basic.description: Attack primary target for 350% damage.

special.name: Pummeling Stone
special.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + flip Deflect, Minor Deflect, and Deathproof.

Bonus Attack 4 times for 150% damage.

This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Haymaker
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 550% damage + clear all positive effects.
Apply Stun for 1 turn, Disrupted for 2 turns, and Trauma for 2 turns to primary target.

If the primary target has Safeguard or is a MINION, gain +100% Crit Chance.

On Kill, apply Immunity and Speed Up to self and all FANTASTIC FOUR allies.

Gain +2,000% Extra Focus for this attack and this attack cannot be counterattacked or blocked.

passive.name: It's Clobberin' Time
passive.description:
In WAR, on Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 15% + 15% per NEW AVENGER or FANTASTIC FOUR ally.

When an enemy attacks this character, a FANTASTIC FOUR ally, or a NEW AVENGER ally, if this character does not have Ability Block, attack that enemy for 275% Piercing.
In WAR:
 > If the target is a CHARGEABLE PROTECTOR, clear 5 Charged. This clear cannot be resisted.

basic.name: Hammer Uppercut
basic.description: Attack primary target for 340% damage + flip Defense Up.

special.name: Hammer Throw
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + 20% Crit Chance. Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 230% damage + 20% Crit Chance.

Dodge breaks this Chain.

ultimate.name: Lightning Storm
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 320% damage.
Apply Stun to primary target. 50% chance to apply Stun to all additional targets.

passive.name: God of Thunder
passive.description:
Gain +15% damage. Gain +10% damage for each ASGARDIAN or WAVE I - AVENGER ally.

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN or WAVE I - AVENGER ally.

When an enemy attacks an ASGARDIAN or WAVE I - AVENGER ally:
 > Fill Speed Bar by 5%
 > Gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5

On maximum Charged:
 > Generate +1 Ability Energy for self
 > Attack all enemies for 260% damage
 > Remove all Charged

basic.name: Asgardian Throw
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 340% Piercing + apply +1 Defense Down, up to a maximum of 3.

Clear 2 negative effects from self.

50% chance to revive a dead Korg ally with 10% Max Health. In WAR, always revive a dead Korg ally with 10% Max Health.

special.name: Thunder God's Wrath
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% Piercing.
If this character has 2 or more KNOWHERE allies, clear all positive effects from the primary target.
Apply Ability Block to the primary target.

Rebound chain to 3 adjacent targets for 400% Piercing.

Attack the most injured enemy for 400% Piercing.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.
In WAR, this attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Mighty Stormbreaker
ultimate.description:
In WAR, clear all Barrier from all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 700% Piercing + apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Defense Down for 2 turns.

passive.name: Odinson's Revenge
passive.description:
On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN, AVENGER, or KNOWHERE ally.

On any enemy turn, 50% chance to attack the enemy PROTECTOR with the highest Speed, ignoring Taunt, for 250% Piercing + in WAR, clear all Charged.

Gain +25% Damage.
While this character has Deflect or Minor Deflect, lower the Block Chance of all enemies by 50%.

In WAR:
 > On summoned enemy Death, gain 1 Ability Energy.
 > Fill this character's Speed Bar by 5% when an ASGARDIAN, AVENGER, or KNOWHERE ally is attacked.
 > Gain +100% Focus.
 > Gain an additional +25% Damage.
 > KNOWHERE allies gain +50% Damage.

basic.name: Thunder Burst
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 360% damage + apply 2 Bleed.

Gain +1 Charged.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE, reduce the duration of Regeneration on primary and adjacent targets by 2.

special.name: Lightning Lash
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage.
Apply Blind to primary target.

Clear 2 random negative effects from self and all allies.
Heal self and all allies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:

 > Steal 20% Health from the primary and adjacent targets and redistribute 50% of the Health stolen to self and a Blastaar ally. This bypasses Heal Block.

ultimate.description:

Attack all enemies for 400% Piercing, apply Trauma, and steal 10% Health from from all enemies and redistribute the Health stolen to self and a Blastaar ally. This bypasses Heal Block.

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:

Call a random Blastaar ally to assist.
This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Architect of Thunder
passive.description:
On Turn:
 > Heal self for 20% of this character's Max Health.

When an enemy attacks this character or an ally:

On CRUCIBLE OFFENSE:

Gain +1 Evade, up to a maximum of 5.

Gain +1 Taunt, up to a maximum of 3.

This attack cannot be blocked.

 > Gain an additional +2 Evade, up to a maximum of 5.

 > This attack cannot be counterattacked.

Gain +1 Evade, up to a maximum of 5.
Gain +1 Taunt, up to a maximum of 3.

In WAR:

 > Gain an additional +2 Evade, up to a maximum of 5.
 > Gain an additional +1 Taunt, up to a maximum of 3.

Gain +20% Damage. NEW AVENGER allies gain +20% Damage.
Gain +15% Max Health. NEW AVENGER allies gain +15% Max Health.

 > Gain +1 Speed Up and +1 Offense Up.

Whenever this character gains 1 or more positive effects, gain +10% Speed Bar + heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health.
When this character or a MASTERS OF EVIL PROTECTOR is attacked, apply Slow to the attacker for 1 turn.

Gain +10% Crit Chance per Counter.
Gain +10% Crit Damage per Deflect.
Gain +25% Max Health.

In CRUCIBLE:

If Blob is an ally:

50% chance to gain Assist Now on each BROTHERHOOD ally's turn.

In WAR:

 > Reduce Speed Bar by 30% for all enemies.
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy for all adjacent BIONIC AVENGER allies.

On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has a Scarlet Witch ally and 3 or more MIGHTY AVENGER allies:
 > Apply Trauma and Ability Block to all SUPPORT enemies.
 > Reduce Speed Bar by 30% for all enemies.

If this character has 3 or more BIONIC AVENGER allies, this attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Density Manipulation
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Gain Defense Up for 2 turns.
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to all TECH allies.
 > In RAIDS, apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all BIONIC AVENGER allies.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, apply 3 Deflect to self and all MIGHTY AVENGER allies.

When an ally Viv Vision drops below 50% Health, apply Deathproof to that character.

On ally Viv Vision Ability Block, clear all negative effects on that character.

Gain +25% Dodge Chance.
Gain +50% Focus. BIONIC AVENGER allies gain +25% Focus.
In RAIDS, BIONIC AVENGER allies gain an additional +25% Focus

basic.name: Synthezoid Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 260% damage.
Apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5, to the most injured ally. If that ally is a BIONIC AVENGER, apply +2 Deflect instead.

In RAIDS:
 > Generate 2 Ability Energy for a random BIONIC AVENGER ally that was not at full energy on start of the current turn.
 > Generate 1 Ability Energy for a random Vision ally.
 > Gain an Assist from a random Vision ally.

special.name: Phasing Blast
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Ability Block for 2 turns.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for 2 random BIONIC AVENGER allies that were not at full energy on start of the current turn.

In RAIDS:
 > On Kill, apply Offense Down for 2 turns and Ability Block for 2 turns to all adjacent enemies.
 > This attack cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Solar Strafe
ultimate.description:
Flip 2 negative effects to positive effects for all allies. Flip all negative effects to positive effects for self and all BIONIC AVENGER allies instead.

Attack primary target and all enemies in that character's row for 400% damage + apply Blind.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for adjacent BIONIC AVENGER allies.

If this character has 3 or more BIONIC AVENGER allies, this attack is unavoidable.

passive.name: Positive Vibes
passive.description:
Whenever this character or a BIONIC AVENGER ally gains Ability Energy, heal self and all BIONIC AVENGER allies for 3% of this character's Max Health.

When this character or any BIONIC AVENGER ally drops below 50% Max Health for the first time, do the following:
> Clear Disrupted on that character.
> Clear Heal Block on that character.
> Apply Stealth to that character.
> In RAIDS, generate 1 Ability Energy for that character.

Gain +50% Armor.
BIONIC AVENGER allies gain +25% Armor.
In RAIDS, BIONIC AVENGER allies gain an additional +25% Armor.

basic.name: Void Burst
basic.description:
Attack the most injured ally and all adjacent allies for 250% Piercing + apply Defense Down for 2 turns to each target.
In CRUCIBLE, apply Trauma for 1 turn to each target.

On CRUCIBLE, this attack deals 500% Piercing instead.
This attack cannot target this character.

This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be Blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: The Void
passive.description:
This character cannot be Revived.
On Spawn, gain 3 Void.
On Turn, steal 10% Health from all allies and redistribute to self. This bypasses Heal Block.

On attacked, heal all enemies for 20% of this character's Max Health.

At the end of this character's Turn, lose 1 Void.
At the end of any Turn, if this character does not have any allies or if this character does not have any Void, this character dies.
On this character's Death, reduce the Speed Bar of all allies by 25%.
On ally Death, fill this character's Speed Bar by 20%.

This character cannot Assist and cannot gain Assist Now.
The Speed Bar of this character cannot be reduced and this character cannot gain Assist Now, Heal Block, Trauma, Slow, Stun, or Taunt.

In CRUCIBLE:
 > The Speed of this character and each enemy can only be reduced by Slow.
 > Enemies Max Health and Damage cannot be reduced except by negative effects.

basic.name: Liftoff
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage + 40% damage per negative effect on the primary target.

If the target is below 50% Max Health, this attack deals an additional 150% damage.

special.name: Fight and Flight
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + clear 2 positive effects from each target + apply Offense Down for 2 turns + apply Slow for 2 turns.

This attack gains +1,000% Extra Focus.

ultimate.name: Super Sonic
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 320% damage + reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

This attack deals an additional 200% damage to targets below 50% Max Health.

passive.name: Scavenger
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Fill Speed Bar by 10% + 10% Speed Bar per HERO enemy.
 > If this character has 2 INSIDIOUS SIX allies, fill Speed Bar for Shocker and all INSIDIOUS SIX allies by 10%.

After all characters have Spawned in at the start of the match, if this character has 2 SUPERIOR SIX allies, and any enemies have Speed Up:
 > Apply Speed Up to self and all SINISTER SIX allies.
 > On OFFENSE, clear Speed Up from all enemies + apply Slow for 2 turns.

On any Death:
 > Gain 2 Deflect + fill Speed Bar by 25%.
 > In RAIDS, if this character has 2 INSIDIOUS SIX allies, fill Speed Bar by 10% for Shocker and all INSIDIOUS SIX allies.

Gain +10% Block Chance for each HERO enemy.

Gain +50% Drain.
If this character has 2 INSIDIOUS SIX allies or 2 SUPERIOR SIX allies, SINISTER SIX allies gain +50% Drain.

basic.name: Arm Configuration: Attack
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip 3 random positive effects.

Apply Stealth to all NEW MUTANT allies with 50% or less Health.

special.name: Bomb-copter
special.description:
If this character does not have Trauma, transfer all negative effects from NEW MUTANT allies to self.
Flip all negative effects on self to positive effects.

Attack all enemies for 360% damage + apply Silence for 2 turns.

Clear all Battlefield Effects on the allied side.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack is Unavoidable.

ultimate.name: Nanite Tank
ultimate.description:
Reduce the duration of all negative effects on self and NEW MUTANT allies by 2.

Attack all enemies for 380% damage + apply Silence for 2 turns and Trauma for 2 turns.
In CRUCIBLE, this attack gains +50% Piercing.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 NEW MUTANT allies:
> Flip Vulnerable, Charged, and Revive Once to Ability Block on all enemies.
> Flip Vulnerable, Exposed, and Darkness to Immunity on self and all NEW MUTANT allies.

Clear all Battlefield Effects on the allied side.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Technarch Teen
passive.description:
Until this character completes a turn, enemies cannot gain Offense Up and this character and NEW MUTANT allies cannot gain Stun, Defense Down, or Exposed.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 NEW MUTANT allies:
> On Spawn, after all other characters' On Spawn effects, transfer all Speed Up, Defense Up, and Offense Up from all enemies to self then spread Speed Up, Defense Up, and Offense Up on self to all NEW MUTANT allies.
> On self or NEW MUTANT ally Turn, flip 1 negative effect to Defense Up and flip all remaining negative effects to Deflect.
> Enemies can only gain bonus Speed through positive effects.

The Speed of this character and each ally can only be reduced by Slow.

basic.name: Railgun
basic.description: Attack primary target and adjacent targets for 250% damage + apply Offense Down to primary target.

special.name: Missile System
special.description:
If this character has 4 or more LIBERTY allies, flip Defense Up, Offense Up, and Regeneration on primary and adjacent targets.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 120% Piercing.

Repeat this attack 3 times.

ultimate.name: Cluster Bombs
ultimate.description:
Clear Barrier on all enemies.
Attack all enemies for 460% damage.

This attack cannot miss and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Integrated Targeting
passive.description:
When an enemy drops below 50% or 25% Health, apply Taunt to that target, this cannot be dodged or blocked.

On Spawn:
 > Apply 2 Deathproof to self and all LIBERTY allies.
 > Apply 2 Deathproof to a random Iron Man ally.

basic.name: Sting and Move
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage. Chain to 1 adjacent target for 250% damage.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Blasters
special.description:
Attack primary target for 280% damage.
Bonus Attack 3 times for 230% damage.
Apply Stun to primary target.

If this character has 3 or more A-FORCE allies, reduce Speed Bar on primary target by 30%.

In WAR, this attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

ultimate.name: Flight of the Wasp
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 380% damage.

In WAR, if this character has 3 or more ABSOLUTE A-FORCE allies, this attack deals an additional +400% damage to all enemies.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.
In WAR, this attack cannot be blocked or dodged.

passive.name: Shrink
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Charged.

When this character is attacked, lose 1 Charged.

Gain +25% Dodge Chance.
Gain an additional +10% Dodge Chance per Charged.

In DARK DIMENSION, on Spawn, if this character has 4 or more PYM TECH allies, apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all PYM TECH allies.

In WAR:
 > On Spawn, gain 3 Charged instead.
 > Gain an additional +25% Dodge Chance per Charged instead.

basic.name: Rising Claw
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Heal Block for 1 turn and Defense Down for 2 turns. This attack deals double damage to summoned characters.

When this character performs a Counterattack or Assist, she applies Defense Down for 2 turns + Slow for 2 turns.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to SHADOWLAND characters.

special.name: Stalking Slash
special.description:
Attack primary target for 140% Piercing + 20% Piercing per SHADOWLAND ally
Bonus attack 3 times for 60% Piercing + 20% Piercing per SHADOWLAND ally.

Apply Heal Block for 1 turn + Disrupted for 2 turns.

In WAR, apply Ability Block for 2 turns as well.

ultimate.name: Thrill of the Fight
ultimate.description:
Heal self for 50% of this character's Max Health + clear all negative effects.

Attack primary target for 600% damage + apply Heal Block.

passive.name: Eye of the Tiger
passive.description:
On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 10% + 5% Speed Bar per SHADOWLAND ally for self and all SHADOWLAND allies.
On Spawn, apply Offense Up for 2 turns to self and all SHADOWLAND allies.

On Kill, fill Speed Bar by 70%.

Gain +50% Focus. SHADOWLAND allies gain +50% Focus.

In WAR, gain +30% Resistance for Self and all SHADOWLAND allies.
On WAR OFFENSE, gain +20% Damage for Self and all SHADOWLAND allies.

basic.name: Winter Assault
basic.description: Attack primary target for 290% damage and 25% Piercing + apply Defense Down.

special.name: Relentless Assassin
special.description: Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Bleed. Bonus attack 3 times for 210% damage + apply Bleed.

ultimate.name: Mechanical Arm
ultimate.description:
Clear 3 positive effects on the primary target.
Attack primary target for 630% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

In RAIDS:
 > If this character has 3 or more REBIRTH allies, apply Stun for 2 turns to the primary target.
 > Apply Disrupted for 2 turns to the primary target.
 > Gain +5,000% Extra Focus for this attack.

This attack cannot be dodged or blocked.

passive.name: Expert Assassin
passive.description:
When a Captain America ally is attacked, apply Offense Up to all REBIRTH allies.

Gain +30% Resistance. REBIRTH allies gain +30% Resistance. In RAIDS, gain an additional +30% Resistance for self and all REBIRTH allies.
Gain +25% Crit chance. REBIRTH allies gain +25% Crit chance. HYDRA allies gain +10% Crit chance.
If Baron Zemo or Captain America is an ally, gain +20% Max Health.

basic.name: Uncaged
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 230% Piercing + flip all Regeneration + prolong the duration of all negative effects, except Ability Block, Stun, and Trauma, by 1, up to a maximum of 3.

If primary target has Bleed, this attack gains +50% Crit Chance.

special.name: Beast Within
special.description:
Apply 2 Counter to self and all NEW MUTANT allies.

Attack all enemies for 250% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed and Heal Block for 2 turns.
If any target has Stealth, apply an additional 2 Bleed to that target + clear Stealth.

Bonus Attack the enemy SUPPORT with the highest Damage for 125% Piercing + prolong the duration of all negative effects, except Ability Block, Stun, and Trauma, by 1, up to a maximum of 3.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 NEW MUTANT allies, reduce the duration of all positive effects, except Stealth, by 2 on all enemies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Rise of the Lycan
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 450% Piercing + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and Heal Block for 2 turns + reduce Speed Bar by 30%.

Bonus Attack the most injured enemy for 225% Piercing.

On Kill, generate 3 Special Ability Energy for self.

Gain Offense Up for 2 turns and Speed Up for 2 turns.

Enemies killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Teen Wolf
passive.description:
When an enemy gains Stealth, apply Speed Up to self and all NEW MUTANT allies.

On self or NEW MUTANT ally Crit, apply +1 Bleed to all enemies with Bleed, up to a maximum of 10.

In CRUCIBLE, if this character has 3 or more NEW MUTANT allies:
> When an enemy gains Bleed, fill Speed Bar by %.
> Enemies cannot Assist.
> Speed Bar cannot be filled or reduced by any enemy for themselves, allies, or enemies.

In CRUCIBLE, this character and all NEW MUTANT allies gain +% Crit Chance against enemies with Blind or Silence.

basic.name: Adamantium Claws
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 260% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.

Gain Speed Up.

In RAIDS and on WAR DEFENSE, apply Disrupted to primary target.

special.name: Slice and Dice
special.description:
Attack primary target for 400% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.

Rebound Chain to 5 targets for 120% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.
Gain +100% Crit Chance on each secondary target.

This attack cannot be counterattacked and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Primal Berserker
ultimate.description:
If this character's Health is below 50%, gain Offense Up for 2 turns.

Attack primary target for 800% Piercing + apply 2 Bleed.

If Omega Red, Colossus, or Sasquatch is an ally:
 > Always gain Offense Up for 2 turns.
 > Clear Deathproof from the primary target.

On Kill, repeat this attack targeting the most injured enemy.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Healing Factor
passive.description:
On Turn, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.

When this character drops below 60% Health, gain Defense Up and 2 Deathproof.

While this character is below 50% Health, gain +100% Block Chance.

On Death, 25% chance to Revive with 50% of this character's Max Health.

Gain +5% Speed per UNCANNY X-MEN or WEAPON X ally. This is applied after any character has taken an action.

In RAIDS and on WAR DEFENSE:
 > While this character has Deathproof and does not have Exhausted, this character and all ALPHA FLIGHT allies, gain +200% Resistance.
 > On enemy Death, prolong the duration of all negative effects, except Trauma, Stun, and Ability Block, on all enemies by +1, up to a maximum of 3.
 > If this character has 3 or more ALPHA FLIGHT allies, enemy characters cannot gain Stealth.

basic.name: Arcane Kick
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage.

Clear 1 negative effect from self and all DARKHOLD allies.

special.name: Dash Strike
special.description:
Attack primary target for 200% Piercing + Bonus Attack 2 times for 200% Piercing.

This attack ignores Defense Up.

ultimate.name: Portal Barrage
ultimate.description:
Transfer all negative effects from this character to the primary target. Clear all negative effects from self.

Copy 3 positive effects from the primary target to self. Flip 3 positive effects on the primary target.

Attack primary target for 300% damage.

Gain Taunt for 2 turns + Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health.

If Strange (Heartless) or Doctor Strange is an ally, gain +1 Safeguard, to a maximum of 2.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Guardian of Ancient Knowledge
passive.description:
On Spawn, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all DARKHOLD allies.

On Turn, if this character or any DARKHOLD allies have any amount of Barrier, apply +1 Deflect, up to a maximum of 3, to those characters.

When an enemy attacks this character or a DARKHOLD ally, if this character does not have Ability Block, attack that enemy 3 times for 50% Piercing.

When this character drops below 30% Health, clear Taunt (Safeguard prevents Taunt from being able to be cleared).

Gain +30% Armor.
DARKHOLD allies gain +30% Armor.

basic.name: Snikt!
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 290% Piercing + apply Heal Block for 2 turns and Bleed for 2 turns.

Gain +1 Evade, up to a maximum of 3.

special.name: Relentless Assault
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% Piercing + apply Ability Block.
Bonus attack for 350% Piercing + apply +1 Ability Block, up to a maximum of 3.

Gain Stealth and 3 Deathproof.

This attack is Unavoidable, cannot be blocked, and gains +10,000% Extra Focus.

ultimate.name: Feral Rage
ultimate.description:
Attack the most injured, non-summoned enemy for 180% Piercing and 10% Drain, ignoring Taunt and Stealth + flip Stealth on that target.
Repeat this attack 4 additional times.

If this character kills the last non-summoned enemy, repeat this attack against the most injured summoned targets.

If this character has 2 or more X-FORCE or X-MEN allies:
 > Apply Bleed on each attack.
 > On the last Bonus Attack, apply Trauma to that target.

passive.name: Mutant Weapon
passive.description:
On Turn, Heal for 20% of this character's Max Health.
When an enemy drops below 50% Health, fill Speed Bar by 40%.

When this character's Health drops below 50%, gain 2 Evade.

While this character has Stealth, gain +50% Crit Chance.
Gain +140% Focus.
X-FORCE, X-MEN, and WEAPON X allies gain +140% Focus.

basic.name: Mental Shock
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + flip Immunity and 1 additional positive effect to a negative effect + apply Slow and 2 Bleed.

If the primary target has Disrupted, apply Blind.
If this character has Ability Block, reduce the Speed Bar of the primary target by 60%.

Clear 2 negative effects from this character. If any negative effects are removed, heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health per negative effect removed.
Gain Evade + Offense Up.

When this character performs an ISO-8 attack, Counterattack, or an Assist, the attack does no additional effects besides damage.
When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to those allies.

This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

special.name: To me, my X-Men!
special.description:
Do the following to self and all allies:
 > If this character does not have 2 or more Exhausted, clear 1 Exhausted and Exposed.
 > Reduce the duration of all negative effects by 2 + Heal for 30% of this character's Max Health.

Do the following to the primary and adjacent targets:
 > Reduce the duration of all positive effects by 2 + clear all Charged.
 > Apply Defense Down for 2 turns and Blind for 2 turns.
 > Apply Disrupted and Trauma.
 > If the primary or any adjacent targets are CONTROLLER enemies, apply Ability Block to that character.

Mind Control any 2 characters with the most Damage to attack the primary target. Controlled characters gain +100% Damage. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

If Cyclops (Age of X) is not currently an ally, summon Cyclops (Age of X). The summoned Cyclops (Age of X) ally gains Safeguard for 2 turns and Defense Up for 2 turns.

Clear the Battlefield Effect on allied side. This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Psionic Pacification
ultimate.description:
Flip Offense Down on self.

Clear Barrier on all enemies. Reduce the duration of all positive effects on all enemies by 2.

Attack all enemies that are under 25% Health for 25% of target's Max Health. This ignores Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.

Attack all other enemies for 750% Piercing. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived. This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked or counterattacked.

passive.name: Professor X
passive.description:
Until this character completes a turn:
 > Enemies cannot assist.
 > Enemies cannot gain Taunt, Speed Up, or Defense Up and allies cannot gain Darkness or Slow.
 > All characters' Speed Bar can only be filled or reduced by normal means.

 On enemy Turn:
 > Mind Control that enemy to attack the enemy with the highest Damage + apply Defense Down. The Controlled character gains +50% Damage for the attack + reduces the Max Health of the target by the amount of damage done.
 > Before the Mind Control, clear Barrier on the enemy with the highest Damage.
 > Fill this character's Speed Bar by 15% + flip Defense Down.

After any character uses their Ultimate Ability, if this character does not have Exhausted:
 > Barrier self and all allies for 15% of this character's Max Health.
 > Reduce the duration of all negative effects on self by 1 + Heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health for each negative effect that expired.

Enemies with Defense Down that normally cannot gain Trauma can now gain Trauma.
In ARENA, enemies cannot have their Max Health increased through Passive Abilities.
The Focus and Damage of this character can only be reduced by negative effects.

basic.name: Widow Strike
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage.

If this character or any ally has Stealth, transfer 2 positive effects, excluding Taunt, on primary target to self.

Gain an assist from a random WINTER GUARD or Black Widow ally.

special.name: Going Dark
special.description:
Copy and clear 1 positive effect, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self and all allies.
Clear Taunt from primary target.

Attack primary target for 280% damage + apply Disrupted for 2 turns.
Gain +2 Stealth, up to a maximum of 3.
This attack cannot be blocked.

In WAR, if this character has 3 WINTER GUARD allies:
 > Copy and clear an additional 4 positive effects, excluding Taunt, from primary target to self and all WINTER GUARD allies.
 > Copy and clear Revive Once.
 > Apply Trauma for 2 turns, Slow for 2 turns, and Heal Block for 2 turns to primary target.
 > This attack cannot be dodged.

ultimate.name: Dasvidaniya
ultimate.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% damage + clear all Deflect and all Deathproof.

This attack has 50% Extra Crit Chance and Crit Damage.
This attack cannot be blocked.

passive.name: Red Room Graduate
passive.description:
On Offense Up, gain Stealth. While this character has Stealth, gain +100% Crit Damage.

In WAR, at the end of any turn, if a non-PROTECTOR WINTER GUARD ally or self is Taunting, clear Taunt and apply Stealth + 2 Regeneration to that character.

If this character has Speed Up, all WINTER GUARD allies gain +100% Accuracy.
Lower Crit Chance for all enemies by 25%.
Lower the chance to assist on non-attack abilities for all enemies by 25% per WINTER GUARD ally, up to a maximum of 100%.

basic.name: Bio-Energy Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage. Bonus Attack for 230% damage.

When forced to attack an ally, this character deals less damage to INFESTATION characters.

special.name: Spiteful Sting
special.description:
Steal 30% Health from primary target and redistribute to self. Receive an additional 4,000 Health. This bypasses Heal Block.
Gain Evade + Regeneration.

In DARK DIMENSION, prolong all positive effects on this character by a duration of 1, up to a maximum of 4.

This attack ignores Deathproof and passives that trigger when a character drops below a certain Health.

On WAR DEFENSE, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, this attack will also have the additional effects of this character's Ultimate - Hostile Takeover, targeting the primary target.

ultimate.name: Hostile Takeover
ultimate.description:
Gain +1 Offense Up, up to a maximum of 3.

Attack primary target for 400% damage + all adjacent targets for 350% damage.

On Kill, apply 2 random positive effects to self and all PYM TECH and VILLAIN TECH allies. Then repeat this attack targeting the most injured enemy.

On WAR DEFENSE, if Spider-Man (Big Time) is an ally, this attack will also have the additional effects of this character's Special - Spiteful Sting, targeting the primary target.

passive.name: Don't Cross Me
passive.description:
While this character has Offense Up, gain +20% Speed and +25% Drain.

In DARK DIMENSION, gain +20% Damage for self and PYM TECH allies.

basic.name: Jagged Edge
basic.description: Attack primary target for 200% damage and 25% Piercing. Clear 2 positive effects from target.

special.name: Boarding Party
special.description: Summon 1 Ravager Boomer ally and 1 Ravager Stitcher ally. Apply Speed Up to self and all RAVAGER allies. Gain Stealth. Summons: > Ravager Boomer > Ravager Stitcher

ultimate.name: Yaka Arrow
ultimate.description:
Chain to all enemies for 300% Piercing. Clear 2 positive effects from each enemy.

Gain +100% Extra Focus for each RAVAGER ally for this attack.

This attack cannot be dodged.

passive.name: Centauri Hunter
passive.description:
On Turn, copy 3 positive effects, excluding Taunt, to self from each enemy. Clear the copied positive effects from the enemy. If an enemy has Blind, copy and clear all of their positive effects instead.

RAVAGER allies gain +5% Damage.
In WAR, gain +20% Focus for each RAVAGER ally.

basic.name: Rapid Strikes
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 230% damage + clear Counter.
Gain an Assist from a random INHUMAN or SECRET WARRIOR ally.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

special.name: Flurry
special.description:
Apply Safeguard to self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies.

Attack primary target for 170% damage + Bonus attack 2 times for 170% damage.
Repeat this attack on 3 additional random targets.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.

ultimate.name: Run the Gauntlet
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 270% damage.

Generate 1 Ability Energy for all INHUMAN or SECRET WARRIOR allies.
On WAR OFFENSE, generate 1 Ability Energy for a random Phantom Rider ally.

passive.name: Swift Protector
passive.description:
On Spawn:
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to all allies.
 > On WAR OFFENSE, apply 2 Evade to self and all SECRET WARRIOR allies.

On enemy Turn, if this character has no other PROTECTOR allies, apply Offense Down to that enemy. On WAR OFFENSE, if that enemy has Safeguard and Yo-Yo has SECRET WARRIOR allies, instead, reduce the duration of a random positive effect per SECRET WARRIOR ally, up to a maximum of 4, by 1. This cannot be dodged.

On this character's Turn and on ally non-MINION S.H.I.E.L.D. or INHUMAN Turn, 50% chance to apply Evade to that character.

When an ally drops below 50% Health:
 > Apply Defense Up for 2 turns to that ally.
 > If that ally was a SECRET WARRIOR, flip Disrupted to Immunity for that ally.
 > If that ally was Phantom Rider, gain Defense Up for 2 turns and Taunt for 2 turns.

Gain +25% Dodge chance.

basic.name: Targeted Assault
basic.description:
Apply Assist Now to a Hydra Grenadier ally.

Attack primary target for 290% damage.

special.name: Dominating Blow
special.description:
Clear 3 Deathproof from primary target.
Attack primary target for 450% damage. If primary target is a MINION, attack for 900% damage + 20% Piercing instead. MINIONS killed by this attack cannot be revived.

Gain +5,000% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack is unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

ultimate.name: Premeditation
ultimate.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage + apply Ability Block for 1 turn and Slow for 2 turns. Rebound chain to 4 adjacent targets for 270% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.

Gain Charged.

passive.name: The True Leader
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Charged and apply Immunity for 1 turn and Defense Up for 2 turns to self and all HYDRA allies.

On Turn, if Charged, attack all non-MINION enemies for 300% damage and all MINION enemies for 400% damage. Then clear 3 positive effects from all enemies, apply Disrupted for 2 turns to all MINION enemies, and lose Charged. MINIONS killed by this attack cannot be revived.

Gain +40% Speed. Non-MINION HYDRA allies gain +40% Speed.

On WAR OFFENSE, on enemy MINION turn, apply +1 Evade, up to a maximum of 3,to self and all adjacent allies.

basic.name: Repulsive Blast
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 290% damage + apply 2 Bleed.

Mind Control the primary target to attack the most injured enemy. On WAR OFFENSE, the controlled character gains +50% Damage for this attack.

Fill Speed Bar for all summoned Undead Asgardian allies by 30%.

Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.
This attack cannot be Blocked.

special.name: Undead Barrage
special.description:
Attack primary target for 450% damage + apply Bleed for 2 turns, Disrupted for 2 turns, and Ability Block for 2 turns.

Mind Control the primary target to attack the most injured enemy. The controlled enemy gains +50% Damage for this attack.

Fill Speed Bar for all summoned Undead Asgardian allies by 30%.
Fill Speed Bar for a random Hela ally by 10%.

Gain +500% Extra Focus for this attack.
This attack cannot be Blocked.
On WAR OFFENSE, this attack is unavoidable.

On WAR OFFENSE, if Hela is an ally:
 > Apply Trauma for 2 turns to the primary target.
 > Gain Safeguard for 2 turns.

ultimate.name: Corrupted Unibeam
ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies + attack for 500% Piercing + this attack gains +100% Crit Chance against any enemy with Bleed.

Prolong the duration of all negative effects, excluding Trauma and Stun, on all enemies by 1.
Apply Defense Down for 2 turns to all enemies.

Fill Speed Bar for all summoned Undead Asgardian allies by 30%.

Gain +1,500% Extra Focus for this attack.
Characters killed by this attack cannot be revived.

On WAR OFFENSE and if Hela is an ally, clear all Charged from the primary target and the enemy with the highest Resistance.

passive.name: Undead Upgrades
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Defense Up for 2 turns.

When an enemy takes damage from Bleed, Mind Control that character to attack the most injured enemy. The Mind Controlled character attacks for -30% Damage.

If Hela is an ally, 100% chance to Revive with 50% of this character's Max Health + 15% for each non-summoned UNDYING ally.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > The Mind Controlled character attacks for +30% Damage instead.
 > On Spawn, if this character has 2 or more non-summoned UNDYING allies, apply Defense Up for 2 turns to all non-summoned allies.
 > On Spawn, if this character has 2 or more non-summoned UNDYING allies, apply Speed Up for 2 turns to self and all non-summoned UNDYING allies.
 > If this character's Health is greater or equal to 50%, Stun cannot be applied to this character or any ally.
 > If this character's Health is greater or equal to 50%, enemies cannot gain Deathproof.
 > Enemies with Bleed take an additional 25% damage.

basic.name: Decayed Blow
basic.description:
Apply 2 Bleed to the primary target.
Attack primary target for 350% damage.

Chain to 1 adjacent target for 330% damage.
Spread all Bleed from the primary target to the secondary target.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.
This attack is Unavoidable.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > If the primary target has Bleed, attack the primary target for an additional 10% of target's Max Health.
 > This attack cannot be blocked.

special.name: Unstoppable Object
special.description:
Flip Taunt and Immunity on all enemies.

Attack all enemies for 450% damage + apply Slow for 2 turns.
Prolong all negative effects on each target.

Gain 3 Deflect and +1 Taunt, up to a maximum of 2.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Apply +1 Trauma, up to a maximum of 2, to all enemies.
 > This attack gains +1,000% Extra Focus.
 > This attack is Unavoidable and cannot be blocked.

ultimate.name: Crushing Death
ultimate.description:
Clear all negative effects on this character. If negative effects removed, heal self for 5% per negative effect removed.
Heal self for 10% of this character's Max Health.

Spread all Bleed from the primary target to all adjacent targets.

Attack primary and adjacent targets for 500% damage + 30% additional damage per Bleed + 50% Drain.

This attack cannot be blocked.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Prolong all Bleed, up to a maximum of 3, on each target.
 > This attack is Unavoidable.

passive.name: Undead Momentum
passive.description:
On Spawn, gain Taunt.

When attacked, if this character has Charged, fill Speed Bar for this character by 30% + 5% per UNDYING ally.

When this character drops below 50% Health, clear Taunt and Heal Block from self, gain +2 Deathproof, up to a maximum of 3, and apply Taunt to a random Undead Asgardian ally.

When any UNDYING ally is summoned or revived, gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5. On Death, if this character has 5 or more Charged, Revive with 50% of this character's Max Health + 10% Max Health for each non-summoned UNDYING ally, then lose 5 Charged.

Stun cannot be applied to this character.
Gain +100% Resistance. UNDYING allies gain +100% Resistance.
Gain +30% Damage per Charged on this character.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, gain 2 Charged.
 > Gain +10% Drain per Charged on this character.
 > If this character's Health is greater or equal to 50%, lower enemy Resistance by 75%.
 > If this character's Health is greater or equal to 50%, enemies cannot gain Speed Up.

basic.name: Burial Ace
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 320% damage + apply 2 Bleed.
Chain to 1 adjacent target for 320% damage + apply 2 Bleed.

On WAR OFFENSE, prolong all Bleed on each target, up to a maximum of 3.

Counterattack breaks this Chain.

special.name: Rock Tomb
special.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 300% Piercing.
On WAR OFFENSE, if this character has 3 or more non-summoned UNDYING allies, apply Silence for 2 turns to all enemies.

The first time this ability is used in a match, apply Revive Once to self and a random Hela ally.

On WAR OFFENSE, clear Battlefield Effects on allied side and apply the Battlefield Effect, Undead Tenacity, to allied side.

This attack ignores Defense Up, is Unavoidable, and cannot be Blocked or Counterattacked.

Undead Tenacity:
 > On this character's or ally's Turn, that character gains +2 Deflect, up to a maximum of 5.
 > Enemies cannot Passive Assist.
 > This character and all allies gain +10% Damage, up to a maximum of 50%, per enemy with Exposed.
 > This Battlefield Effect cannot be cleared or replaced by another Battlefield Effect and lasts until 14 characters, allies and enemies, have completed their turns.

ultimate.name: Dimensional Destruction
ultimate.description:
Gain Offense Up.

Clear all Barrier and all positive effects on the primary target.

Apply 2 Bleed for 2 turns, Defense Down for 2 turns, and Slow for 2 turns to the primary target.

Attack primary target for 500% Piercing.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > Instead, reduce the duration of all positive effects on primary target 2.
 > Apply Trauma for 2 turns to primary target.

This attack  is Unavoidable, and cannot be Blocked or Counterattacked.

passive.name: Dimensional Shambler
passive.description:
On Turn, heal self for 20% of Max Health + clear all negative effects from Self. If negative effects removed, heal self for 5% per negative effect removed.

During ally Turn, if an enemy with Bleed is attacked, attack the most injured enemy for 300% damage + apply Exposed. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.
On enemy Summon, attack the Summoner for 300% damage + apply Exposed. This damage reduces the Max Health of the target by the same amount.

Gain +15% Crit Chance and +25% Crit Damage.
Revive with 60% of this character's Max Health.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, after other characters' On Spawn effects, clear Charged on all enemies, apply +2 Bleed, and if this character has 3 or more non-summoned UNDYING allies, apply Trauma to each enemy.
 > On an Exposed enemy Turn, prolong all Bleed on that enemy.
 > Enemies with Bleed cannot Barrier themself or their allies and cannot gain Charged.
 > If this character is above 50% Health, this character and UNDYING allies cannot gain Ability Block and enemies cannot gain Safeguard.

basic.name: Necro Bolt
basic.description:
Attack primary and adjacent targets for 240% damage + apply Heal Block for 2 turns.

If this character is not at full energy, apply Bleed to primary target and call a random Iron Man (Zombie) or Juggernaut (Zombie) ally to attack the primary target.

This attack cannot be counterattacked.
On WAR OFFENSE, this attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

special.name: Wretched Reality
special.description:
Attack primary target for 240% damage + apply Disrupted for 2 turns and 2 Bleed.

Attack all enemies for 240% damage + apply +1 Bleed, up to a maximum of 5, to each enemy.

Apply Safeguard for 2 turns to self and all allies.
On WAR OFFENSE, apply Immunity for 2 turns to self and all UNDYING allies.

This attack gains +15% Damage against enemies with Bleed and cannot be counterattacked.
On WAR OFFENSE, this attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

ultimate.name: Chaos Unleashed
ultimate.description:
Clear all Barrier on all enemies and flip all positive effects into negative effects on each enemy.

Attack all enemies for 350% Piercing + prolong the duration of all negative effects by 1 on each enemy.

This attack ignores Defense Up and cannot be counterattacked.
On WAR OFFENSE, this attack is Unavoidable and cannot be Blocked.

passive.name: Power of the Damned
passive.description:
Characters killed by Scarlet Witch (Zombie) cannot be revived.

On Spawn, Barrier self for 30% of this character's Max Health.

On any Turn, if this character does not have Exhausted, flip all Bleed on self and all UNDYING allies.

On Turn, if an ally Juggernaut (Zombie) has died and is currently not an ally, summon Juggernaut (Zombie) and apply Taunt to that summoned Juggernaut (Zombie). This can only trigger once per match.

On WAR OFFENSE:
 > On Spawn, Barrier all allies for 30% of this character's Max Health.
 > Summoned Juggernaut (Zombie) spawns with +2 Charged.
 > If this character's Health is greater or equal to 50%, this character and all UNDYING allies cannot gain Trauma.
 > If this character's Health is greater or equal to 50%, Speed of all enemies can only be increased by positive effects and enemies cannot fill Speed Bar for themselves or allies.

basic.name: Chi Strike
basic.description: Attack primary target for 100% damage + Drain for 15% of base damage.

special.name: Blood Magic
special.description: Heal all allies 300 Health + 5% of the Sorceress's Max Health. Apply Defense Up to all allies for 1 turn.

basic.name: Concussion Grenade
basic.description: Attack primary target for 110% damage + 35% Piercing. Attack adjacent targets for 100% damage + 35% Piercing.

special.name: Barrage
special.description: Attack all targets for 230% damage + 50% chance to remove 1 positive effect from all targets.

passive.name: Airborne
passive.description: Gain +10% Extra Crit chance. Nick Fury and S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION allies gain+10% Crit chance.

basic.name: I.C.E.R. Rifle
basic.description: Attack primary target for 330% damage. On Crit, reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

special.name: Overwatch
special.description: Attack primary target for 370% damage + 100% Piercing.

passive.name: Fire Support
passive.description: When an enemy attacks an adjacent ally, attack that enemy for 250% damage + on Crit, reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

basic.name: I.C.E.R. Pistol
basic.description: Attack primary target for 240% damage + apply Offense Down for 1-2 turns. On Crit, reduce Speed Bar by 25%.

special.name: Emergency Treatment
special.description:
20% chance to Revive dead ally with 10% Health.

Heal all allies for 1,500 Health + 15% of this character's Max Health.

If allies are S.H.I.E.L.D. MINIONS or Nick Fury, then heal for an additional 20% of this character's Max Health.

passive.name: Fighting Fit
passive.description:
On turn, 50% chance to heal most injured ally for 20% of this character's Max Health + apply Regeneration for 2 turns.

If ally is Nick Fury or S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION, then apply an additional Regeneration.

basic.name: Snap Shot
basic.description:
Attack primary target for 250% damage.
100% chance to clear a positive effect from target.

If Nick Fury is ally, he gains the cleared effect.

special.name: Extraction
special.description:
Apply Stealth to most injured ally for 2 turns + Heal for 1,200 Health + 10% of this character's Max Health. Apply 3 Regeneration.

If ally is Nick Fury or S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION, apply additional Regeneration.

passive.name: Special Agent
passive.description:
Gain +20% Focus. Nick Fury and S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION allies gain +20% Extra Focus.

On Spawn, apply Counter to allied Nick Fury.
On Turn, apply Counter to Nick Fury or 2 S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION ally.

basic.name: Stun Baton
basic.description: Attack primary target for 270% damage + apply Slow.

special.name: Crowd Control
special.description: Attack primary target for 370% damage + Bonus attack for 350% damage. If target has Slow, apply Stun.

passive.name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Agent
passive.description:
Gain +20% Block chance + 10% Block chance per S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION or Nick Fury ally. Gain +10% Block amount.

When Nick Fury or a S.H.I.E.L.D. MINION drops below 50% Health, gain Defense Up.

basic.name: Eldritch Bolt
basic.description: Attack primary target for 260% Piercing. 50% chance to gain Evade.

special.name: Mind Control
special.description:
Apply Defense Down to primary target for 2 turns.
On WAR DEFENSE, with 4 or more ASGARDIAN allies, apply Taunt to primary target.

Mind Control 2 enemies to attack the primary target. The controlled enemies gain +25% Damage for this attack.

ultimate.name: Mirror Image
ultimate.description:
Apply Stealth to self and all allies except Mirror Images for 2 turns.

Summon 2-3 Mirror Images at 340% of normal Damage and 150% of normal Health. Mirror Images gain Evade.

passive.name: God of Mischief
passive.description:
On Spawn, fill Speed Bar by 15%. Fill Speed Bar of MYSTIC CONTROLLER allies by 10%.

Apply -30% Resistance to all enemies.
Gain +20% Focus. MYSTIC CONTROLLER allies gain +20% Focus.
Gain +20% Resistance. MYSTIC CONTROLLER allies gain 20% Resistance.

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

When this character drops below 50% Max Health, gain Stealth. When an  ASGARDIAN ally drops below 50% Max Health, apply Stealth to that ally.

basic.name: Hammer Uppercut
basic.description: Attack primary target for 340% damage.

special.name: Hammer Throw
special.description:
Attack primary target for 300% damage. Chain to 3 adjacent targets for 230% damage.

Dodge breaks this Chain.

ultimate.name: Lightning Storm
ultimate.description:
Attack all enemies for 320% damage.
Apply Stun to primary target. 50% chance to apply Stun to all additional targets.

passive.name: God of Thunder
passive.description:
Gain +15% damage. Gain +10% damage for each ASGARDIAN ally.

On Turn, heal self for 5% of Max Health + 5% of Max Health per non-minion ASGARDIAN ally.

When an enemy attacks an ASGARDIAN ally:
 > Fill Speed Bar by 5%
 > Gain +1 Charged, up to a maximum of 5.

On maximum Charged:
 > Generate +1 Ability Energy for self
 > Attack all enemies for 260% damage.
 > Remove all Charged.
